subject: Privatization means real harm to voters

WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger| | | Seriously, folks -- Privatizing the USPS doesn't help Americans, it will harm rural communities all over the country, and **it will remove a vital public service from our everyday lives.** In addition, it'll destroy a safe, secure, and widely-used method of voting that is critical for those rural communities, for the disabled, and for our senior citizens. **[We won't let them get away with this, but to fight back we need resources. We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.

The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy. **Now Musk and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting** , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.

“ _Our entire democracy is now at risk_ ,” they wrote. “ _History will judge what we do at this moment._ ”

With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP. **[Team, none of this happens without everyone doing their share. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111731003/558209023/1723810624?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViNmMwZjdhLTMzNjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M1zxdLmscKXz_vLsX-zonfDz9LFE0AahYhN1ObhoCBw=&emci=d119ab3b-f063-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5b6c0f7a-3364-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just called for my prosecution — here’s why I won’t back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi friend — this is Adam Schiff. The Voter Protection Project said I could reach out with this urgent message:

**Donald Trump just went on Truth Social and called for me to be prosecuted.**

Why? Because I led his first impeachment. Because I’ve held him accountable. Because I haven’t stopped. And I never will. This is just Trump’s latest attempt at political retaliation against his perceived enemies. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92343?t=6&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK) Over the years, Trump has called for me to be jailed for a variety of reasons, including accusing me of treason. And this latest baseless attempt at political retribution won’t stop me from holding him accountable — not by a long shot.

I’m not surprised that Trump is lashing out again. But even by his standards, this one’s weak. And as much as Trump may hope, this latest smear will not distract from his Epstein files problem.

[Nevertheless, I need your help right now to respond: rush a split donation between me and the Voter Protection Project to help us fight back and keep holding Trump accountable.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92343?t=7&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92344?t=8&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92345?t=9&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92346?t=10&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92347?t=11&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92348?t=12&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)
Trump doesn’t want to talk about skyrocketing prices, his tariff failures, the big ugly bill or why his rabid supporters are demanding answers over his refusal to release the Epstein files. So he goes back to the same tired playbook: Attack, distract, repeat.

But I won’t be intimidated. And I won’t stop doing my job – not now, not ever.

Instead of working to help families hit by extreme weather, rising costs, or his own healthcare cuts, Trump is using his platform to lash out at those who tell the truth.

He wants to silence his critics. But I refuse to back down – and with you in my corner, I never will.

[Please, rush a split donation to help me and the Voter Protection Project fight back today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92343?t=13&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)

Trump can lie and threaten me all he wants. I will never be deterred from fulfilling my duties as a U.S. Senator.

Thank you for standing with me,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20675%2E878179%2EpBjtNK)

### **Corporate Media 's Dying in Their Self-Imposed Darkness--Let Them **
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/624f5cdc-2875-44b1-9fd4-6c868b24872c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
`Independent Media For.26/day!`
_**We 're only 23 paid subs from 1000! Let's reach it tonight and amplify our work!!**_
#### _**Benefits we 've created for those who upgrade to paid:**_
_**Substack AMA each week w/ Cliff & David Shuster, video posted for paid subs**_
_**Insider stories in semi-regular columns/videos, live shout-outs to paid members, pics from trips like my recent one to Italy, lottery for free merch & periodic celebrity shout-outs**_
_**Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs (we are setting this set up)**_
_**Support our Soundcheck Fund --create an ecosystem of independent media to save democracy**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PJRqeED3Vfy1go9AISFO38zu8O5_zb0sX7bIrCH3piE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168652683)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09211241-d4c7-42d1-a20a-1f168fa0838e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last night Stephen Colbert announced that his late night show would be ending next year at this time--and he made it clear it was not by his choice.
Yes,[ the monopoly-media morons](https://substack.com/redirect/387c9122-22fd-40e3-acab-2e7b5dbd729c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for whom he's entertained tens of millions have deemed it so, and I'm sure it has nothing with how Colbert has used his brilliant timing and razor-sharp wit to disembowel Don-Don on the regular.
No, not the same group of autocracy-bangers who stuffed a wad of cash in Trump's g-string--$16 million, to be precise--to settle a ludicrous lawsuit as coherent as Rush Limbaugh. If you spoke to him today.
It seems 60 Minutes decided to engage in the practice of "editing" an interview with Kamala Harris. I mean, JFC, man, what's next!? Using b-roll? Adding in a voiceover? Human sacrifice. Dogs and cats living together. Mass hysteria!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea224845-2600-4481-9b05-0a7bfcd29600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But that didn't stop Paramount. Or is it CBS? Or freakin Viacom?? It's hard to keep track these days when only **SIX companies** with like 8,247 divisions, partnerships and subsidiaries**** own 90% of what we watch, hear, attend and play. Here, just take a look and tell me this makes economic or political sense--ya know, if you like transparency, and a lack of conflicts of interest in your journalism:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/abd6abd8-af85-459a-9d45-ae12f974fbc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Awesome! How could that much conglomerated power be bad for democracy!? I mean, if you don't care about [healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/da55a266-62f2-4213-9d3e-ee6c29b76a5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), childcare, working conditions, price gauging, the environment..It's almost like the head of CBS in 2016, Les Moonves, said about Trump's election, "[It may not be good for America, but it's damn good for CBS](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
**Oh, right, because he f*king did.**
So, yeah, you should definitely be counting on the patriotism of that ridiculous pile of corporate crap up above. They'd [absolutely report honestly](https://substack.com/redirect/ef59d394-1ddd-465f-9f7f-bf1a8c124f1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on something like [Trump's trashy budget bill](https://substack.com/redirect/d35cd099-a12f-46d9-992b-5948364ffadc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), b/c I'm sure none of their various entities--by which I mean almost all of them--benefit. And they'd never fire Colbert for political reasons.
But, wait, there's more! (Nothing for $19.95, I promise).
There was this little gem when CBS bribed....err, I mean settled with Donald Trump and his University-of-Phoenix law team. Because, let's face it my friends, when you're the proud owners of Sega, you get that _sometimes you have to pay to play._
> The $16 million settlement over an interview CBS' _60 Minutes_ conducted last fall with then-Vice President Kamala Harris **smooths the path for Redstone and Paramount to secure the approval of the Federal Communications Commission to sell the company to Skydance Media, a deal bankrolled by Oracle founder Larry Ellison, a Trump ally**. The FCC must sign off on the transfer of the broadcast licenses for CBS' local TV stations for the deal to go through.
Round and round the circle jerk goes. And where it stops we all freakin know. See Francisco Franco. Or Augusto Pinochet. Suharto. I know we weren't alive in the 1900s, but didn't anyone ever read about this sh*t? Does Teddy Roosevelt ring a bell?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/561e5461-765c-4a01-9314-59b476e050ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But, alas, Teddy isn't here, so big corporations and [billionaires merge with a group of grifting, authoritarian asshats](https://substack.com/redirect/73244899-223b-47df-ac2f-3fadc71a48d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--the bestest of friends!--_or_ the definition of fascism. Even as we've watched their role in the dumbing down of our public to get to a place where a criminal, [traitor](https://substack.com/redirect/c4ba8389-6a08-49f5-a752-d9eb91061847?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [adjudicated rapist](https://substack.com/redirect/1cde4f21-9d6d-4e48-b949-411b3469306f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), mentally-drained swamp, [racist](https://substack.com/redirect/661dbe75-85b5-46d0-9d0b-8290c3821134?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), creator of Eric and lifetime failure at everything imaginable could be President. _Twice_!
[And all his little mini-me's](https://substack.com/redirect/fc99eabc-7096-4503-b266-e4bc8c446f2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And if you thought MTVTBSComedyCentralCBSShowtime was bad, the other five companies who [control pretty much all the rest of our information](https://substack.com/redirect/387c9122-22fd-40e3-acab-2e7b5dbd729c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are every bit as pregnant with corporate-fecal matter. There aren't words that do justice to what a bunch of craven, cynical, greed-and-fame driven Tapper-heads they are.
Here's a list from just the past few months--journalists who've been pushed out b/c they told the truth--or were "mean, nasty, or unfair" as our 3rd-grade-vocabulary'd, pinhead President would say. Whether fired or they chose to leave, with all of them it was [because they could no longer be honest at these intellectually-barren outhouses](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
* Jim Acosta leaves CNN
* Katie Phang, Mehdi Hasan, Jonathan Capehart and others gone from MSNBC
* WaPo's $45 million _2nd_ _wedding kingpin --Bezos-- _kills a Kamala endorsement, kisses Trump's planetoid of an arse, and Joe Davidson, Jen Rubin, Ann Telnaes, David Shipley and numerous others head for the lifeboats.
* Terry Moran gone from ABC--who also bribed Trump after he whined and whimpered about their coverage--after telling the truth about Stephen Miller
* And the _New York Times_? They may as well rebrand as _The Hillary 's Emails Times_ or _Biden 's Too Old Gazette_. The couldn't find context for a story on Trump if someone lit it on fire and tossed it to them

We could go on. But I think you're seeing the pattern here. Media monopolies are capitulating and collapsing. But there is good news here too. They're dying. They've lost the plot, no longer even resemble the reason they were included in the First Amendment. And guess where many of those folks I mentioned decamped? [Here](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### Cancel your subscriptions.
### Turn. Them. Off.
### Let. Them. Die.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/03f9f611-30cc-4811-b905-a4fcc0d08017?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
These legacy outlets aren't adversaries of power. _They 're enablers of it._
Our biggest mistake as Democrats? Still clinging to bygone institutions that have outlived their integrity and purpose, instead of [creating ones we need ](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[for the moment](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. FDR didn't hold onto what failed during The Depression, he created new structures.
This is the right thing to do for our democracy. And it has the added benefit of making us not the protectors of a failing status quo, _but on the vanguard of the kind of change people are desperately craving right now_.
[We've got ](https://substack.com/redirect/7dab04b1-9c2a-40b2-907b-b5ee37af1a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/7dab04b1-9c2a-40b2-907b-b5ee37af1a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. [We've got ](https://substack.com/redirect/626b547a-c9e6-4568-8e97-54abc55b8bc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[YouTube](https://substack.com/redirect/626b547a-c9e6-4568-8e97-54abc55b8bc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. We've got each other. And yeah, _we 've got Blue Amp_--[a fighting chance to build real media resistance](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[I started the ](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Soundcheck Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ to do exactly that](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
👉 Fund independent creators.
👉 Build new platforms.
👉 Create a media ecosystem that serves the people, not the powerful.
💥 Want to help fund these creators? [Become a paid subscriber to ](https://substack.com/redirect/7dab04b1-9c2a-40b2-907b-b5ee37af1a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Blue Amp](https://substack.com/redirect/7dab04b1-9c2a-40b2-907b-b5ee37af1a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ today](https://substack.com/redirect/7dab04b1-9c2a-40b2-907b-b5ee37af1a13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's not charity--it's rebellion. It's building the future of our democratic republic.
The old guard bent the knee to fascism. [Let's write a new playbook](https://substack.com/redirect/3191cbef-7eed-4285-b481-8b2393951f2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--and broadcast it, **loud**. Because if they accomplished anything in promoting, paying off and chanting paens to a fascist--for access, ratings, clicks, fame-whoring, ever-more greed--it was in showing us, sadly, that Trump was right about one thing:
Monopolistic, corporate media in this country undermines democracy. That makes it, by definition, _an enemy of the people_.

name: Lofgren for Congress
subject: Four years ago this month (re: the January 6th Committee)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter –

Four years ago this month, Rep. Zoe Lofgren, along with her House colleagues on the January 6th Committee, began their investigation of the January 6th, 2021, Capitol attacks.

Zoe and other members of the committee, like Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger, bravely served on the committee to protect our democracy, all while enduring relentless attacks from Trump and his Republican allies.

And the attacks from Trump haven’t stopped after almost four years, but Zoe continues to fight every day in Congress to uphold our Constitution and protect our democracy. Peter, can you chip in $25 now to keep Zoe fighting in Congress and help elect more Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-18_J6C_LNG_ES-27858&amount=25]

Stand with Zoe in her fight to protect our democracy against Donald Trump >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-18_J6C_LNG_ES-27858&amount=25]

Since the first January 6th Committee hearing, Donald Trump has attacked, threatened, and diminished Zoe and her colleagues for speaking out against him and his attempts to overturn the 2020 election results.

After his 2024 victory, he suggested jailing January 6th Committee members and even pardoned January 6th rioters once he was back in the Oval Office.

An absolute disgrace to our democracy and the many lives lost and affected by the attacks on January 6th, 2021.

Even after Trump dismantled the January 6th Committee, Zoe is not backing down to him or his Republican allies. She continues to courageously lead the charge in Congress against Trump’s far-right agenda and will work endlessly to safeguard our democracy.

But Zoe needs help from grassroots Democrats like you, Peter, to stay in Congress and help elect more Democrats who will flip the House blue next year. Ending Trump’s MAGA trifecta is key to stopping Trump’s rampage on our country. So please chip in at least $25 now to join the fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-18_J6C_LNG_ES-27858&amount=25]

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-07-18_J6C_LNG_ES-27858&amount=5]

We’re in this fight together, Peter.

Friends of Lofgren

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ajUQo4ybxU21ST3ml0ekxQ2?unsubscribedata=08V1x4s7YiiOi2Fp%2B22PadzDkWeNEc9JJtk6Stlo1yh1iXQM3rnd4lH%2F%2F93hBQSapzoGGTBGKlC9XHhMx7PeAHmBJMKx4%2BRXF%2FwvpS88EXLkY%2FNhj85oH8wy8uFzxXfmOQ882ws7E%2BSxSvURcA6i2jzcKRID7nujnzLydQiez4Ln93BAoG3VTVoJAZQ7ej5Z%2FG6Hdd6v%2FodptOLyw86h%2F5lHDZkGoXaeojmNuAX%2Fg8xlRJkelg%2FR3IpUBRp72kht9g4AOLgxuX2R4xknZyySegTfWGGa09vQIdL41ztvTZ6MOxYhLpKu91C3op4dH5KccWjLPqLBWIjwGIYhnE8tpTPg6vuFDAvSJ%2FKXtVHjOW2SJv02GDYyN597tkYfsau3%2FXq2gsv5W8kB%2F5p22TFghwEgVxxzUEpKzDv1KhQnENY%3D .

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Shooter Update!
body:
The Unpardonable Hunter Biden Pardon

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ON TRUMP’S WOULD-BE ASSASSIN

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35676&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj0tY3N4OUFCcVFvcyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8039afc1251f2d38a166a01c61b3045cadca26cb5ead4c066f4d03b3e5baff23]

Why is the FBI not releasing what it knows about President Trump’s
would-be assassin?

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35650&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMjE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=eb5528c96be578bc0d8cbe7b176820eea2575ff0473fb39d208877f883c190a3]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding
Thomas Matthew Crooks, who attempted to assassinate President Trump on
July 13, 2024, (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35651&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMjE2L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c16d098147edc97fe52027deefa95e23eddf421995b70bd09512e2e967ef895f
_(No.
1:25-cv-02216)).

We sued after the FBI failed to respond to a July 24, 2024, FOIA
request for:

> All records, including but not limited to, investigative reports,
> interview summaries (Forms 1023), letterhead memoranda, photos,
> audio/visual recordings, database inquiries, interagency
> communications, and any other records, whether contained in the
> Central Records System or cross-referenced files, related to Thomas
> Matthew Crooks, born September 20, 2003 in Butler Township, PA and
> died on July 13, 2024, who attempted the assassination of former
> President Donald Trump on July 13, 2024.
>
> All records of communication in any form, including but not
> limited to emails, text messages, encrypted app communications and
> voice recordings, between FBI officials and/or FBI sources,
> contractors, and assets on the one hand, and Thomas Matthew Crooks
> on the other hand.

On July 13, 2024, then-Republican presidential candidate Trump
survived an assassination
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35652&F=T&&hash=23d67dbf58a99f9ba096ed086586eeb8e0f493530cddef5f212406e1a272a903]
attempt while speaking at an open-air campaign rally in Butler,
Pennsylvania. Trump was shot and wounded in his upper right ear by
20-year-old Crooks, who fired eight rounds from his perch on top of a
nearby building.

Crooks also killed one audience member, firefighter Corey Comperatore
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35653&F=T&&hash=6f735e7a721ccc28c8dd6336341e56c4e4c9629316e99f03542aa9bfe48fae8b],
and critically injured two others. Crooks was shot and killed by the
counter sniper team of the United States Secret Service.

No more delays and excuses. The FBI should release what it has on the
man who tried to kill President Trump a full year ago. Attorney
General Bondi should direct a full and immediate response to our
lawsuit.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR HUNTER BIDEN PARDON RECORDS

Joe Biden’s questionable pardons are all over the news, but we’re
focused on one in particular.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit

Attorney General regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of
Hunter Biden (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35645&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1wYXJkb24tY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMTQzL11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=837e3592b95f71e397507fd9fcaacbb5c267913c5ba2645a813108ac86ca2bab
_(No.
1:25-cv-02143)).

On December 1, 2024, then-President Biden issued a full and
unconditional pardon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvZDkvMjAyNC0xMi9iaWRlbl93YXJyYW50LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bbb88a245fa81bcd1859364639f6ec892d5a728b3f3789cfa861b9503cb2e437]
to Hunter Biden
for any federal offenses “which he has committed or may have
committed or taken part in during the period from January 1, 2014
through December 1, 2024.”

We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to a December
2, 2024, FOIA request for:

> Records and communications of the Offices of the Attorney General,
> Deputy Attorney General, and/or Associate Attorney General or their
> designated representatives, about the pardoning of Robert Hunter
> Biden by his father, President Joe Biden.

The Biden Justice Department officials at issue are: then-Attorney
General Merrick Garland; then-Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco; and
then-Associate Attorney General Benjamin Mizer.

Fox News reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35647&F=T&&hash=d8afab30c7d3cf1240c856de83a114cc8705d881ad2460c8c71d9b4f4bdde1e1]
on June 5, 2025, that the pardon of Hunter Biden was the only one of
the over 1,500 pardons issued in the waning days of the Biden
Administration that President Biden signed by hand. All others were
signed by the so-called presidential autopen, the report states. The
pardon also covers the time Hunter Biden served on the board of
directors of Ukrainian energy firm Burisma Holdings.

The Hunter Biden pardon for undefined crimes going back a decade is
invalid on its face. The Trump Justice Department should immediately
release any and all records about the Biden pardon scandal.

We have filed multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family
corruption.

SEAN O’DONNELL, FORMER EPA INSPECTOR GENERAL, JOINS JUDICIAL WATCH

Sean O’Donnell, a distinguished former government attorney, has
joined the litigation team at Judicial Watch.

O’Donnell was U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Inspector
General
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35662&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL3NlYW4tby0wNzYwOWI1Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=444e4643801e6e519f258ffe836f34112cc6c799573bb289b8b72546cc7b2ecf]
from 2020 to
2025, where he was a lone voice in the EPA warning against “fast
money” and careless spending. His reputation as a relentless fighter
against fraud, waste, and abuse was earned, having taken the
agency’s Office of Inspector General from one that realized only $3
million in annual monetary impact to one realizing over $2 billion in
2024.

>From 2020 to 2022, O’Donnell was acting Inspector General at the
U.S. Department of Defense where he successfully led over 1,800
oversight professionals, stationed across the globe, in fighting fraud
and waste, promoting effectiveness, and ensuring ethical conduct
throughout the Defense Department. During O’Donnell’s nearly
three-year tenure, his office recovered approximately $3.5 billion in
civil and criminal cases and issued 331 reports, identifying over
$1.25 billion in potential benefit to the Defense Department.

For 15 years, from 2005 to 2020, O’Donnell was at the U.S.
Department of Justice, where he served as an award-winning trial
attorney and prosecutor, focusing on white collar and fraud cases, as
well as corruption and national security matters. His areas of focus
at the Justice Department included investigating and litigating
whistleblower allegations of fraud, waste, and abuse committed by
government officials, contractors, and grantees. Through his work, the
Justice Department recovered over $4 billion for the government and
fraud victims.

Early in his career at the Justice Department, O’Donnell enforced
and ensured compliance with laws protecting the right to vote and the
integrity of elections, including the Voting Rights Act, the National
Voter Registration Act (NVRA), and the Help America Vote Act.

O’Donnell clerked on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eighth
Circuit and on the U.S. District Court for the Western District of
Texas. He also spent time in private practice, working on intellectual
property and antitrust litigation.

O’Donnell has a bachelor’s degree in economics from Texas A&M
University, a bachelor’s degree in mathematics from the University
of Washington, and a master’s degree in economics and a law degree
from the University of Texas at Austin.

We’re happy to have Sean O’Donnell join the Judicial Watch team.
His tremendous experience at the Justice Department and as Inspector
General for both the EPA and the Defense Department is a perfect fit
for Judicial Watch and should make corrupt government officials
nervous.

U.S. INVESTS MILLIONS TO CRACK DOWN ON SKYROCKETING FOOD STAMP FRAUD

Your tax dollars are being handed out fraudulently by the billions
through our porous food stamp program, as our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35677&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm9vZC1zdGFtcC1mcmF1ZC9dOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c3c85bc5807b684a3b49e4448d850335fa38551ccada9c1f1862dadcdd4ae315

> Fraud and corruption are so rampant within the nation’s mammoth
> food stamp program that the government is quietly investing millions
> of dollars in a special initiative aimed at cracking down on the
> waste that has long plagued it. In fiscal year 2024 nearly 42
> million low-income households got food stamps at a cost of around
> $94 billion. A substantial chunk of approximately $10 billion
> annually is paid out fraudulently and without proper intervention
> the figure will only grow, according to a recent academic study
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35678&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVyY2F0dXMub3JnL3Jlc2VhcmNoL3Jlc2VhcmNoLXBhcGVycy9yZWR1Y2luZy13YXN0ZS1hbmQtZnJhdWQtc25hcD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=73ba9d7d41506377d69dd424e4076f49070bb4fe67fd90590a3051ef3e0261ae].
> “Despite a 350 percent increase in spending on efforts to improve
> program integrity over the past decade, waste and
> fraud—particularly from benefit trafficking and eligibility
> misreporting—remain pervasive,” researchers found.
>
> This month the agency that administers the scandal-plagued welfare
> program, the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA), announced it is
> spending $5 million
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35679&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JhbnRzLmdvdi9zZWFyY2gtcmVzdWx0cy1kZXRhaWwvMzU5ODk2P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=66b46958352aff9246e97421c26cb016a58ca3651f352f6ade85ce5e591cd0ff]
on a Fraud
> Framework aimed at cutting back on waste in the bloated food stamp
> system, which was renamed Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program
> (SNAP) by the Obama administration to eliminate the stigma of
> receiving public assistance. States, which distribute benefits and
> determine eligibility, will receive up to $750,000 in funding to
> help correct a problem they have essentially created. For years
> there have been increased reports of food stamp theft by criminal
> actors through card skimming schemes of the Electronic Benefits
> Transfer (EBT) system that allows recipients to pay for food using
> the taxpayer-funded program as well as SNAP recipients intentionally
> committing fraud by violating program rules. This includes
> falsifying income or identity to be eligible for benefits they may
> not be entitled to, or by using benefits for anything other than
> their intended purpose.
>
> The $5 million Fraud Framework will reportedly tackle the problem by
> strengthening efforts to detect potential scams at the time of
> application, enhancing internal controls to protect against employee
> fraud, and improving documentation around recipient fraud or benefit
> theft processes. The framework will also better assess the impact of
> current integrity efforts and initiatives through active monitoring
> of a defined set of metrics and conduct “recipient integrity
> education” that improves messaging through various channels, in
> multiple languages, and in plain language rather than in legal
> jargon. The new educational material will also ensure that food
> stamp recipients as well as the public understand what SNAP fraud is
> and how to avoid becoming victims or committing program violations.
> Amusingly, the USDA writes in the grant announcement that it has
> “zero tolerance for fraud” and continues to implement measures
> to improve program integrity.
>
> The reality is that the problem has long persisted, peaking in
> recent years with a multitude of incidents that have fleeced
> American taxpayers out of large sums. Just weeks ago, Judicial Watch
> reported
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35369&F=T&&hash=ccbbbb191d38acf06f987e06e9ed03e27cb18077987411bda3040542b14253bf]
> on a case involving a bribed USDA employee who federal prosecutors
> say helped run “one of the largest food stamp frauds in U.S.
> history.” Adding insult to injury the longtime USDA staffer,
> Arlasa Davis, worked in a special division responsible for
> identifying fraud. For more than five years Davis and her
> conspirators ran a “sprawling fraud and bribery scheme that
> generated over $66 million” in unauthorized food stamp
> transactions, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ). The
> Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) found that Davis abused her
> position and privileged access to confidential government databases
> to help the others in the ring embezzle food stamp benefits by
> driving tens of millions of dollars in phony transactions. The
> disgraced USDA veteran and her accomplices were recently charged
> with conspiracy to steal government funds and misappropriate USDA
> benefits and Davis was additionally charged with bribery and honest
> services fraud.
>
> With SNAP fraud at an all-time high the USDA launched a special
> system last year to facilitate the replacement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=33414&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZnJhdWQtZ3JpcHMtZm9vZC1zdGFtcC1wcm9ncmFtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=71e09ebe74044b6520f04e7561c6dcfb0589463998c7f3ebad6b966542d68391]

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35680&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZnJhdWQtZ3JpcHMtZm9vZC1zdGFtcC1wcm9ncmFtL11vZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a55e281bb71d1c286fd46220348d38bf30ee305da22e257215e52c760f8c538e
> the welfare benefit when recipients claim it stolen. In the
> program’s first two years the government doled out a hefty $61.5
> million to replace pilfered food stamps in 127,290 cases. That
> figure has since increased to a whopping $102,425,077 to replace
> 226,196 of the 691,604 benefits reported stolen, according to the
> latest figures published in the SNAP Replacement of Stolen Benefits
> Dashboard
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=33441&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm5zLnVzZGEuZ292L2RhdGEtcmVzZWFyY2gvZGF0YS12aXN1YWxpemF0aW9uL3NuYXAtcmVwbGFjZW1lbnQtc3RvbGVuLWJlbmVmaXRzLWRhc2hib2FyZD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f12f2b9c6cd533cb76b4b45c82eb8943d5d62ab5f65187eac4284ac32a6cd0fd].
> Recipients in practically every state have submitted claims with New
> York leading the pack at 33,468, followed by California (32,258),
> Alabama (26,919) and Oklahoma (21,553). The new $5 million fraud
> framework is expected to drastically cut down on those figures.

UNPREPARED BORDER PATROL RELEASED ALIENS FROM TERRORIST NATION

The aliens pouring over our border under the Biden administration
weren’t all innocent Mexican families, as our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35681&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWxpZW5zLWluLWN1c3RvZHktdGVycm9yaXN0LW5hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=22f36b3fc391301d397ca750ebb46c282610dcc73263962d8baaee3106662ca5],
many were threats to our national security:

> Federal agents at one of the nation’s busiest border crossings
> failed to screen illegal immigrants from a country that poses a
> security threat to the United States as record numbers of the
> Special Interest Aliens (SIAs) poured in through its California
> sector. The SIAs—identified by the Department of Homeland Security
> (DHS) as foreign nationals originating from countries with possible
> or established links to terrorism—from Central Asia were being
> smuggled into the U.S. through Mexico in record numbers yet Border
> Patrol agents in San Diego did not have a process for identifying or
> vetting them like their counterparts in other southwest border
> sectors during an unprecedented illegal immigration crisis. The
> lapse resulted in missed opportunities to identify aliens who posed
> a potential risk to national security and to collect information
> about smuggling networks, according to a report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35682&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2lnLmRocy5nb3Yvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9hc3NldHMvMjAyNS0wNy9PSUctMjUtMjktSnVsMjUtUkVEQUNURUQucGRmXW1hZGU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9604de5db7e5520ce3387fadf920121e80188251d7df7f86bb862261f229c9a7
> public—with extensive redactions—this month by the DHS Inspector
> General.
>
> The watchdog reveals that Customs and Border Protection (CBP) agents
> encountered more than a fourfold increase of SIAs from one Central
> Asian country with known terrorist ties, from approximately 3,000 in
> fiscal year 2022 to an alarming 13,000 in 2023, yet the frontline
> DHS agency did not have a consistent mechanism to identify and
> provide additional screening of the potentially dangerous migrants.
> The specific country is redacted throughout the lengthy DHS report
> but it is likely Uzbekistan, a Muslim former Soviet nation that the
> Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) confirms
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=35683&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2lhLmdvdi90aGUtd29ybGQtZmFjdGJvb2svY291bnRyaWVzL3V6YmVraXN0YW4vI3RlcnJvcmlzbT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e678d3753a177d69a3e0eb1d806893e36448a7b50339f12eab26ca89601c4f08]
> is home to a number of renowned terrorist groups including Islamic
> Jihad Union (IJU), Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic
> State of Iraq and ash-Sham-Khorasan (ISIS-K). “According to CBP,
> smuggling networks scheduled aliens’ flights to Latin America, and
> then organized their travel by land through Baja California,
> Mexico,” the DHS IG report states. “Subsequently aliens often
> arrived at the U.S. border in San Diego and nearby areas.” Many
> scheduled appointments with the Biden administration’s disastrous
> CBP One App, which released hundreds of thousands of otherwise
> inadmissible illegal immigrants into the U.S., including those from
> hostile nations
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=30573&F=T&&hash=5244f9e50cbe06ba402f51f2eb209f3e8b91ba6fadc61392547a65bfa63894f1].
>
> The probe found that because CBP did not have an agency-wide policy
> to identify aliens from certain countries as SIAs, thousands of
> illegal immigrants from nations with links to terrorism entered at
> least one region that did not provide additional screening. The
> biggest offender was the then highly transited San Diego sector,
> where authorities estimate 65% of SIAs from the unnamed Central
> Asian nation with terrorist ties entered the U.S. during the first
> half of 2023 alone. The abrupt surge caused alarm among CBP
> officials who expressed concerns that smuggling networks responsible
> for the increase of migration could pose a national security threat,
> the DHS watchdog report reveals. The probe focuses on this narrow
> period of the Biden administration’s years-long open border
> disaster that welcomed a ghastly 7.6 million illegal immigrants,
> including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records. By
> the time the SIA lapse was exposed in July 2023, the problem was out
> of control. San Diego Border Patrol task force agents (TFOs)
> assigned to the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s (FBI) Joint
> Terrorism Task Force requested that frontline officers screen SIAs,
> but that did not occur. “Agents told us there were too many aliens
> in custody matching TFOs’ requests to interview before releasing
> them,” the report says.
>
> The terrorist threat to the U.S. skyrocketed
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75355&L=33711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVycm9yaXN0LXRocmVhdC10by11cy1za3lyb2NrZXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=828002323ae63fc7b3db509f5bc0dd39ec6c22908b2c7a62cc34bec64e867624]
> under the dangerous Biden-Harris open border policies with more than
> 1.7 million illegal immigrants from countries that DHS determined
> pose a national security threat to the United States entering the
> country and dozens that appear on the terrorist watchlist released
> into American communities. SIAs came from some 26 nations, including
> Afghanistan, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nigeria, Syria, and Turkey,
> China, North Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Mauritania, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan,
> and Venezuela. Afghan Mohammad Kharwin is an example of a terrorist
> released in the U.S. after getting arrested by Border Patrol near
> Imperial Beach, California in early 2023. Immigration and Customs
> Enforcement (ICE) placed him on its non-detained docket along with
> millions of other illegal aliens and instructed him to report to an
> ICE office in Sacramento, California even though he is a member of
> Hezb-e-Islami, a group responsible for attacks in Afghanistan that
> killed at least nine American soldiers and civilians from 2013 to
> 2015.

Until Next Week...

clean_body: The Unpardonable Hunter Biden Pardon [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ON TRUMP’S WOULD-BE ASSASSIN [] Why is the FBI not releasing what it knows about President Trump’s would-be assassin? We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding Thomas Matthew Crooks, who attempted to assassinate President Trump on July 13, 2024, (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:25-cv-02216)). We sued after the FBI failed to respond to a July 24, 2024, FOIA request for: All records, including but not limited to, investigative reports, interview summaries (Forms 1023), letterhead memoranda, photos, audio/visual recordings, database inquiries, interagency communications, and any other records, whether contained in the Central Records System or cross-referenced files, related to Thomas Matthew Crooks, born September 20, 2003 in Butler Township, PA and died on July 13, 2024, who attempted the assassination of former President Donald Trump on July 13, 2024. All records of communication in any form, including but not limited to emails, text messages, encrypted app communications and voice recordings, between FBI officials and/or FBI sources, contractors, and assets on the one hand, and Thomas Matthew Crooks on the other hand. On July 13, 2024, then-Republican presidential candidate Trump survived an assassination [] attempt while speaking at an open-air campaign rally in Butler, Pennsylvania. Trump was shot and wounded in his upper right ear by 20-year-old Crooks, who fired eight rounds from his perch on top of a nearby building. Crooks also killed one audience member, firefighter Corey Comperatore [], and critically injured two others. Crooks was shot and killed by the counter sniper team of the United States Secret Service. No more delays and excuses. The FBI should release what it has on the man who tried to kill President Trump a full year ago. Attorney General Bondi should direct a full and immediate response to our lawsuit. In March 2025, we sued [] the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records related to security provided for the rally in Butler, PA (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:25-cv-00704)). In September 2004, we sued [] the Department of Homeland Security for Secret Service and other records regarding potential increased protective services to former President Trump’s security detail prior to the attempt on his life at his July 13 campaign rally in Butler, Pennsylvania (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:24-cv-02495)). In August 2024, we obtained records [] from the district attorney’s office in Butler County, PA, detailing the extensive preparation of local police for the rally at which former President Trump was shot. The preparation included sniper teams, counter assault teams and a quick response force. On August 9, in response to a separate open records request, we obtained bodycam footage of the July 13 assassination events from the Butler Township Police Department. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR HUNTER BIDEN PARDON RECORDS Joe Biden’s questionable pardons are all over the news, but we’re focused on one in particular. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for all records from the Offices of Attorney General, Deputy Attorney General, and Associate Attorney General regarding Joe Biden’s controversial pardon of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [ (No. 1:25-cv-02143)). On December 1, 2024, then-President Biden issued a full and unconditional pardon [] to Hunter Biden for any federal offenses “which he has committed or may have committed or taken part in during the period from January 1, 2014 through December 1, 2024.” We sued after the Justice Department failed to respond to a December 2, 2024, FOIA request for: Records and communications of the Offices of the Attorney General, Deputy Attorney General, and/or Associate Attorney General or their designated representatives, about the pardoning of Robert Hunter Biden by his father, President Joe Biden. The Biden Justice Department officials at issue are: then-Attorney General Merrick Garland; then-Deputy Attorney General Lisa Monaco; and then-Associate Attorney General Benjamin Mizer. Fox News reported [] on June 5, 2025, that the pardon of Hunter Biden was the only one of the over 1,500 pardons issued in the waning days of the Biden Administration that President Biden signed by hand. All others were signed by the so-called presidential autopen, the report states. The pardon also covers the time Hunter Biden served on the board of directors of Ukrainian energy firm Burisma Holdings. The Hunter Biden pardon for undefined crimes going back a decade is invalid on its face. The Trump Justice Department should immediately release any and all records about the Biden pardon scandal. We have filed multiple federal lawsuits focused on Biden family corruption. A hearing was recently held in the May 2023 FOIA lawsuit [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. National Archives [] (No. 1:23-cv-01432). In February 2025, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records and communications regarding the Internal Revenue Service’s investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:24-cv-03387)). In June 2024, we received records [ the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) showing Mike Morell, former acting CIA director under President Obama, requesting CIA permission to publish a letter [ former intelligence community leaders stating that they believed the laptop emails exposing Hunter Biden’s connections to Ukraine were Russian disinformation. Morrell’s request for prepublication review was approved in just six hours by the CIA (Judicial Watch v. Central Intelligence Agency [] (No. 1:23-cv-01844)). In October 2022, we sued the DOJ for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:22-cv-02821)). We filed a lawsuit against the U.S. State Department on April 20, 2022, for messages sent through the SMART [] (State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [ (No. 1:22-cv-01066)). In December 2020, State Department records [] obtained through a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. Previously in this case, State Department records [] included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [] (No. 1:20-cv-00229)). SEAN O’DONNELL, FORMER EPA INSPECTOR GENERAL, JOINS JUDICIAL WATCH Sean O’Donnell, a distinguished former government attorney, has joined the litigation team at Judicial Watch. O’Donnell was U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Inspector General [] from 2020 to 2025, where he was a lone voice in the EPA warning against “fast money” and careless spending. His reputation as a relentless fighter against fraud, waste, and abuse was earned, having taken the agency’s Office of Inspector General from one that realized only $3 million in annual monetary impact to one realizing over $2 billion in 2024. From 2020 to 2022, O’Donnell was acting Inspector General at the U.S. Department of Defense where he successfully led over 1,800 oversight professionals, stationed across the globe, in fighting fraud and waste, promoting effectiveness, and ensuring ethical conduct throughout the Defense Department. During O’Donnell’s nearly three-year tenure, his office recovered approximately $3.5 billion in civil and criminal cases and issued 331 reports, identifying over $1.25 billion in potential benefit to the Defense Department. For 15 years, from 2005 to 2020, O’Donnell was at the U.S. Department of Justice, where he served as an award-winning trial attorney and prosecutor, focusing on white collar and fraud cases, as well as corruption and national security matters. His areas of focus at the Justice Department included investigating and litigating whistleblower allegations of fraud, waste, and abuse committed by government officials, contractors, and grantees. Through his work, the Justice Department recovered over $4 billion for the government and fraud victims. Early in his career at the Justice Department, O’Donnell enforced and ensured compliance with laws protecting the right to vote and the integrity of elections, including the Voting Rights Act, the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA), and the Help America Vote Act. O’Donnell clerked on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit and on the U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas. He also spent time in private practice, working on intellectual property and antitrust litigation. O’Donnell has a bachelor’s degree in economics from Texas A&M University, a bachelor’s degree in mathematics from the University of Washington, and a master’s degree in economics and a law degree from the University of Texas at Austin. We’re happy to have Sean O’Donnell join the Judicial Watch team. His tremendous experience at the Justice Department and as Inspector General for both the EPA and the Defense Department is a perfect fit for Judicial Watch and should make corrupt government officials nervous. U.S. INVESTS MILLIONS TO CRACK DOWN ON SKYROCKETING FOOD STAMP FRAUD Your tax dollars are being handed out fraudulently by the billions through our porous food stamp program, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [ Fraud and corruption are so rampant within the nation’s mammoth food stamp program that the government is quietly investing millions of dollars in a special initiative aimed at cracking down on the waste that has long plagued it. In fiscal year 2024 nearly 42 million low-income households got food stamps at a cost of around $94 billion. A substantial chunk of approximately $10 billion annually is paid out fraudulently and without proper intervention the figure will only grow, according to a recent academic study []. “Despite a 350 percent increase in spending on efforts to improve program integrity over the past decade, waste and fraud—particularly from benefit trafficking and eligibility misreporting—remain pervasive,” researchers found. This month the agency that administers the scandal-plagued welfare program, the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA), announced it is spending $5 million [] on a Fraud Framework aimed at cutting back on waste in the bloated food stamp system, which was renamed Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) by the Obama administration to eliminate the stigma of receiving public assistance. States, which distribute benefits and determine eligibility, will receive up to $750,000 in funding to help correct a problem they have essentially created. For years there have been increased reports of food stamp theft by criminal actors through card skimming schemes of the Electronic Benefits Transfer (EBT) system that allows recipients to pay for food using the taxpayer-funded program as well as SNAP recipients intentionally committing fraud by violating program rules. This includes falsifying income or identity to be eligible for benefits they may not be entitled to, or by using benefits for anything other than their intended purpose. The $5 million Fraud Framework will reportedly tackle the problem by strengthening efforts to detect potential scams at the time of application, enhancing internal controls to protect against employee fraud, and improving documentation around recipient fraud or benefit theft processes. The framework will also better assess the impact of current integrity efforts and initiatives through active monitoring of a defined set of metrics and conduct “recipient integrity education” that improves messaging through various channels, in multiple languages, and in plain language rather than in legal jargon. The new educational material will also ensure that food stamp recipients as well as the public understand what SNAP fraud is and how to avoid becoming victims or committing program violations. Amusingly, the USDA writes in the grant announcement that it has “zero tolerance for fraud” and continues to implement measures to improve program integrity. The reality is that the problem has long persisted, peaking in recent years with a multitude of incidents that have fleeced American taxpayers out of large sums. Just weeks ago, Judicial Watch reported [] on a case involving a bribed USDA employee who federal prosecutors say helped run “one of the largest food stamp frauds in U.S. history.” Adding insult to injury the longtime USDA staffer, Arlasa Davis, worked in a special division responsible for identifying fraud. For more than five years Davis and her conspirators ran a “sprawling fraud and bribery scheme that generated over $66 million” in unauthorized food stamp transactions, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ). The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) found that Davis abused her position and privileged access to confidential government databases to help the others in the ring embezzle food stamp benefits by driving tens of millions of dollars in phony transactions. The disgraced USDA veteran and her accomplices were recently charged with conspiracy to steal government funds and misappropriate USDA benefits and Davis was additionally charged with bribery and honest services fraud. With SNAP fraud at an all-time high the USDA launched a special system last year to facilitate the replacement [] [ the welfare benefit when recipients claim it stolen. In the program’s first two years the government doled out a hefty $61.5 million to replace pilfered food stamps in 127,290 cases. That figure has since increased to a whopping $102,425,077 to replace 226,196 of the 691,604 benefits reported stolen, according to the latest figures published in the SNAP Replacement of Stolen Benefits Dashboard []. Recipients in practically every state have submitted claims with New York leading the pack at 33,468, followed by California (32,258), Alabama (26,919) and Oklahoma (21,553). The new $5 million fraud framework is expected to drastically cut down on those figures. UNPREPARED BORDER PATROL RELEASED ALIENS FROM TERRORIST NATION The aliens pouring over our border under the Biden administration weren’t all innocent Mexican families, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [], many were threats to our national security: Federal agents at one of the nation’s busiest border crossings failed to screen illegal immigrants from a country that poses a security threat to the United States as record numbers of the Special Interest Aliens (SIAs) poured in through its California sector. The SIAs—identified by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) as foreign nationals originating from countries with possible or established links to terrorism—from Central Asia were being smuggled into the U.S. through Mexico in record numbers yet Border Patrol agents in San Diego did not have a process for identifying or vetting them like their counterparts in other southwest border sectors during an unprecedented illegal immigration crisis. The lapse resulted in missed opportunities to identify aliens who posed a potential risk to national security and to collect information about smuggling networks, according to a report [ public—with extensive redactions—this month by the DHS Inspector General. The watchdog reveals that Customs and Border Protection (CBP) agents encountered more than a fourfold increase of SIAs from one Central Asian country with known terrorist ties, from approximately 3,000 in fiscal year 2022 to an alarming 13,000 in 2023, yet the frontline DHS agency did not have a consistent mechanism to identify and provide additional screening of the potentially dangerous migrants. The specific country is redacted throughout the lengthy DHS report but it is likely Uzbekistan, a Muslim former Soviet nation that the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) confirms [] is home to a number of renowned terrorist groups including Islamic Jihad Union (IJU), Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic State of Iraq and ash-Sham-Khorasan (ISIS-K). “According to CBP, smuggling networks scheduled aliens’ flights to Latin America, and then organized their travel by land through Baja California, Mexico,” the DHS IG report states. “Subsequently aliens often arrived at the U.S. border in San Diego and nearby areas.” Many scheduled appointments with the Biden administration’s disastrous CBP One App, which released hundreds of thousands of otherwise inadmissible illegal immigrants into the U.S., including those from hostile nations []. The probe found that because CBP did not have an agency-wide policy to identify aliens from certain countries as SIAs, thousands of illegal immigrants from nations with links to terrorism entered at least one region that did not provide additional screening. The biggest offender was the then highly transited San Diego sector, where authorities estimate 65% of SIAs from the unnamed Central Asian nation with terrorist ties entered the U.S. during the first half of 2023 alone. The abrupt surge caused alarm among CBP officials who expressed concerns that smuggling networks responsible for the increase of migration could pose a national security threat, the DHS watchdog report reveals. The probe focuses on this narrow period of the Biden administration’s years-long open border disaster that welcomed a ghastly 7.6 million illegal immigrants, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records. By the time the SIA lapse was exposed in July 2023, the problem was out of control. San Diego Border Patrol task force agents (TFOs) assigned to the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s (FBI) Joint Terrorism Task Force requested that frontline officers screen SIAs, but that did not occur. “Agents told us there were too many aliens in custody matching TFOs’ requests to interview before releasing them,” the report says. The terrorist threat to the U.S. skyrocketed [] under the dangerous Biden-Harris open border policies with more than 1.7 million illegal immigrants from countries that DHS determined pose a national security threat to the United States entering the country and dozens that appear on the terrorist watchlist released into American communities. SIAs came from some 26 nations, including Afghanistan, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nigeria, Syria, and Turkey, China, North Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Mauritania, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, and Venezuela. Afghan Mohammad Kharwin is an example of a terrorist released in the U.S. after getting arrested by Border Patrol near Imperial Beach, California in early 2023. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) placed him on its non-detained docket along with millions of other illegal aliens and instructed him to report to an ICE office in Sacramento, California even though he is a member of Hezb-e-Islami, a group responsible for attacks in Afghanistan that killed at least nine American soldiers and civilians from 2013 to 2015. Until Next Week... _Previous Message from Marie Gluesenkamp Perez:_

Peter – The big bill passed by the Majority earlier this month shows us what happens when hyperpartisanship and special interests hold the reins in Congress:
**_OPB:_**
_**Small Washington hospitals brace for ‘severe’ effects of Medicaid cuts**
“As many as 250,000 residents could lose Medicaid coverage in Washington. That reduction would mean fewer patients can pay at hospitals that are already struggling.”_
---

Instead of middle-class tax cuts, Medicaid protections, or cost-saving measures – you know, things that actually help working families – this bill saddles our kids with $4 trillion in debt to pay for tax giveaways for the top 0.1%.

Frankly, it’s ridiculous. And if we don’t protect seats like ours and flip the House next year, we’re in store for more special favors for special interests while everyday Americans are left carrying the bag.

**Extremists have started launching attacks against me earlier than ever, in hopes of flipping WA-03 – we need to fight back.** [Can I count on you to help us prepare for anything they throw at us on the road ahead? We have a lot of work to do – and I’m grateful to have you on our team as we continue forging ahead.

– Marie

clean_body: | | Peter – We know that hyperpartisanship and extremism do nothing to make our streets safer or lower everyday costs for working families. That’s why Marie voted against the big, bloated funding bill, and it’s why she’s continuing to fight for common-sense, bipartisan solutions. But, that fierce independence and loyalty to community has made her a target for far-right extremists who want to replace her with someone who puts politics above people. = | = – Team MGP Previous Message from Marie Gluesenkamp Perez: Peter – The big bill passed by the Majority earlier this month shows us what happens when hyperpartisanship and special interests hold the reins in Congress: OPB: Small Washington hospitals brace for ‘severe’ effects of Medicaid cuts “As many as 250,000 residents could lose Medicaid coverage in Washington. That reduction would mean fewer patients can pay at hospitals that are already struggling.” Instead of middle-class tax cuts, Medicaid protections, or cost-saving measures – you know, things that actually help working families – this bill saddles our kids with $4 trillion in debt to pay for tax giveaways for the top 0.1%. Frankly, it’s ridiculous. And if we don’t protect seats like ours and flip the House next year, we’re in store for more special favors for special interests while everyday Americans are left carrying the bag. Extremists have started launching attacks against me earlier than ever, in hopes of flipping WA-03 – we need to fight back. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m already facing an ultra-competitive re-election fight. Republicans just cut over $1 billion in funding from public broadcasting. Why? Because Trump told them to do it. David Schweikert eagerly voted to gut funding for NPR, PBS and more than 1,500 local news stations across the country. I won’t stand for it. **[_Will you help me UNSEAT David Schweikert, flip the House blue, and hold Trump accountable for his attacks on free speech by chipping in $5 or more today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111732209/558247803/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.18_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYmUxZjctM2Y2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xgjSLFR8HSvh4VKvT4USLG0uTTpOGwPzZncDznqoyFY=)** | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111732210/558247804/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.18_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwYmUxZjctM2Y2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xgjSLFR8HSvh4VKvT4USLG0uTTpOGwPzZncDznqoyFY=)

I was a broadcast journalist for 20 years. I am _horrified_ by Schweikert’s blatant attack on free press and democracy.
Schweikert is the chief enabler of Trump’s dangerous, dictatorial agenda. Millions of Americans rely on trustworthy public media like NPR and PBS for their local news, including safety alerts and current events.
Defunding these outlets will keep millions in the dark and make them unsafe. It will especially hurt rural communities and tribal communities here in Arizona and across the U.S.
I’ve seen this story unfold before. My parents fled a dictatorship in search of freedom for our family. Now, we’re seeing an extremist regime play out in real time.
**[_I spent 20 years holding the powerful accountable, and I am ready to keep up this critical work in Washington. clean_body: Republicans just cut over $1 billion from public broadcasting. | | = Republicans just cut over $1 billion in funding from public broadcasting. Why? Because Trump told them to do it. David Schweikert eagerly voted to gut funding for NPR, PBS and more than 1,500 local news stations across the country. I won’t stand for it. = | = I was a broadcast journalist for 20 years. I am horrified by Schweikert’s blatant attack on free press and democracy. Schweikert is the chief enabler of Trump’s dangerous, dictatorial agenda. Millions of Americans rely on trustworthy public media like NPR and PBS for their local news, including safety alerts and current events. Defunding these outlets will keep millions in the dark and make them unsafe. It will especially hurt rural communities and tribal communities here in Arizona and across the U.S. I’ve seen this story unfold before. My parents fled a dictatorship in search of freedom for our family. Now, we’re seeing an extremist regime play out in real time. = If you’ve saved your payment info with ActBlue, your contribution will be processed immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Marlene Galán-Woods | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E.
