**Disaster Relief Available for Flood-Affected Residents**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65b2b039-fc1a-4566-948f-74f5032cbfef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Our hearts continue to go out to everyone impacted by the devastating floods that swept through Central Texas over the July 4th weekend. We know many families--including some within our REALTOR® community--are facing difficult days ahead. If you--or someone you know--suffered damage to a primary residence during the July 4th weekend flooding, assistance may be available through the Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund.
Please click the button below for the [Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund ](https://substack.com/redirect/1443366f-656d-43ff-b511-7f27b26ecc58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[Application](https://substack.com/redirect/b4fde0c9-1d8a-4ba0-a285-c4b294add1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_Who is eligible to apply?_
Texas residents whose primary residence was damaged and who live in a county listed in the Governor's disaster declaration: Bexar, Burnet, Caldwell, Gaudalupe, Travis, and Williamson. Only one application per residence is allowed.
_What must be submitted with the application?_
* A valid photo ID
* Proof of residence that matches the affected address
* If insured, documentation showing the insurance claim, deductible, and payout amount

Application Deadline: All applications must be submitted by September 30, 2025.
To apply or learn more, please visit our website: [Williamson County Disaster Relief](https://substack.com/redirect/95ac07a7-8a16-4db5-aab3-32a1262527d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Appeals court upholds Texas law limiting cities' enforcement of local ordinances," **Texas Tribune's **Hayden Betts** -- "Two years after a district court declared that a new state law diluting the policy-making power of blue urban areas was unconstitutional, an appeals court on Friday overruled that decision.

Texas lawmakers in 2023 passed [House Bill 2127](https://substack.com/redirect/f2166d31-1bdc-43eb-9119-1795eb7ef05a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), dubbed the ["Death Star" bill](https://substack.com/redirect/f2695558-0800-43f1-ac08-62914fd117b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by opponents, which aims to overturn cities' progressive policies and prevent them from enacting future ordinances that aren't aligned with broad swaths of state law.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/6bccc24b-e524-4d18-b0bb-426be2f8f8b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The law prevents cities and counties from creating local ordinances that overstep state laws, such as those passed in Dallas and Austin mandating [water breaks for construction workers](https://substack.com/redirect/994937c9-b2f6-4a4f-9475-46e932ac5e9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The bill, long sought by Gov. **Greg Abbott** , marks Texas Republicans' biggest attempt to undercut the power of the state's largest metropolitan areas, home to the most Democratic-leaning constituents and leaders.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/6bccc24b-e524-4d18-b0bb-426be2f8f8b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A month after the bill passed, Houston, later joined by San Antonio and El Paso, [sued the state](https://substack.com/redirect/0220f9ac-fabf-4703-b475-fe00488fa8c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to block the new law, arguing that it deprived elected officials of the power to enact local ordinances on a broad range of issues, such as noise regulations and mask mandates. They also were concerned that the law made it so difficult for local leaders to self-govern that it would push them to propose fewer policy changes.

"What this means is that cities like the city of Houston cannot pass ordinances in these areas unless the state of Texas explicitly gives us permission to do so," late Houston Mayor **Sylvester Turner** said in 2023. "That is a total reversal from the way things have been in this state for more than a century."

A Travis County judge [ruled in August 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/e44f971c-2d77-4a20-9ab5-31a9b0b0439a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the law was unconstitutional, but on Friday the Third Court of Appeals overturned that decision.

[In its ruling](https://substack.com/redirect/c2956576-6cc0-450e-a1db-893483236fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the appeals court said it agrees with the state largely for two reasons: the cities failed to point to "sufficient concreteness" of how the bill would hurt them, and made a weak case for how the state is to blame for their concerns.

The San Antonio city attorney's office, however, noted that the court dismissed the case because "cities don't have standing to challenge" the law because "at this point, there have been no challenges to any of our ordinances under this statute."

Texas Republicans and business lobbyists argued that the law works to untangle a confusing patchwork of local regulations that burden businesses and slow economic growth. After the bill passed, Abbott said the law prevents cities from being "able to micromanage businesses" which are "especially driving up the costs for local businesses."

"We are going to have one regulatory regime across the entire state on massive subject areas that will make the cost of business even lower, the ease of business even better," Abbott later added.

Earlier this year, lawmakers [failed to pass](https://substack.com/redirect/9700a99c-2807-447d-a3c4-ff43adba02c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [Senate Bill 2858](https://substack.com/redirect/9350e241-1142-46e5-98a7-681a39d2eb5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which sought to add teeth to the 2023 law by giving the Texas attorney general the power to sue cities and counties for adopting local rules overstepping state laws.

The San Antonio city attorney's office said it is in the process of reviewing legal options and is coordinating with Houston and El Paso to plan out next steps.

"While this decision dismissed the current case, it doesn't prevent us from raising these constitutional issues again in the future if a specific challenge arises under HB 2127," the office said." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/c01d7e1a-bb74-4d40-8252-f3bc6d506593?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

A GOOD CAUSE | | ---|---|--- Disaster Relief Available for Flood-Affected Residents | | ---|---|--- Our hearts continue to go out to everyone impacted by the devastating floods that swept through Central Texas over the July 4th weekend. We know many families--including some within our REALTOR® community--are facing difficult days ahead. If you--or someone you know--suffered damage to a primary residence during the July 4th weekend flooding, assistance may be available through the Texas REALTORS® Disaster Relief Fund. Please click the button below for the . Who is eligible to apply? Texas residents whose primary residence was damaged and who live in a county listed in the Governor's disaster declaration: Bexar, Burnet, Caldwell, Gaudalupe, Travis, and Williamson. Only one application per residence is allowed. What must be submitted with the application? A valid photo ID Proof of residence that matches the affected address If insured, documentation showing the insurance claim, deductible, and payout amount Application Deadline: All applications must be submitted by September 30, 2025. To apply or learn more, please visit our website: TOP NEWS " Appeals court upholds Texas law limiting cities' enforcement of local ordinances," Texas Tribune's Hayden Betts -- "Two years after a district court declared that a new state law diluting the policy-making power of blue urban areas was unconstitutional, an appeals court on Friday overruled that decision. Texas lawmakers in 2023 passed , dubbed the by opponents, which aims to overturn cities' progressive policies and prevent them from enacting future ordinances that aren't aligned with broad swaths of state law. The law prevents cities and counties from creating local ordinances that overstep state laws, such as those passed in Dallas and Austin mandating . The bill, long sought by Gov. Greg Abbott , marks Texas Republicans' biggest attempt to undercut the power of the state's largest metropolitan areas, home to the most Democratic-leaning constituents and leaders. A month after the bill passed, Houston, later joined by San Antonio and El Paso, to block the new law, arguing that it deprived elected officials of the power to enact local ordinances on a broad range of issues, such as noise regulations and mask mandates. They also were concerned that the law made it so difficult for local leaders to self-govern that it would push them to propose fewer policy changes. "What this means is that cities like the city of Houston cannot pass ordinances in these areas unless the state of Texas explicitly gives us permission to do so," late Houston Mayor Sylvester Turner said in 2023. "That is a total reversal from the way things have been in this state for more than a century." A Travis County judge that the law was unconstitutional, but on Friday the Third Court of Appeals overturned that decision. , the appeals court said it agrees with the state largely for two reasons: the cities failed to point to "sufficient concreteness" of how the bill would hurt them, and made a weak case for how the state is to blame for their concerns. The San Antonio city attorney's office, however, noted that the court dismissed the case because "cities don't have standing to challenge" the law because "at this point, there have been no challenges to any of our ordinances under this statute." Texas Republicans and business lobbyists argued that the law works to untangle a confusing patchwork of local regulations that burden businesses and slow economic growth. After the bill passed, Abbott said the law prevents cities from being "able to micromanage businesses" which are "especially driving up the costs for local businesses." "We are going to have one regulatory regime across the entire state on massive subject areas that will make the cost of business even lower, the ease of business even better," Abbott later added. Earlier this year, lawmakers , which sought to add teeth to the 2023 law by giving the Texas attorney general the power to sue cities and counties for adopting local rules overstepping state laws. The San Antonio city attorney's office said it is in the process of reviewing legal options and is coordinating with Houston and El Paso to plan out next steps. "While this decision dismissed the current case, it doesn't prevent us from raising these constitutional issues again in the future if a specific challenge arises under HB 2127," the office said." name: AMAC Action
subject: Emergency Roll Call of Seniors
body:
Seniors are under attack...

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4sdbp7mskuv2mviarpus94avlvfj10mp4h9kn10_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,**Seniors are under attack...** Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—**once the backbone of the conservative movement** —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war!**_And I’m worried that it’s working..._** So today, I’m performing an **EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS.** **[YES, I stand with Conservative values, President Trump, and the America First movement?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z12egvc4t3ah74urfh2huhh7rsupp7mi0cihkfc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)****Or...** **[NO, I’ve joined with the left-wing media, George Soros, and the AARP...](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2sotv4cm3nioh4qatb6q5cdf8j4obciebgb488o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)** Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, **President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+** —the only age group where his approval is negative.And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. **[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgh9eh60mrslfsplv5rmsdio9qgbmrrv89trbt4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfm7dnau8gdn2pa73l3ofpdos21b473p6f602nrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[And my friend, I hope they haven’t gotten to you...](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zv8c04dk9e3879pldfpv9qk0j1jn54tpv4j3hevo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[that’s why I need your YES answer to my roll call today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjvgt40vo9m7jqkmflcol259k041h5hbcvm98nbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdr3q4r2n7kd33csfpadi0lq5vv6peuso83uh1l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh7s8769bndolsv2b01q4stn4no43huf9npj3co0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)** But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask...** _what on earth is going on?_**_**_Is it the Liberal Media?_**_ **We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news** , and the media has become an **echo chamber** for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House._**_Could it be the AARP?_**_ They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” _**_Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence?_**_ You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos.And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded **_Tides Foundation_**. The AARP once _even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine_ , calling him one of “**America’s Greatest Innovators** ” who’s “**changing the world, $100 million at a time.** ” My friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the **_Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros_** who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will answer “YES” to the EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS right away.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkc3p882sncm1kuj1vdghuj928prp0djkju47lig_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)** And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. **Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action.**** ****AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over.** **We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.**** ****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.**** ****Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens.** **In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!****And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors.** **My friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation.** Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where _American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movemen_ t...Where the _liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family_ ... And where _liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism_ ...I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either.**AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans.** But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. **We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you.** So when you answer **YES** to your **EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS** ... **[I hope you’ll also make a special one time contribution to AMAC Action, to supercharge our advocacy, spread the truth, and fight back against the left’s 3-headed monster.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7mp75ag431tmsh3nk9p0kpp9i8gv28brlcqqj5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)** When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to:
---
* Advocate for conservative values and policies
* Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda
* Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism.

---
And so much more. My friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your _**EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS**_ below.
---
[ **YES! I stand with AMAC Action, President Trump,**
**and the values that made America great**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zv3o9sjqr40h0t83s83kk2uqri12b311khc89k1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)
---
[ **NO. I’m siding with the liberal media, radical elites,**
**and left-wing groups spreading propaganda**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zurjpfdssumajtqpt487us825qot9aiegtueoijg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)
---
Thank you for standing strong.Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and **we aren’t going anywhere**.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj47q355knq8sntsp54jt2friv9scc7tod347qp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)
---
| | **P.S.** The most radical left-wing forces in the nation are counting on you to sit this one out. **[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrpc632264s2rul9lfrkn537ghug19bg92vjorbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlvfuqlm8v52mghnmjb8080d2q7opmt6da0aqp30_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)[Prove them wrong. Answer YES to your Emergency Roll Call and donate whatever you can today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp8s0i7d0vtaa7k15693j88eb6h1kf25bpqskat8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs) **
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3a3gbocs3olnj5udj84qnv2a5ckjq52ncpp24t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztqar8q5slfp710ehf51gss81fpqf6ocutcgie5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpkk7v39s7dkdknehmcajsa3irgf8el9f90k7jh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj1cjh2bs)
---
| 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748
---
|
---

name: MAGA Patriot Josh Williams
subject: Foisted into the national spotlight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Williams for Ohio
body:
They called it the “Snake on the Lake” back in the day

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5qhi09g24q9ivfbnts7t4kct07bhjlnts8v8gjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj7c1h2bs)They called it the "Snake on the Lake" back in the day.
And it'll be foisted into the national spotlight once again here soon enough.
[**In fact, it 's about to be ground zero for the end of a 4-decades-long political career with your help.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvpi49o36v31lu2j6emrpgv6rb89vv461vqau2pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj7c1h2bs)
I'm talking about the 9th Congressional District in Northwest Ohio. It's a long, skinny district stretching from the Indiana border to Lake Erie (hence the old nickname). I'd understand if this district has never come across your radar before - it's been controlled by Democrats for 40+ years.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9nnjdrtnneg8u67m3mtufk2cn2bodint8sj220o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj7c1h2bs)But whether you live here or not, this will be the most important House race in the entire country.
President Trump's House Majority could very well be decided here, so I hope you'll hear me out for a few more seconds.
The President - and Ohio's own JD Vance - won this district handedly last year. It should have been ripe for House Republicans to pick up. Unfortunately, the sitting Democrat outraised the GOP candidate 3-to-1 and outspent him by 400%. She went on to BARELY WIN by less than one point.
I jumped into this race because I won't let that happen again. I know I can win. My goal is to outwork my Democrat opponent, unite Republicans behind our campaign, and help deliver this seat for President Trump.
That starts with earning your support today.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd3gbsk1j9688cv7iif14j0fk2hm06kj1cgkh5r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj7c1h2bs)My name is Josh Williams. I'm a Black MAGA Republican from humble beginnings who knows this district like the back of my hand. I grew up here, I represent this area in the Ohio House of Representatives, and I serve as the House Majority Whip for my Republican colleagues.
I officially launched my campaign to defeat a 40-year incumbent, and I'm respectfully asking you to join the team by becoming a Founding Donor today.**
**It 's not about the amount you give; what matters most is the number of people who step up.**
**So if you want to help us win the single biggest race on the map, I 'd be honored if you'd donate a few bucks here:[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR HERE
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2uafe3u9m8mprqvljj7cbnvag4v7kmn7efaasfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj7c1h2bs)It'll take some hard work to defeat the Democrat machine here, but it'll be worth it when we grow President Trump's House Majority together.
Let's make history.
THANK YOU!
- Josh Williams (MAGA Candidate for OH-09)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgkopjbfkaj9tl8h8lkg920p2i50dvt9o2vite80_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj7c1h2bs)| | |
---
| | Paid for by Josh Williams for Ohio
---

PO Box 14
Toledo, Ohio

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Nero Fiddled While Rome Burned.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
There is one thing on Gavin Newsom’s mind and it isn’t Californians . . .

| | |
---
| | Friend, There is one thing on Gavin Newsom’s mind and it isn’t Californians . . . . . . it’s Napa Valley wine. Right now, Californians are suffering soaring gas prices, high cost of living, rising crime, a homelessness crisis, violent riots . . . The list goes on. But instead of working on solutions that work for Californians, Gavin Newsom is sipping wine with the wealthy elite hundreds of miles away from the crises. You know the infamous saying, Nero fiddled while Rome burned . . . And this isn’t the first time Newsom, or other California Democrats, have distanced themselves from the people and issues of California:
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqojekv13ftn3miotf1hbe2hfjkoh1cfrbm6a950_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)
---
| | Well, at least they’re consistent . . . I believe the people of California deserve better than a career politician who runs at the first sign of trouble. That’s why I’m in this race. Democrats are prepared to spend millions of dollars to defeat us and I’m counting on donors like you to give my campaign the ammunition we need to take on the Democrat machine and win. [**Will you make a $6 contribution today?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze983g0sjii369hk29gm1v3ocbcirkmgc591v838_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z35nqvucqp6ecnaug7mrf55ub1b9dq7r7ek5lds8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)
---
Big or small it all adds up and I’m confident that come November 2026 we’ll win. If Democrat officials like Gavin Newsom and Karen Bass want to focus on swanky parties and trips instead of working on the issues that are facing California, they should step down from public service and let someone truly invested in our state govern California efficiently. I know that together we will keep incompetence out of California’s government from now on.
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zddmkg0l1hnldnbon44bg1ff6qnhqf2vsq2acgk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)
---
**Steve Hilton**
---
Republican Candidate for Governor of California
---
|
---
| |

name: MAGA Patriot Josh Williams
subject: Foisted into the national spotlight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Williams for Ohio
body:
They called it the “Snake on the Lake” back in the day

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1itm6ahh141our8j2ddeqcjibdeqrnt6ppl77ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)They called it the "Snake on the Lake" back in the day.
And it'll be foisted into the national spotlight once again here soon enough.
[**In fact, it 's about to be ground zero for the end of a 4-decades-long political career with your help.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb7krhqflld83s1h1jb6qferftvq25fc19918920_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)
I'm talking about the 9th Congressional District in Northwest Ohio. It's a long, skinny district stretching from the Indiana border to Lake Erie (hence the old nickname). I'd understand if this district has never come across your radar before - it's been controlled by Democrats for 40+ years.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrloa4u1dgnukg2jhca41c5b0vfe61pq1744v2fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)But whether you live here or not, this will be the most important House race in the entire country.
President Trump's House Majority could very well be decided here, so I hope you'll hear me out for a few more seconds.
The President - and Ohio's own JD Vance - won this district handedly last year. It should have been ripe for House Republicans to pick up. Unfortunately, the sitting Democrat outraised the GOP candidate 3-to-1 and outspent him by 400%. She went on to BARELY WIN by less than one point.
I jumped into this race because I won't let that happen again. I know I can win. My goal is to outwork my Democrat opponent, unite Republicans behind our campaign, and help deliver this seat for President Trump.
That starts with earning your support today.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zter9m4mr4bgsepeov8faefqctco80at57dcjv4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)My name is Josh Williams. I'm a Black MAGA Republican from humble beginnings who knows this district like the back of my hand. I grew up here, I represent this area in the Ohio House of Representatives, and I serve as the House Majority Whip for my Republican colleagues.
I officially launched my campaign to defeat a 40-year incumbent, and I'm respectfully asking you to join the team by becoming a Founding Donor today.**
**It 's not about the amount you give; what matters most is the number of people who step up.**
**So if you want to help us win the single biggest race on the map, I 'd be honored if you'd donate a few bucks here:[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR HERE
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zctfl26u8jd1t740dlfisj054e7988v593jgmjn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)It'll take some hard work to defeat the Democrat machine here, but it'll be worth it when we grow President Trump's House Majority together.
Let's make history.
THANK YOU!
- Josh Williams (MAGA Candidate for OH-09)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0nnvu243k1tefuscqdn77visgqm1eelftfjtavo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cji69oj5clh2bs)| | |
---
| | Paid for by Josh Williams for Ohio
---

Toledo, Ohio

name: The New York Sun
subject: Times v. Sun | David v. Goliath
body:
The Times has betrayed its readers

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zue2o5pvpp7n5d985ho8b5vm7ffqt7bo6k3dul38_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh60p31c9h2bs)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,It wasn’t so long ago that The New York Times was upheld as the gold standard in journalism. Today, many Americans feel the paper has betrayed its readers.

Now, enthusiasm is growing over The New York Sun returning to its historic role as a counterweight to the Times. We've heard a lot of frustration over the widening gulf between what the Times claims to be and what it is in reality.
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ziekootc4qrfosknjqn8473d86fgvsjoofmuv6fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh60p31c9h2bs)
---
| | Like the Times, we're an almost 200 years old, Pulitzer-winning broadsheet with robust coverage of politics and the arts, and now focused on a digital-first strategy. **But we have a very different approach to journalism than the Times.** One that's in higher demand now than ever. It won't be easy. The Times is large and established. It’s a modern David vs. Goliath media battle.Ultimately, a membership with the Sun doesn’t just give you full access to the finest American journalism, **it also sends a message to the Times and other newsrooms that have lost their way. Will you join us?**
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zigu8ri4id8a0ajv43rc1n5953bojage4q89h06g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh60p31c9h2bs)
---

clean_body: They called it the “Snake on the Lake” back in the day called it the "Snake on the Lake" back in the day. And it'll be foisted into the national spotlight once again here soon enough. I'm talking about the 9th Congressional District in Northwest Ohio. It's a long, skinny district stretching from the Indiana border to Lake Erie (hence the old nickname). I'd understand if this district has never come across your radar before - it's been controlled by Democrats for 40+ years. whether you live here or not, this will be the most important House race in the entire country. President Trump's House Majority could very well be decided here, so I hope you'll hear me out for a few more seconds. The President - and Ohio's own JD Vance - won this district handedly last year. It should have been ripe for House Republicans to pick up. Unfortunately, the sitting Democrat outraised the GOP candidate 3-to-1 and outspent him by 400%. She went on to BARELY WIN by less than one point. I jumped into this race because I won't let that happen again. I know I can win. My goal is to outwork my Democrat opponent, unite Republicans behind our campaign, and help deliver this seat for President Trump. That starts with earning your support today. name is Josh Williams. I'm a Black MAGA Republican from humble beginnings who knows this district like the back of my hand. I grew up here, I represent this area in the Ohio House of Representatives, and I serve as the House Majority Whip for my Republican colleagues. I officially launched my campaign to defeat a 40-year incumbent, and I'm respectfully asking you to join the team by becoming a Founding Donor today. It 's not about the amount you give; what matters most is the number of people who step up. So if you want to help us win the single biggest race on the map, I 'd be honored if you'd donate a few bucks here: take some hard work to defeat the Democrat machine here, but it'll be worth it when we grow President Trump's House Majority together. Let's make history. THANK YOU! - Josh Williams (MAGA Candidate for OH-09)| | | | | Paid for by Josh Williams for Ohio PO Box 14 Toledo, Ohio Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Diogo Costa
subject: Trump vs. Milei: What Two Presidents Can Teach Us
body:
President Trump and President Milei of Argentina share more than populist instincts and mutual admiration.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi735pnti3l9quqbm0u946ian3u3301kjj02f6ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs) Friend,

President Trump and President Milei of Argentina share more than populist instincts and mutual admiration.
* Both came to power amid deep fiscal deficits.
* Both vowed to rein in government waste and inefficiency.
* Both pledged to put their nations back on the path to prosperity..

**But while Washington debates deficits and dithers on deregulation, Argentina has balanced its budget, unleashed private enterprise, and opened the country to free trade.**

What Milei shows us is that political courage without intellectual substance changes little.

But when leadership is paired with real economic insight, change can happen fast.

At the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), we’re investing in that worldview. We are building future leaders who will become lifelong advocates of liberty, ready to defend freedom in the real world.

[Will you join us by investing in liberty today? Even $10 or more can make a difference in a young student’s life. Click here to donate to FEE >> ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr6rdr9lf03dnqah9jjujrcoue5m7j5c0m3l86bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs) **BONUS: Donate ANY amount today and receive a FREE digital eBook of _Capitalism: A Treatise on Economics_.**
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0o3aeqqt76gp6kdhe086jltk9miko15s4lhcm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4uqivia86qqckec2dtj7jet6ve9f0reujkj33no_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)
If students receive any economic education today (which is increasingly rare), they are often taught “thin” economics—the kind found in standardized textbooks, bureaucratic charts, and problem sets.

_That’s the kind that students forget the moment finals are over._

But there is another kind of economic teaching: “thick” economics.

**What we’re witnessing in Argentina is thick economics in action:**
* Deregulation, not as technocracy, but as a moral imperative to restore individual choice.
* Balanced budgets, not as a political gimmick, but as a return to constitutional order and generational justice.
* Trade openness, not as a geopolitical tactic, but as a sign of trust in human cooperation across borders.

Thick economics helps us understand _why_ markets work, not just _how_.

**That’s the kind of economics we’ve been teaching at FEE for nearly 80 years. And it’s the kind of understanding the world is sorely missing.**

FEE’s programs are designed to help students understand not just how economies function, but why a free society is worth building in the first place.

This is FEE’s Liberty Pipeline. This is the future of liberty.

It’s a full end-to-end strategy that:
* Reaches and engages young people through media and the classroom
* Deepens their understanding of liberty through FEE’s resources and publications
* Provides transformative experiences through in-person seminars and events
* Empowers them to become future leaders in the liberty movement

Your 100% tax-deductible donation will be put to use immediately to bring vital economic education to the next generation. [As a token of our gratitude, you’ll receive a FREE digital copy of _Capitalism: A Treatise on Economics_. Click here to give today >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ioqriv1v66phu17em6r1q4542u6t7m6j62l82g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)
[Donate $30](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5fe548h36bo5robua52ufspslb434q3gbdgo398_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgst58ut6ndg2j26rgb9ra2dbgv2s4olb1tiipdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2niuf5p783iq5ebsei5qshi5u4nbj5pmp3p0hc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zefkh6ugmaj6emttog9l4aat548l3p6j08k7ufu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8j8g1rlr27e5dcd2hplseh9un4orghspb6husd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4utgbnu6evvtolc133sd0qoapd0d6ido6j4odeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv2ctksivfi3i5phta0c7esble9kji18591ca9t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs)
In liberty,

Diogo Costa
President
Foundation for Economic Education

P.S. Milei’s success isn’t accidental. It’s rooted in ideas.

**Before he was president, Milei delivered a FEE lecture to thousands of students online.** He introduced them to the tradition of Hayek and Mises. He went beyond thin, textbook microeconomics — and showed them that the tradition of market economics had something urgent to say.

At FEE, we teach thick economics — the kind that integrates markets with morality, institutions, and human dignity.

With every donation, we’re one step closer to securing liberty for the next generation. Click below to donate today.
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0139ls9sbafrnb5k0fulo0v7t44o49feqill0ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76c3h2bs) _FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ibegr90ce8g3p1rr2h0hdn291e3r8ag873ukp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp28ilaqu1iso6hq1n79f3k3drua75ano1vr9beo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvavtreeud1lrg88u3n9q25hqmnovg6dlt1dnan8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkm4b0hsm1ana00pv8athuci6lks75281flq2mpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6jbdk30sroqegjb2cnf2s4fa62937i0i2bdt370_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztt16gs2qtl79gh9hnbosbq49mn7urpt2rcuhobo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0tb0oimpno64ni2rcqnop081ljga247rveisgvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znahhuq4ato8f7fucbcfi0c3ibn9beg49ghl0938_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd04uv7b4sinkkfca6bk385letuvten1d5cu3ebo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr12gcuc5vspcqs201aptu7rc2alp0t8t6kcba38_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1fn00gs46o5ovca8247633krrjvl25099kq5ch8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2urvce4557fm6fosifep29agmbgo4fral5bsrco_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0q9pensob9os0i2di29kbut9ri2dc53vp504bt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcsmj85qjs1nnj2cbkeq79f0oqbj7qk7u6botang_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp3tnofjf338gsdv7ncb39sa4hrbj1158tgvr98g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqh1m20e92ed7lqhttp724jd6nfk5uvkofktpld0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkpshmfgpmeb69pd7o0fqesqf2o6mu9kpfl12100_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkiug28n74em27esb5f8v4q479j67b9tf6jm55o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zicp2dunbpqpj5vsgjecjatpfemur9j64vp05tog_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfq0l2srr8vs50pec6mulgfsdmulhq3irrpm7nb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob7chimep724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbuev1vu0nmso60q9vmii5e1puiurtrpdd16i7vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh64o76cjh2bs)_

# **[Mexico City government projects pro-abortion images on cathedral's façade](http://trk.libertyledger.-jvb8KiCPQJmVij3hhRDw)**
---
Metropolitan Cathedral of Mexico City. / Credit: Salvador alc, CC BY-SA 4.0, via Wikimedia Commons Puebla, Mexico, Jul 18, 2025 / 09:30 am (CNA). The Metropolitan Cathedral’s communications office in Mexico City expressed its dissatisfaction with the projection of pro-abortion messages on the façade of the church during a show organized by the capital city’s government.The show, titled "Luminous Memory. Mexico-Tenochtitlan 700 Years," takes place every night July 11-27 in the capital's Zócalo (central square). It transforms the National Palace and the Cathedral into monumental screens to visually narrate the history of the capital, from its Aztec origins to the present day.

# **[Construction at new NFL stadium screeches to a halt after 'racist and hateful symbol' found on site](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjEwMTM0OCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MjAwLTFjYzZkNzBiYTI0NzRkMDdiMDc3ZTkxYjRhOWYwMDFiIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlYmxhemUuY29tL25ld3Mvbm9vc2UtbmZsLXN0YWRpdW0tZm91bmQtaGFsdD9zZXlpZD0ifQ/q-jERv1xUFu-jzKvJwdd8A)**
---
An NFL team is cooperating with police on an investigation into a "racist and hateful symbol" that was found at the construction site of their new stadium.The Nissan Stadium for the Tennessee Titans is scheduled to open in 2027, but that might be delayed by the discovery of a noose, according to the Tennessee Builders Alliance, which is in charge of construction.'We've taken some steps, both with local policies, state policy, and partnership with them to try, again, to keep temperatures low and prevent hate incidents like this.' "This week, a racist and hateful symbol was discovered on our site. There is no place for hate or racism in our workplace," said the organization.

# **[John MacArthur's decades-long fight for Gavin Newsom's soul](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/5kI0fliLP-hrZxjQ9Y7-lw)**
---
Pastor John MacArthur passed away on July 14 at 86 years old, leaving an indelible mark as a faithful expositor of God’s word.MacArthur’s unwavering commitment to preaching the gospel led him to take a bold stand against cultural and political pressures — including those imposed on California by Democrat Gov. Gavin Newsom.“Some people don’t know that he has actually been a boil on the back of Gavin Newsom for a very long time,” BlazeTV host Allie Beth Stuckey reflects on “Relatable.” Before Newsom was the California governor and closing down churches in California — which MacArthur also fought against — the pastor debated him on “Larry King Live.”“I’m a practicing Catholic. I got married in the church,” Newsom said to MacArthur.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/5kI0fliLP-hrZxjQ9Y7-lw)

The Metropolitan Cathedral’s communications office in Mexico City expressed its dissatisfaction with the projection of pro-abortion messages on the façade of the church during a show organized by the capital city’s government.The show, titled "Luminous Memory. Mexico-Tenochtitlan 700 Years," takes place every night July 11-27 in the capital's Zócalo (central square). It transforms the National Palace and the Cathedral into monumental screens to visually narrate the history of the capital, from its Aztec origins to the present day. An NFL team is cooperating with police on an investigation into a "racist and hateful symbol" that was found at the construction site of their new stadium.The Nissan Stadium for the Tennessee Titans is scheduled to open in 2027, but that might be delayed by the discovery of a noose, according to the Tennessee Builders Alliance, which is in charge of construction.'We've taken some steps, both with local policies, state policy, and partnership with them to try, again, to keep temperatures low and prevent hate incidents like this.' "This week, a racist and hateful symbol was discovered on our site. There is no place for hate or racism in our workplace," said the organization. I can imagine that some people will start to chastise me for the title of this commentary before they even read what I write. It has become very apparent to me that many people don’t actually read what is written and consider the points I make; they just like to tell me how wrong I [...] Pastor John MacArthur passed away on July 14 at 86 years old, leaving an indelible mark as a faithful expositor of God’s word.MacArthur’s unwavering commitment to preaching the gospel led him to take a bold stand against cultural and political pressures — including those imposed on California by Democrat Gov. Gavin Newsom.“Some people don’t know that he has actually been a boil on the back of Gavin Newsom for a very long time,” BlazeTV host Allie Beth Stuckey reflects on “Relatable.” Before Newsom was the California governor and closing down churches in California — which MacArthur also fought against — the pastor debated him on “Larry King Live.”“I’m a practicing Catholic. I got married in the church,” Newsom said to MacArthur. P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

name: Diogo Costa
subject: Trump vs. Milei: What Two Presidents Can Teach Us
body:
President Trump and President Milei of Argentina share more than populist instincts and mutual admiration.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmcunuqd9ue5ie0dfkjt98hj7v89i9dlrofn7na0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs) Friend,

President Trump and President Milei of Argentina share more than populist instincts and mutual admiration.
* Both came to power amid deep fiscal deficits.
* Both vowed to rein in government waste and inefficiency.
* Both pledged to put their nations back on the path to prosperity..

**But while Washington debates deficits and dithers on deregulation, Argentina has balanced its budget, unleashed private enterprise, and opened the country to free trade.**

What Milei shows us is that political courage without intellectual substance changes little.

But when leadership is paired with real economic insight, change can happen fast.

At the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE), we’re investing in that worldview. We are building future leaders who will become lifelong advocates of liberty, ready to defend freedom in the real world.

[Will you join us by investing in liberty today? Even $10 or more can make a difference in a young student’s life. Click here to donate to FEE >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhjpt9vjmjak355pabtebsrcbf72efkksieul000_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs) **BONUS: Donate ANY amount today and receive a FREE digital eBook of _Capitalism: A Treatise on Economics_.**
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqclgpejf737ijk4f6srpssshpfml8c6qfibc1do_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb179n32arn7ji4i49bsgvh8129lhdimuds3fqb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)
If students receive any economic education today (which is increasingly rare), they are often taught “thin” economics—the kind found in standardized textbooks, bureaucratic charts, and problem sets.

_That’s the kind that students forget the moment finals are over._

But there is another kind of economic teaching: “thick” economics.

**What we’re witnessing in Argentina is thick economics in action:**
* Deregulation, not as technocracy, but as a moral imperative to restore individual choice.
* Balanced budgets, not as a political gimmick, but as a return to constitutional order and generational justice.
* Trade openness, not as a geopolitical tactic, but as a sign of trust in human cooperation across borders.

Thick economics helps us understand _why_ markets work, not just _how_.

**That’s the kind of economics we’ve been teaching at FEE for nearly 80 years. And it’s the kind of understanding the world is sorely missing.**

FEE’s programs are designed to help students understand not just how economies function, but why a free society is worth building in the first place.

This is FEE’s Liberty Pipeline. This is the future of liberty.

It’s a full end-to-end strategy that:
* Reaches and engages young people through media and the classroom
* Deepens their understanding of liberty through FEE’s resources and publications
* Provides transformative experiences through in-person seminars and events
* Empowers them to become future leaders in the liberty movement

Your 100% tax-deductible donation will be put to use immediately to bring vital economic education to the next generation. [As a token of our gratitude, you’ll receive a FREE digital copy of _Capitalism: A Treatise on Economics_. Click here to give today >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5veb0nbr8fsd6l81afnbjo3fa1a4r95j0jgcgs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)
[Donate $30](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpdi4cvm4ccir1e1a34ol3n6iaf6nprutmslonog_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9o6e68cl65cknaqsr9q5iuv0e841ie43qipekg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc0t5h29p5ntvuq17v2shjiuageqciftumpub410_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zharlnsbsv4msrc6mv2vo31sa4n0499j010mj2ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zii2g9q7unu1ikodjp7uf0vgd62sfpmr7rgtvsjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaobqohm2h5birvl6ilncqgd98gjavlfh7noqpu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4bgnbj3p7rjp587v49l8ddgu3qr92ifmm2c8m18_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs)
In liberty,

Diogo Costa
President
Foundation for Economic Education

P.S. Milei’s success isn’t accidental. It’s rooted in ideas.

**Before he was president, Milei delivered a FEE lecture to thousands of students online.** He introduced them to the tradition of Hayek and Mises. He went beyond thin, textbook microeconomics — and showed them that the tradition of market economics had something urgent to say.

At FEE, we teach thick economics — the kind that integrates markets with morality, institutions, and human dignity.

With every donation, we’re one step closer to securing liberty for the next generation. Click below to donate today.
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrr59mf4mar379lodk7080t19cuetp7v3p0uakm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjh66ob3c3h2bs) _FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

body:
Friend, this is one of the biggest risks I’ve ever taken. Will you have my back when they come for me?

| | | Dear Friend, I’m hoping you get this message in time. What I’m about to do is going to put me in the crosshairs. **_But it must be done._** I’m going to force every Member of Congress to go ON RECORD about Jeffrey Epstein. And if you support what I’m doing here, _**_[I hope you’ll consider having my back by making a donation of just a few bucks.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg4f3gn6c0jkhqfmpt0r8j7baqhj5miuofhekq3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjj60o31chh2bs)_**_ I am about to file something called a “discharge petition.” **_In simple terms, I am using a congressional procedure to attempt to FORCE a vote on releasing the Epstein files in their entirety._** \- The client lists \- The blackmail networks \- The foreign intelligence interests ALL must be exposed. **If this vote succeeds, EVERY Member of Congress will be forced to vote simply “YES” or “NO” on whether or not the government should release the Epstein files.** **And at the end of the day, this decision, this action right here and right now, could be the end of a 20-year-long saga of CORRUPTION, LIES, and CRIMINAL ACTIVITY.** I’m about to make a lot of enemies – Republicans, Democrats, Independents, and everyone in between. I don’t care who I upset – all I care about is the TRUTH. Thank you for taking a moment out of your time to read my message. Sincerely, Congressman Thomas Massie P.S. But the tidal wave of pressure from the Uniparty is about to get 10X worse when I force them to go on record over the Epstein files... _**_[_**_and when it does, I truly need patriots like you in my corner. _**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zui27uehshrj11sr3k2ih8en95h3oafk8cd5rne8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cjj60o31chh2bs) _**_

subject: We Need Your Voice on Immigration Enforcement — Take Our Quick Poll!

body:
Should Trump double the number of illegal immigrant arrests?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.--_Fw)Peter,
As President Trump continues the fight to secure our borders and protect American communities, your voice is more important than ever.
Now, Border Czar Tom Homan is calling for bold action. He’s calling for **_ICE to remove at least 7,000 illegal immigrants per day_** – more than double the current daily arrests.
With the passage of the **One Big Beautiful Bill** , ICE just received a massive funding boost for deportations, and Homan says it’s time to put that money to work.[Now we want to hear from you:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[Do you back Border Czar Tom Homan’s goal of 7,000 daily arrests?
YES
NO
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[Should ICE receive even more resources to detain and remove those here illegally?
YES
NO
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[Do you believe stronger immigration enforcement will make our neighborhoods safer?
YES
NO
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[Should President Trump prioritize immigration enforcement above all else?
YES
NO
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._lKg)[Should the U.S. deport all individuals who crossed the border illegally, no matter how long they’ve been here?
YES
NO

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Nero Fiddled While Rome Burned.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
There is one thing on Gavin Newsom's mind and it isn't Californians . . .

| | |
---
| | Friend, There is one thing on Gavin Newsom's mind and it isn't Californians . . . . . . it's Napa Valley wine. Right now, Californians are suffering soaring gas prices, high cost of living, rising crime, a homelessness crisis, violent riots . . . The list goes on. But instead of working on solutions that work for Californians, Gavin Newsom is sipping wine with the wealthy elite hundreds of miles away from the crises. You know the infamous saying, Nero fiddled while Rome burned . . . And this isn't the first time Newsom, or other California Democrats, have distanced themselves from the people and issues of California:
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_jjbsCjdjXIm_54vceQIZw~~/AARclBA~/1siunHZ8trpWckTAbtvo8zkRTpB3xTE9Bu0IC9wPT16j0uh52y6kV7-qjgsDOSuyp0bl1kHy1FzGLpOYObKOtZrnYcXiqdc26lmFrNOsGjpHEq5Apc0j6B3Ut7nLTBCBxxBfoZO6bTJiDtfl0d-mARD3_MZtmzoU6voKVR6Pg2y2a3MCJJw9-1r8Hd3HOVTpmU7dQQdBNKwlqejBSJX1TkunL0txZpOAL2Rsqg2INGEjIA3Qd4KWd1MiGFZy4lA3wWhvkcMSRIrZSx5r-zbTD26VbWr-G9ZMFkatTzQ7GFi7xUt7v2NMj3etn0f5dXFenGlW-stClQ8uMSBuoTKnEg~~)
---
| | Well, at least they're consistent . . . I believe the people of California deserve better than a career politician who runs at the first sign of trouble. That's why I'm in this race. Democrats are prepared to spend millions of dollars to defeat us and I'm counting on donors like you to give my campaign the ammunition we need to take on the Democrat machine and win. body:
Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard declassified documents on Friday that she says show “[overwhelming evidence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnDAQRk8DHWhsMMaFizR0mzYlGvAYJhrwCnsX7e2jzRX--pO-p_f-POYHsvC5_caDfIlpPunOQqXQNW-4LHiFQKtgzhyZ8ppEXnnWoE0DtlFuDsjymfs6-EikqavJK2u0U86Aq3fvcIlqGPsRDYyhR9MtLgCOtqcBnI01--8bWOUUgAHbRoioBqOHhXprR6x6oMAlXe3fxGfZKconvelq13TU4vdSnrnqflV6qvR033f7wT2l71rp6atT6SkteGCD4eCzOfB8RVzL66LQ8FlIhDc6V2rWi7BQoyxoYzrl2r0cUl8-PG8W4TzYqoftQJb_7PKjYG-v_wUAAP__ZrB_qg)” that then-President Obama and his security team manufactured the Trump–Russia collusion narrative.

This marked one of his only eight confirmed shootouts, despite his formidable reputation. The Rock could return to service. Check out today’s [_The Flyover Podcast_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7bgGYwZGLp4S9eOiMAjpnoxliGJ8vdVqkr5gK73Xp0rna-TO_lMebt8-ivalorb8FEJW8PDXfz57I8YMZCvNaeMNRSiW3XAQfVc98K46DM9neyiTYiAY4dWaAVGGMVNt9rgU0gmTkrGUYJQ0QgxAwQIkqsR5y7bF41rYQTniush8eTFpGA6o9R69kxyjLmVY_gueWsrJnqWOx5DKNeO7NraXtn4wWBhsOwlBl9bHfy-E74mDJZbfTcMlrZi_8fo32mOYhYcRjCT6A4b90cmynXSTPLL1Wf6_Wv_knS38BMAAP__-tN6Mw) to learn about the Trump administration’s plans to bring Alcatraz back into operation. Help yourself unwind with today's sponsor, [The Apollo Neuro wearable](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2unDAQBeCnMR3IP4CvCxeRVnQ3bUprsAdwYmxim13t20ckG-0D3Ha-0ZHO-fFpPsEHH9fvsKOuSzIRHyVgrZjNCvMM2Tm0AUrxi8diUwhnMZzyoaWyZco48OFp-sbpBZGjaFAzOXDF1EBVs2kFSs7APoCjnS04xjnDwTEhUVlHVeP1lUYlU4zSgcpuoQuwceDjjL2UH0B6is7XlLufyce64RKe6Y65s2lvgt5qPQoR3wifCJ_C0cGRQkgRz5yul-sI0fm4Ej79s_aBkGEO2L6iiJjOupuSzmyRiFvd0PwnPl60o_PnTsTtvc9LLOwH-DUScfst2je3M9hfT8iuvWOsZ8bSZO2Ohw_Bl1GSnq47-PC3Rf3S9HfN_wQAAP__1qWdxg), which uses soothing vibrations to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost focus.

## Gabbard: Obama Officials Drove Russia Probe
Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard declassified documents on Friday she says show “[overwhelming evidence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnDAQRk8DHWhsMMaFizR0mzYlGvAYJhrwCnsX7e2jzRX--pO-p_f-POYHsvC5_caDfIlpPunOQqXQNW-4LHiFQKtgzhyZ8ppEXnnWoE0DtlFuDsjymfs6-EikqavJK2u0U86Aq3fvcIlqGPsRDYyhR9MtLgCOtqcBnI01--8bWOUUgAHbRoioBqOHhXprR6x6oMAlXe3fxGfZKconvelq13TU4vdSnrnqflV6qvR033f7wT2l71rp6atT6SkteGCD4eCzOfB8RVzL66LQ8FlIhDc6V2rWi7BQoyxoYzrl2r0cUl8-PG8W4TzYqoftQJb_7PKjYG-v_wUAAP__ZrB_qg)” that then-President Obama and his security team manufactured the Trump–Russia collusion narrative. Gabbard said records show the Obama administration and then-Director of National Intelligence James Clapper knew there was [no evidence Russia manipulated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb8GO24AFbSgmIbuTTulQThczwTBePDd-PcTp5p-6p2s7LV-fS1fHjOW90-_g22pLgU-lKE1OJe3X1d_xggheyJMCBRqzhctSqiRC8PlvESP-V6GLtoEoKDvwEozqlnOo5i7zYYQJCTRi5i0EfMa9KjXNMhJJq37MHVoH5owcpZCjMK8kkhe6lHpFQZjJs8GARFbPV-_K5a2Qcp3_YbzFereZbu1dhDrfzDlmHLlPiq1Z2LKPWCmnDBMOTkx5S7ijx9Trq5-99zHHQv3REAEkZ8XEXp-ZH9D5KXys2bgWLgSUnPIEBrWwv8JEnms4dqhNOK01Q9TrjttPD6YM5I2bBDv3WP--7X9V-Bvq_4EAAD__-Yyj6E) the 2016 election outcome through cyberattacks. Documents also indicate that then-FBI Director James Comey pushed back on early assessments and contributed to delays in publication. Among other allegations is a Dec. 9, 2016, meeting between Obama and national security officials that ended with [Clapper directing multiple](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFzhCAQBeBfg50O7AloQZHG7tKmdFZZdTMoDpAz9-8zlzZl2le8-d77uI935MDH-o47ubLE8aArByqF0rjiNGHynuaAOfPClOcYwlceQYKupa1VP3rk8BzbyruFCOhWkVNWQ696LftqczN02GndGrDTfOvQ6EnNsvNogMB7X7F7tUmreiWllrZZ5ILKaDATtdZ2KFpJnktMzWfko2y0hGd8UGrmuFfBbaWcWdzeBAwChuu6Gn9ws8aHgIEPT9_NuZ0ChtewFOMuYDgT5VwnCoSZ8p-gfoEEDK3sTH2mWukadJWcPy8OgbOxopXrjhx-CeVfvz0c_AQAAP__cACAlw) agencies to create a new assessment detailing how Moscow influenced the election “ _per the president’s request_.” Gabbard concluded that after months of investigation, those involved knew the intelligence used against President Trump was fabricated.
## 3 Deputies Killed at L.A. Facility
Authorities have confirmed that [three Los Angeles County Sheriff’s](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL_G7rAAG7MUFGncvbQpLQwX-0Z3wQJ2nf37yFH-4HVHGmk0c359rV8OCdP-0z3BtpjXBFclaA3KurttcyUE8ORqxYhQfSZ61VVyqRjXTJg1OKTPOvXBRgAJYw9WaCWNMIqb_rBg-Mgjj2ZW3kMYx8e4PcAopSUIpUSP9m7jWhjBueJ6iDw6MSs5bzBp_XDdxCFgy2X4nTG1AyJ98hvK4POzJ3u0dtZu_NHJpZPLdV1D2vz94s47udzYyeVV2X8icLWxkQVwgRU4c2kQGPw5KVfMiVGuzKUdCCrz-ZXah9UDCsZYWSsOE6adRVZ8clKYmYu-2HBeSIR11t3E96dD-reufUvp28q_AQAA__9wt4yD) deputies, who specialized in arson and explosives, were killed Friday morning when military-style ordnance detonated at a training facility. The incident occurred at the Biscailuz Training Center in Monterey Park after the [bomb squad returned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAYhJ8GbxhAET1waNJ4216apkeD8KN_i7ABuhvfvrGv0ONkksl83-dtuRkMGLc3c4CuPi0RniVArZCXzayryc6BDaYU9AjFphB-yiKYkJQpyqfFGQzn0jdOewABXQOaKykmPkk2NbsWnEm_SudHbtXInRqlcqscrDCeA7MN6muNKT5xxiRTrWfe8EGKYYVeqdGQnoHDmnL7lTDWHXw40wNya9PRBL3Xei-keyFiJmI2q70I2i1dNRHzxzsRc0e_MQRwdE85o0dLMVp0ECsN5kkh-pQtHFeu2WDEuFFvLAasJxFzqSmfpJvRke6Vi24c-mkcm6zd_YkhYBkU6dl2GAx_p-q_TD60-A0AAP__NYiH7Q) with a device they believed was inert. This is the deadliest incident in the L.A. County Sheriff’s Department’s history since 1857. Officials declined to identify the victims, citing ongoing family notifications, but called them “heroes” and “[the best of the best](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtygzAQAL9GdPJI4iFTqEhD57QpmQOd8CUHIpxsx3-fcX4h9c7s7OzHZbwAMW3LO6wYSsrjhg9hLAWPcYFpgiNGnBlEKBHKnJlvMjrjWm28tv0Ygfg5NlUMCdFhXWGwvnW97VvTV9dgXWrQ2w7dVPsaGgCPaMwMM0DqfVdReNmMt701pjX-lEwC27Wum7Dx_gyqMRip5OP0mWkrV0z8zHc8TnNeKw7XUnZR9Ztyg3IDTLN_AeWGPUtRbqh1xP1WCEV_ETNGjT87Z6G8aQaJOsFMTOWpEaRozqJhW5BR9JTXScv3DaJyg_X2bGpfKzdUR4j7g5hJOq8as6xA_JdT_vXwHtxvAAAA__9b_oYT).” Together, they served the department for 74 years. The cause of the explosion is unknown.
## List: Least Popular Dogs in the U.S.
A list of [the least popular dog breeds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb_G7hwBBmMKim3SZdstrWd4OG_nOVhAEuXvR8l8wlRXV1e6Rzr_LssFiOm2_YUdfUt5ueGzMraGZdlgXaHEiIGhVkqENWTme12UUGYQdpBuiUD8WnQffUJUOPbopTXKSWeE66_ezTLYgGuSYjRT0G4UWs1TjGkyM6y6J_9-E1Y6KYQR9pREAjkZNa2orZ2h0wIjtVxO_zPd2hUTv_IDyynkvWd_be2o3finU-dOnWuD8PWzfVouhLVT5wPbOxihtuHIx52hDDFvw1oQYx1gx0IB-uLj8SRmqpPttNh2IP6A2q_sPLz6DgAA__9oyHnQ) in the U.S. features several types of terriers and international canines, but it’s the English foxhound that tops the list as the most unwelcome pooch. The rankings were based on American Kennel Club data, which also indicated that the dogs on the list often lack name recognition and aren’t easily accessible to U.S. homes. There are dogs like the German Löwchen, or "little lion," and the Lakeland terrier, a hypoallergenic, otter-chasing puppy. These breeds aren’t just cute—they would also make great family pets. The Nederlandse kooikerhondje has a big heart and adorable black-tipped ears.

****The No. 1 least popular breed might make more sense. The English foxhound is rarely seen as a companion dog as it’s often kept in packs and trained to hunt foxes.[See the complete list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb_G7hwBBmMKim3SZdstrWd4OG_nOVhAEuXvR8l8wlRXV1e6Rzr_LssFiOm2_YUdfUt5ueGzMraGZdlgXaHEiIGhVkqENWTme12UUGYQdpBuiUD8WnQffUJUOPbopTXKSWeE66_ezTLYgGuSYjRT0G4UWs1TjGkyM6y6J_9-E1Y6KYQR9pREAjkZNa2orZ2h0wIjtVxO_zPd2hUTv_IDyynkvWd_be2o3finU-dOnWuD8PWzfVouhLVT5wPbOxihtuHIx52hDDFvw1oQYx1gx0IB-uLj8SRmqpPttNh2IP6A2q_sPLz6DgAA__9oyHnQ).

Documents also indicate that then-FBI Director James Comey pushed back on early assessments and contributed to delays in publication. Among other allegations is a Dec. 9, 2016, meeting between Obama and national security officials that ended with agencies to create a new assessment detailing how Moscow influenced the election “ per the president’s request.” Gabbard concluded that after months of investigation, those involved knew the intelligence used against President Trump was fabricated. 3 Deputies Killed at L.A. County Sheriff’s Department’s history since 1857. Officials declined to identify the victims, citing ongoing family notifications, but called them “heroes” and “.” Together, they served the department for 74 years. The cause of the explosion is unknown. List: Least Popular Dogs in the U.S. A list of in the U.S. features several types of terriers and international canines, but it’s the English foxhound that tops the list as the most unwelcome pooch. The rankings were based on American Kennel Club data, which also indicated that the dogs on the list often lack name recognition and aren’t easily accessible to U.S. homes. There are dogs like the German Löwchen, or "little lion," and the Lakeland terrier, a hypoallergenic, otter-chasing puppy. These breeds aren’t just cute—they would also make great family pets. The Nederlandse kooikerhondje has a big heart and adorable black-tipped ears. **The No. 1 least popular breed might make more sense. I don't care who I upset - all I care about is the TRUTH. Thank you for taking a moment out of your time to read my message. Sincerely, Congressman Thomas Massie P.S. Whether or not you donate today, I am moving forward with this. I'm not pay-to-play like so many other politicians in Washington. **I won 't be bought, bribed, or blackmailed.**

# Saturday, July 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1876, the Texas and Pacific Railway completed its line into Fort Worth before the state legislature could revoke its charter. Legendary railroad builder [Morgan Jones](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuwyAUgOHT4C0WPGMTBoYu3tK1owXmxdBiXgQkTm5fNVfoBT79-r8uy8XGFPP2aXc07XmlJeNRE7aGZSlxDQ2ftta7uxdXPW010OFpAQ7jiauT0Iu3Mb0W2XnjuNeiQyPUCBpAc9UFowc5XtczqvPg-DSA43ZFxHVaJXDnRRfNH8aV0EJwIWU_Oq-En6QVTovBIZMcfWxU-hbwnXNNL3pg6Vfau2RCa7fKhg8GM4P5OI6-1WApp5ixp7IxmIPN3hH9MJgxtxKxMpi_KWM97VQ2m7ti_O2IKcU6KSb5ttuY3n7735WHgd8AAAD__zhCeM0), who was hired by the company to finish the route, laid more than a mile of track a day to beat the deadline. Schlitterbahn Waterpark in New Braunfels is the [most overcrowded attraction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb8GOw0gPC4FxTR2b9opzQGOFxIUAzy9_v1Ef-G1Jyd7rb3_fc_fEFPc3n9hRdM-S543PGvC1rDMJbrQ8AO1_tifYqvP7xry6fPMKZc9VT3Ts4eYrll03ljqNevQMCW55lxT1QUjAZSW4yK1VWLkWkoLllH7Asckt66L5g6jimnGKBNikNYr5r8EMKvZaJEIij62XIYW8NFZ0pUPLIPLa5dMaG2vZPxD-ET4dJ7nsF4VNtha3mK-nwifUlywtish4VMrcGAifILSontO1YUU784Wwta7vELqSzyw9A-wv3Gu5NOj7zkVnKrXa9jD3hXj9zOmFOuXIoK-V4jp8Wq_W_Mw_H8AAAD__4jjjH4) in the state, according to a new analysis. Do you agree? Let us know! We're sponsored today by [Kikoff](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykjz1uKyEYAE8DnVd8LJhHQfEaN4nTRkmD-PnwImNjAfaubx_FV8gBZjTzebRHl0u-nj7cBc3YUrVXXHvBMbDZlsMycHO93_29-R7rqS91jdVyxuWOqR1oG10uTytoNJ5FDRQNKMk155opupjoZu4Vk8n_Y4AheBD7CDJhCnOQTNBsfmVMgQZgIMQkfVQQ98KB1zB7JIJhzKO2aSz4yknlWR_YplAvtJhljFsn83_CD4QfzvlcU5puW5pyJfzw_vZV2zdtJt7WXErue0UEO11cLi9-_O36YfhPAAAA__-r3WyS). They're here to help you build credit without stress.

## Texas Drought Eases with Historic Rains
Unusually heavy rainfall, punctuated by the July 4 floods in Texas Hill Country and accompanied by cooler-than-normal summer temperatures, has [significantly eased Texas’](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkc-K2zAQxp9Gvk2wZCWODzqkFEMLu5el9GgkaxyJKlKYUaLN2xfvK-xp4Dfw8f35-7a82Zhivr7bG5r6uZUlY-OEtSItFNdQ8dMyP9yDHPty5VCaL4vq1RH6EeS0eBvTa9GdN673k-zQyPGoJqWmfuyCwQGnAb3aTlpv8nw--lVviOO4njeHcuii2cX6UU5S9lLrw9H5UfqTttJNcnAodI8-1kKHGvDLzpZe5Yl0WMutSybUemcxXISahZpba4cb5_0n1IwZHrxTtDUgCTXXcudaKOKOV5tfJUOy_xCCZXCIGShyzFfYCoHU4O2LIWawQKVBQEKGth9otiJBwicmBksIuTShZktwuchf7x-__4hhLmv0Yvj5Y68YG38g3Tsy_t5iSpFPo9D99WZj-spSv7fA06j_AQAA__-OOp4I) persistent drought conditions. Lakes and reservoirs across Texas were dangerously low heading into summer, with some hitting record lows in May. Some of these lakes are now considered full, including [Lake Buchanan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O6yAUhVdjd1iXa2xEQfGadHntlBaY64CCTQQkJLsfOVuY5lRH3_n5uS5XE2I4bv_NTrq-t7Qc1EqkWikvOay-0tuU8rTPbItLt-JTc2lBwImBZFwtzoT4WUTvtAWneE-aywkVogLZez06nMCQm8dN4QzzOgvhJonKKI6CoA_6hIHkinPgQgyTdZK7WRhuFR8tdQLIhZryUD1962zxk16UhzXtfdS-1kfpxn8dXjq8tNaGc0Ijup-GDi_R3InZ5-rNYQ72JbAtxHhqLpXVsBNDYB8yuTDkAGJUfdbu0UKMocyyE3DbTYjfxPq3n14afwMAAP__joF9Cg), which has reached its highest point in 20 years. While some lakes have risen more than 30 feet in less than two weeks, other reservoirs, such as those on the San Antonio and Nueces rivers, remain at [historic lows](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQAL8Gd0Qswc-hoLjG3bv2SgvM2qyEjQ_Wz8nfn5JfuHqk0Wj-fE_fnjLt62-_oePnUqYdr5aRGetUaU6MT9_aGc4aWixrS-WKZdJK91INEuwUPeXXZLrogooWOnQw9NpqbdXQJWeXAZbF6EX3Ot4DqBmVhX42EcJDwaMj95apASyAAmNufYgDxC_jIVi4BxRGYSQu9cYJPzlLfpUfrLe5bF12iflo4v5L6FHokRMmyvnNhB6Pkml-CT3i35MyhUrnJtvZ2NPuA2XiN-yNuj_AyI9cLrmU2GSs5VwTS3xyxQ3lhZ4TVnl5xirbeRyZsElPcsadsTbpQyjMQo9ddfG4KGdqX4Mwat08fYo6_r_HP07_CwAA___IA5TN). Some researchers suggest that despite the recent gains, the state still faces chronic water scarcity.
## Five Texas Suburbs Among Nation’s Richest
Five Texas [suburbs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd1hw_MNSUGzjLttuaR3MsUGLTQQkTt5-5dz7BreeT6Nv5u9tvmGI4dj-4E6mvtY0H3SWSLVSnnNYfKUXlvKwj2yLS1vx6XRpBgEDF4pLPTsM8T33jTNWOC0bMlINoAG0UI03nbbduGoaLNK6ilEuvzQAoLCOVqH6JpirTCippRSy79vBOiXd2KO0WnaWWC_IhZpyWz19dNb4Tk_K7ZL2Jhpf672w7jeDicF0nme7JYvHv3BsGSuVC2Mw7emg9wUQxuoZTNVTIY6ZOO6Uw4KFf2WBSuXfk3k4-OXHYGqycfczxBjKqFgvth1D_DjUnz33NPA_AAD___mHhSY) have landed on the list of the richest in the U.S., according to an analysis from GOBankingRates. With heavy representation in the [top 10](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd0RwjMEUFNu4u9tuafFziNFiEwGJb95-5Wjf4LbnjGa-mT9f65dNOR3333ZH079jWQ88W8besa41-a3jt23t6Z7VtVDubStnKCswmChTlOs12JTfqxiCcSxoPqDhagINoJkaNhOlY3weJ63A4-zjCBCEiJo7zayXOCRzmTHFNeeMC3GbXFA8SGG503x0SATDkHqpt77hByfmd3lhvfmyD9lsvT8aGX8RWAgs53ne_m7leT0JLLb25DMSWPZy4PsSoM19S9g6_V-LpoPaHWvylp7X_XmkF9aW-ps-svVIP6kEFpgn6qQbXQiexhElFWxE6gKz1Ck9R5hlVFIM1YTHmXJOTSoi2H23KX9w-89Gfhn4FwAA__8wm5HZ), Texas boasts West University Place at No. 3, University Park at No. 6, and Southlake at No. 7. Bellaire and Colleyville also made the list of 50 suburbs at No. 23 and No. 47, respectively. Using U.S. Census and Zillow data, the analysis found that West University Place households have an average annual income of $410,000. The New York City suburb of Scarsdale took the No. 1 spot, with an average annual income of over $600,000. ## Houston World Series of Dog Shows Underway
The Houston World Series of [Dog Shows](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu4yAUBNCvwR0RXOMQCopt3L1tt7TA92KjxeYJcHj5-1XyC1uPNDozf76WLxdTPLff7iDbfkJeTuo1UWtUlhLXvdGPq_XyV_EV81b33DEvIGDiQnNpFnQxvRY1oPUCjRzISj2BATBCD7tFsYIb9ai9fKARDr3QgpRGpcSkyA3RvsuElkZKIZW6TR61xLty0hs5emJKEMaWy63t9OGE9MpPKrc1H0Oye2vflY2_GMwM5t777e-er3fIYH5GpMxgTjEQg9md8XCpMpj3fNWWT95zScgrlUiV58Axb_w9svLrRCrdvRjM8Ji4C0qNLmjuUWiuzOPOjVwdv4N8hABrMCMMxeJ3jynFetdMie1wMX2Y7f_OfVr4FwAA__-bQo1y) is now underway at the NRG Center and will conclude tomorrow. The five-day event features a 14,000-entry dog extravaganza. As a “[cluster show](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd1jsGodQUFzjLtdeaeHs2kZHTAQkJG__K3mFvx5pZr7v32W--BDDsf31N3b1tab54FYi18p5zuG6V375Uh7LIy-F0lb21CjNqHCUykiwM_kQ37PuyC2KLHTswIxoEa0y3e4AV-tXNZqRTup8BUYP66DPns48DBq64D5lyoAFUKB1Py5kgE7aw2JhWFhoxRRqyn3d-Xtnje_05Nxf062Lbq_1XsTwR-AkcGqt9Ufe7j7__-QCJ37yUQVOe3qUmg7ZUo4kC-fARaZVUtrkB6sInLrs6N5CjKGcjNBqu_kQvzv1d3aeDn8CAAD__3MsevA),” the five-day event hosts a variety of competitions and shows, including more than 30 independent breed specialty contests alongside a collection of all-breed shows. This 47th edition of the show is expected to draw [40,000 spectators](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2urCAURp8GOydsRBkKitvYzW1PaTayVRIUA3v-3v5k5hVO_SXfWlk_t-mGMcVj_Y87OX4teTroWRMxU5lKnDemF9Z69_fia8hr3fIz5ElJ1bfStGCngDG9J90E52Ww0JAD0yurlJWm2RzZay9Rd91gZqv7xXo7e0MopV6uwWMT3edMGrAAErS-9D4YCING8BY6T0JLCpFzufBGX50lvfODymXOe5PcxnxW0f0TahRqRD9D91mEGs9cWagx5RlTW8_MKa4btwsh30s81pYJ93aNKe14CDWCATBXMwg1NsWF8xlTinUwQst1x5i-QP5bpodTvwEAAP__Lcp8UQ) and participants to the NRG Center. The show began as the Astro World Series of Dog Shows in 1978 and has won "Show of the Year" twice.
