On this day in 1876, the Texas and Pacific Railway completed its line into Fort Worth before the state legislature could revoke its charter. Legendary railroad builder , who was hired by the company to finish the route, laid more than a mile of track a day to beat the deadline. New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Texas Drought Eases with Historic Rains Unusually heavy rainfall, punctuated by the July 4 floods in Texas Hill Country and accompanied by cooler-than-normal summer temperatures, has persistent drought conditions. Lakes and reservoirs across Texas were dangerously low heading into summer, with some hitting record lows in May. Some of these lakes are now considered full, including , which has reached its highest point in 20 years. While some lakes have risen more than 30 feet in less than two weeks, other reservoirs, such as those on the San Antonio and Nueces rivers, remain at . Some researchers suggest that despite the recent gains, the state still faces chronic water scarcity. Five Texas Suburbs Among Nation’s Richest Five Texas have landed on the list of the richest in the U.S., according to an analysis from GOBankingRates. With heavy representation in the , Texas boasts West University Place at No. 3, University Park at No. 6, and Southlake at No. 7. Bellaire and Colleyville also made the list of 50 suburbs at No. 23 and No. 47, respectively. Using U.S. Census and Zillow data, the analysis found that West University Place households have an average annual income of $410,000. The New York City suburb of Scarsdale took the No. 1 spot, with an average annual income of over $600,000. You can see the . Houston World Series of Dog Shows Underway The Houston World Series of is now underway at the NRG Center and will conclude tomorrow. The five-day event features a 14,000-entry dog extravaganza. As a “,” the five-day event hosts a variety of competitions and shows, including more than 30 independent breed specialty contests alongside a collection of all-breed shows. This 47th edition of the show is expected to draw and participants to the NRG Center. name: The Maine Wire
subject: A Succulent Maine Clam Is No Match for the Detritus of Smack, Sanford Seafood Shack Painfully Learns
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** A Succulent Maine Clam Is No Match for the Detritus of Smack, Sanford Seafood Shack Painfully Learns (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=93e06d5137&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Jul 18, 2025 05:17 pm

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Ten Best Things About Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/10thingsiloveaboutms?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, Speaking to my friends at Smith County Republicans on Monday night, someone asked me why I moved from London to Mississippi.
---
|
---
_Smith County conservatives_
| There are so many things I love about living in the Magnolia state, I couldn’t answer the question properly. I thought I’d list my favorite things about living in Mississippi now.

**1\. Southern Civility.** Yes, it’s a bit of a cliché, but as an outsider I can confirm it’s the truth; _Mississippi folk are the friendliest people on the planet_. Southern charm makes being here such a joy.

**2\. Mississippi BOOM!** Since I arrived almost five years ago, economic output in the state is up about a third. There’s been a massive injection of inward investment. You can feel the growth. Coming from the other side of the Atlantic, it's uplifting to live in a place that is on the up.

**3\. Income tax on the way out.** Mississippi is on the way to eliminating the income tax entirely, like Florida, Tennessee and Texas. It is great to live in a society where taxes go down and public officials can’t expect to keep taking more.

**4\. Space.** With 3 million people spread out over 48,000 square miles, Mississippi has lots of space. There’s a great big outdoors. Our state might not have mega cities the size of Atlanta or Chicago, but having seen the boarded up offices and shops in Chicago, I wonder if modern technology means that being more spread out is actually the way to go.

**5\. Stunning small towns.** Too often downtown America feels abandoned, people and businesses having moved to the suburbs. One of the delights Mississippi has to offer are towns that are actually prospering. Downtown Oxford, Starkville and Natchez, for example, are full of shops and restaurants – and thriving.
---
|
---
_Mississippi has some beautiful towns_
| **6\. Universities.** Our family is at the stage where we’re starting to think about college options. There are so many great choices in this part of the world. Sending your kid to a southern university reduces the chance they’ll become a communist – which is why, I suspect, we are seeing such a surge in applications from outsiders wanting to study in this state.

**7\. High school football.** The football season is about to begin and when it does, the highlight of my week will be watching Friday night football. It is a festival of everything Americana.....

**8\. College football.** The next best thing is college football. Sure, we don’t have an NFL team, but I genuinely prefer watching SEC teams play.

**9\. The weather.** Some folk complain about Mississippi’s heat and humidity. Coming from London where one would sometimes seldom see the sun, I love the climate here. The sun in our state is up bright and early (almost) every day. Glorious.

**10\. Gardening.** I love gardening, and it seems you can grow almost anything here. Sweet peas. Hibiscus. This year I’ve had a bumper crop of grapes and even starting to get some mulberries.
---
|
---
_Bumper grapes - enough to start a winery? Chateau de Flowood_
| If living in America means you’ve won first prize in the lottery of life, being in Mississippi means you got the bonus ball!

Have a wonderful weekend.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=be5af059d1&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b7701cfe6b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=b7701cfe6b).

Never Needs Ice!** [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IbITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) **No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler - it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.** [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IcITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items - that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags! [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IdITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get
Exclusive Introductory
Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus
Gifts Worth $388 And
FREE Shipping!** Order now to take advantage of our special introductory pricing, 11 free bonus gifts worth $388, and free shipping. Your exclusive 11 FREE Bonus Gifts package includes:
* **FREE** 40-Watt Solar Panel
* **FREE** 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* **FREE** Survival Coffee
* **FREE** Survival Cocoa
* **FREE** StarFire Camp Stove
* **FREE** Freedom Flame
* **FREE** Multi-Use Flashlight
* **FREE** Solar Power Digital Report
* **FREE** $25 Certificate
* **FREE** Shipping & Handling
* **FREE** VIP Phone Line

Plus there's an easy payment plan available with no credit check... [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IeITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IfITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) **But Hurry... Last Time
The Solar Go-Fridge
SOLD OUT In 24 Hours** **There is one catch:** We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. **So don't wait...** If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IgITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) So make sure to grab yours now. **I know you'll love it!** Stay safe and have fun out there,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Love Their
Solar Go-Fridge!** [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IhITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) **_Kristen G._**_
"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler."_ _**Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good."_ _**Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing."_ _**Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own."_ _**Lou H.**
"Please get one or two of them like I did. They will come in handy next time you have a power failure or going on a trip. I use mine whenever we travel or recently when we had a power failure a few weeks ago. You won't be sorry."_ [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IiITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO) [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf0u3Iteknop5IjITmdahett5&s=LFKJGKLIBBJODODO)

| **_BREAKING:_
Republicans in Washington are scrambling to undo parts of Trump's “Big Beautiful” law that they just voted for**
---
Peter —
Just weeks after voting to gut healthcare for millions of Americans, slash Medicaid by $1 trillion, and jack up utility bills, Republicans like Missouri Senator Josh Hawley are desperately trying to walk back their vote.
He introduced new legislation to try to roll back some of the Medicaid cuts that were included in the massive tax cut law. It's pathetic.
This massive Republican tax scam will rip healthcare away from MILLIONS of families, devastate rural hospitals, and take food out of the mouths of children, seniors, and veterans. And now they want to pretend they care about the consequences?
We won't be silent. You shouldn't be either.

clean_body: They're scrambling to fix what they broke. | | BREAKING: Republicans in Washington are scrambling to undo parts of Trump's “Big Beautiful” law that they just voted for Peter — Just weeks after voting to gut healthcare for millions of Americans, slash Medicaid by $1 trillion, and jack up utility bills, Republicans like Missouri Senator Josh Hawley are desperately trying to walk back their vote. He introduced new legislation to try to roll back some of the Medicaid cuts that were included in the massive tax cut law. It's pathetic. This massive Republican tax scam will rip healthcare away from MILLIONS of families, devastate rural hospitals, and take food out of the mouths of children, seniors, and veterans. And now they want to pretend they care about the consequences? We won't be silent. You shouldn't be either. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Onward, — Unite the Country PAC | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! body:
Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it

| **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111744150/558263698/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTViZjg0OC1hMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEVYWGxzQ45We-xySJHE-OcUnrsHTgEYiu1u_xMiG5Y=&emci=9e23e3a6-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=695bf848-a064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111744154/558263718/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTViZjg0OC1hMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEVYWGxzQ45We-xySJHE-OcUnrsHTgEYiu1u_xMiG5Y=&emci=9e23e3a6-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=695bf848-a064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)
---
**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111744159/558263737/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTViZjg0OC1hMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEVYWGxzQ45We-xySJHE-OcUnrsHTgEYiu1u_xMiG5Y=&emci=9e23e3a6-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=695bf848-a064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)**
[ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111744165/558263750/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTViZjg0OC1hMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEVYWGxzQ45We-xySJHE-OcUnrsHTgEYiu1u_xMiG5Y=&emci=9e23e3a6-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=695bf848-a064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

name: AMAC Action
subject: Did the left-wing machine get to you?
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1044917/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvclA3V3hCZHdBdg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTk/LbmNsTjdvSVh2NA/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTSzc5c0Jqelhscw/gaHucEg/s4s3e56481e)
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Friend, **Seniors are under attack...** Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—**once the backbone of the conservative movement** —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war! **_And I’m worried that it’s working..._** So today, I’m performing an **EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS.** **[YES, I stand with Conservative values, President Trump, and the America First movement?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** **Or...** **[NO, I’ve joined with the left-wing media, George Soros, and the AARP...](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, **President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+** —the only age group where his approval is negative. And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. **[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[And my friend, I hope they haven’t gotten to you...](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[that’s why I need your YES answer to my roll call today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask...** _what on earth is going on?_** _**_Is it the Liberal Media?_**_ **We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news** , and the media has become an **echo chamber** for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House. _**_Could it be the AARP?_**_ They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” _**_Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence?_**_ You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos. And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded **_Tides Foundation_**. The AARP once _even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine_ , calling him one of “**America’s Greatest Innovators** ” who’s “**changing the world, $100 million at a time.** ” My Friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the **_Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros_** who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will answer “YES” to the EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS right away.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. **Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action.****** **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over.** **We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.****** **Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens.** **In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!** **And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors.** **My Friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation.** Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where _American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movement_ ... Where the _liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family_ ... And where _liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism_ ... I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either. **AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans.** But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. **We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you.** So when you answer **YES** to your **EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS** ... **[I hope you’ll also make a special one time contribution to AMAC Action, to supercharge our advocacy, spread the truth, and fight back against the left’s 3-headed monster.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to:
---
* Advocate for conservative values and policies
* Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda
* Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism.

---
And so much more. My Friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your _**EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS**_ below.
---
[ **YES! I stand with AMAC Action, President Trump,**
**and the values that made America great**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **NO. I’m siding with the liberal media, radical elites,**
**and left-wing groups spreading propaganda**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Thank you for standing strong. Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and **we aren’t going anywhere**.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_** **AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | **P.S.** The most radical left-wing forces in the nation are counting on you to sit this one out. **[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[Prove them wrong. Answer YES to your Emergency Roll Call and donate whatever you can today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
---
2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1, Leesburg FL 34748
---
|
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1044917/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTk/LbmNsTjdvSVh2NA/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTSzc5c0Jqelhscw/gaHucEg/sdmc88850ec)
`

Liz Plank and I do a deep dive in the Epstein Files, the likelihood that Trump (and Democrats) are in them, and the broader commentary on how willingly our structures uphold misogyny. We also do a deep dive into why the Democratic Party isn't getting behind Zohran Mamdani, even as Republicans continue to rally behind a fascist. Finally, we share memes post Coldplay concert fiasco and agree the Internet is undefeated.
Be sure to subscribe to Liz on her Substack titled "Airplane Mode with [Liz Plank](https://open.substack.com/users/14317462-liz-plank?utm_source=mentions)."

Peter — Republicans just voted to gut Medicaid — ripping care away from millions of Americans, including _750,000 Georgians_ — just to hand out tax breaks to the rich. **Seriously.** While families struggle to afford basic care, Republicans are making it crystal clear who they serve — and it’s not us. We can’t afford to stay quiet. _Not when 750,000 Georgians’ healthcare is on the line._ [We need 1,000 signatures before midnight: Add your name to protect Medicaid →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111750216/558284292/1117152568?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071925_MEDICAID_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0Yjg3ZC1hNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gPChz2f6qGBUkkAc4iwOtG3W04mmVtT0MZ-lIu8RRRQ=&emci=41972e76-7d62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6224b87d-a464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111750219/558284294/1117152568?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071925_MEDICAID_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0Yjg3ZC1hNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gPChz2f6qGBUkkAc4iwOtG3W04mmVtT0MZ-lIu8RRRQ=&emci=41972e76-7d62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6224b87d-a464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853)**

Medicaid means doctor visits, prescriptions, cancer treatment, maternal care — basic healthcare and survival for those who need it most.
And Republicans just voted to take that away from 750,000 Georgians.
Peter, signing your name might seem small — but when thousands of us stand together, we send a message they can’t ignore: **We will not sit back while they gut Medicaid to line the pockets of the rich.**
[Add your name NOW to protect Medicaid and hold Republicans accountable:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111750223/558284298/1117152568?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071925_MEDICAID_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0Yjg3ZC1hNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gPChz2f6qGBUkkAc4iwOtG3W04mmVtT0MZ-lIu8RRRQ=&emci=41972e76-7d62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6224b87d-a464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853)

Not when 750,000 Georgians’ healthcare is on the line. | | Medicaid means doctor visits, prescriptions, cancer treatment, maternal care — basic healthcare and survival for those who need it most. And Republicans just voted to take that away from 750,000 Georgians. Peter, signing your name might seem small — but when thousands of us stand together, we send a message they can’t ignore: We will not sit back while they gut Medicaid to line the pockets of the rich. | — Georgia Dems | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m furious, folks.
body:
|
#
Friend, At the beginning of the month, Trump and his allies cut over a **trillion dollars** from Medicaid and SNAP – ripping vital support away from families, seniors, and kids across this country. **Now, they’re coming for our public schools.** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111750400/558284470/1298827474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI0Yjg3ZC1hNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJM8Y4Ow6bgezd-oZiua7WZm2y1Do6aHcwjVvnLVW0Q=&emci=ea5c099d-ce63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5524b87d-a464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=27257697) **Supreme Court Allows Trump to Gut Education Department With Mass Firings**
---
The Supreme Court just gave this administration the power to do what it’s been promising all along: **dismantle the U.S. Department of Education.**
Mass firings. No accountability. No plan to protect the millions of students, teachers, and families who depend on it.
As someone who has spent decades fighting for children – from leading Michigan Head Start to helping run the Michigan Department of Education – I won’t accept this.
Eliminating the Department of Education would slash funding for students with disabilities and those in low-income communities.
This isn’t “draining the swamp.” It’s abandoning our kids. Full stop.
I’ve worked on these issues my whole career, and I know this move will hit the most vulnerable students and families the hardest. And that’s why I’m doing everything in my power to hold this administration accountable.
**[If you believe in protecting public education, will you sign my petition right now to oppose the dismantling of the Department of Education?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111750404/558284471/1298827474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTI0Yjg3ZC1hNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJM8Y4Ow6bgezd-oZiua7WZm2y1Do6aHcwjVvnLVW0Q=&emci=ea5c099d-ce63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5524b87d-a464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=27257697)**

Thank you,
Kristen

We want to make sure Democrats like you are still in this fight with us!
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project!

I noticed that you started the process of confirming your July Democratic Supporter Membership to take back the House and put a check on Donald Trump... __but you never finished.__

Trump and Republicans would love _nothing more_ than for us to lose momentum while they slash Medicaid, threaten Social Security, and test the limits of Trump’s power more and more every day.

**Democratic Supporter Memberships give us the fuel we need to combat MAGA extremism, turn out blue voters, and defend democracy before it can be destroyed.**

[**With Trump ramping up his billionaire-funded war chest, we need all the help we can get. Will you finish the July Democratic Supporter Membership you previously started so we can flip critical swing seats and end Trump’s trifecta? She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ****=** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won this district by 0.5% – not even a full 1% – despite outspending his Democratic opponent by a 5-to-1 margin. Now, John James is running for Governor, meaning **this is the _only _open_ competitive_ House seat on the entire electoral map.** All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents – which makes it tougher for a Democrat to break through.

This race provides an incredible opportunity for Democrats to win back the House and we absolutely cannot let it slip away.

Christina is running to replace John James. In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”** which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens - and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.”_

Christina’s story is one of hard work, service, and fighting for others. **This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen. Let’s get Christina the resources she’ll need to triumph. Each and every flipped seat in the U.S. House of Representatives gets us closer to a Democratic majority – and further away from future “Big Ugly Bills” by Trump’s GOP.**

Fellow activist, did you see this message?

There has been a lot in the news lately about how the courts in our nation are working to uphold democracy or to aid the Trump regime in causing unimaginable damage.

>From the liberal majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court voting that the state's archaic total-abortion ban from the 1800s is unenforceable to the U.S. Supreme Court allowing Trump to effectively eliminate the Department of Education, courts hold incredible power, and it’s more important than ever before that they remain fair and independent.

**Here’s the situation: Pennsylvania is the next key battleground state as the state Supreme Court retention elections approach, and we need your support.** In November, three PA Supreme Court justices, elected as Democrats, are up for retention. In PA, judicial retention elections are non-partisan so voters will only see “yes” or “no” next to these justices’ names. MAGA is actively running an anti-retention campaign, which, if successful, would leave the court with three vacancies until the Governor can fill them – something unlikely, as it would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate – or until the next judicial election in 2027.

As is reported in the _Bucks County Beacon_ , “**Republicans see this as their best opportunity to break the firm 5-2 Democratic majority on the court.** This would pave the way for very different judicial decisions. Many of the court’s recent election-related rulings were made on narrow 4-3 votes that could swing differently if the composition of the court changes.”

[**We are fighting to protect our courts as they make critical decisions that impact our everyday lives – help us ensure voters are informed and ready to turn out to vote by rushing a donation now →**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2Flbrf0WO561nwlMY1O-2BnQbEdZvcRB18YB-2BA9HJwaUzNS8-2BMkp76w1yNvF6H-2FQcS5cmEigKrmlK3v7xD-2BZ0lmGag-3DDw34_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYUUBUlUwCvtNnmvbsRbfTlwUYRVDloKsltBQNsmkmnaXn2HMGVWcp3kjeWzjKrUXgzDLS-2BsdLowNyifHv1ARUZXHqY3euM4KEQZfV28t-2FOPTi8lUJFD1wn5JIsKBYMz38n4Iw1-2F2RALtMoMFlOvtT5-2BvNTNboPEwaiZCR4jMvJvLJ0uLJN9-2BQJb5ZL0mV3dJO)

Katy Personette
Chief Development and Grants Officer

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Fellow activist,
Recently, there was a major court case win in Wisconsin that we wanted to share with you for a very important reason...

But first, here’s some background: Earlier this year, voters turned out in Wisconsin in what was one of the most expensive and competitive state Supreme Court races in our nation's history. Despite billionaire Elon Musk dumping more than 20 million dollars into the race in support of Republican Waukesha County judge and former Wisconsin Attorney General Brad Schimel, Dane County Judge Susan Crawford won the election, solidifying a liberal majority on the court.

Following this election, the WI Supreme Court heard a case on the state's archaic abortion ban from 1849 that sat dormant for five decades before _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. Because of the current liberal majority on the state Supreme Court, on July 2, 2025, they ruled (along ideological lines) to invalidate the near-total abortion ban and restore access in the state.

According to the _New York Times_ , if this law remained, anyone who had an abortion could have faced six years in prison and a $10,000 fine. The overturning of this draconian ban is a major win for families in the Midwest.

_**As we always say, elections matter. **_

**Here’s why this matters to us:** All eyes are now on Pennsylvania as Republicans have set their sights on running a massive anti-retention campaign against three PA Supreme Court justices (originally elected as Democrats). Our state Supreme Court is critical in not only protecting our fundamental freedoms, like reproductive rights, but also holding the Trump regime accountable, ensuring that PA has fair congressional maps, protecting voting rights, climate and environmental justice, and addressing other issues that impact our daily lives.

It’s critical that Pennsylvanians and eligible voters understand how important state courts are and how they’re protecting our rights and freedoms, and we need your help to make that happen.

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, did you see this message? There has been a lot in the news lately about how the courts in our nation are working to uphold democracy or to aid the Trump regime in causing unimaginable damage. From the liberal majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court voting that the state's archaic total-abortion ban from the 1800s is unenforceable to the U.S. Supreme Court allowing Trump to effectively eliminate the Department of Education, courts hold incredible power, and it’s more important than ever before that they remain fair and independent. Here’s the situation: Pennsylvania is the next key battleground state as the state Supreme Court retention elections approach, and we need your support. In November, three PA Supreme Court justices, elected as Democrats, are up for retention. In PA, judicial retention elections are non-partisan so voters will only see “yes” or “no” next to these justices’ names. MAGA is actively running an anti-retention campaign, which, if successful, would leave the court with three vacancies until the Governor can fill them – something unlikely, as it would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate – or until the next judicial election in 2027. As is reported in the Bucks County Beacon , “Republicans see this as their best opportunity to break the firm 5-2 Democratic majority on the court. This would pave the way for very different judicial decisions. Many of the court’s recent election-related rulings were made on narrow 4-3 votes that could swing differently if the composition of the court changes.” Together, Katy Personette Chief Development and Grants Officer \---------- Forwarded message --------- Fellow activist, Recently, there was a major court case win in Wisconsin that we wanted to share with you for a very important reason... But first, here’s some background: Earlier this year, voters turned out in Wisconsin in what was one of the most expensive and competitive state Supreme Court races in our nation's history. Despite billionaire Elon Musk dumping more than 20 million dollars into the race in support of Republican Waukesha County judge and former Wisconsin Attorney General Brad Schimel, Dane County Judge Susan Crawford won the election, solidifying a liberal majority on the court. Following this election, the WI Supreme Court heard a case on the state's archaic abortion ban from 1849 that sat dormant for five decades before Roe v. Wade was overturned. Because of the current liberal majority on the state Supreme Court, on July 2, 2025, they ruled (along ideological lines) to invalidate the near-total abortion ban and restore access in the state. According to the New York Times , if this law remained, anyone who had an abortion could have faced six years in prison and a $10,000 fine. The overturning of this draconian ban is a major win for families in the Midwest. As we always say, elections matter. Here’s why this matters to us: All eyes are now on Pennsylvania as Republicans have set their sights on running a massive anti-retention campaign against three PA Supreme Court justices (originally elected as Democrats). Our state Supreme Court is critical in not only protecting our fundamental freedoms, like reproductive rights, but also holding the Trump regime accountable, ensuring that PA has fair congressional maps, protecting voting rights, climate and environmental justice, and addressing other issues that impact our daily lives. It’s critical that Pennsylvanians and eligible voters understand how important state courts are and how they’re protecting our rights and freedoms, and we need your help to make that happen. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Now more than ever before, we must ensure that our state and federal courts remain fair and independent. In solidarity, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Unfit, unqualified, and dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111755101/558293386/623074613?refcode=jtk1410-su-nd&code=jtk1410-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIzM2Q1YWYtYTg2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wwb10Fx1gX1Gb8OTAeKHEEXQ3XxpiWurCispRRkdy78=&emci=be809487-6963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=eb33d5af-a864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

Selection and confirmation for a President's Cabinet – or nomination to a lifetime position on the federal bench – should never come down to political loyalty. These positions require competence, experience, and a deep commitment to the Constitution and the rule of law. And historically despite individual perspectives on specific issues, that has been the norm for the nominees of both Republican and Democratic administrations.

But Trump's nominations and appointees betray those standards.
Exhibit A: Pete Hegseth. From gross financial mismanagement at nonprofits meant to serve our veterans to blatant security breaches like the widely publicized Signal scandal, Hegseth has proven time and again that he is unfit for leadership. And now? He reportedly recently halted U.S. military aid to Ukraine without even consulting the President. His actions are rogue and reprehensible – especially in a moment when our allies need us most.
His position isn't just one that demands _better_. It demands the _best_. His decisions are a matter of life and death for the millions of American heroes who put their lives on the line to serve our national security and our national defense.
Hegseth simply has no place anywhere near our national security apparatus, and he needs to go. But it doesn't end there.
Exhibit B: Trump's judicial nominee, Emil Bove, has refused to answer even the most basic questions about his role in the suspicious dismissal of corruption charges against New York City Mayor Eric Adams. That decision reeked of a quid pro quo – one that benefited the Trump administration's immigration agenda. Bove's pattern of abusing prosecutorial power isn't just concerning – it's disqualifying.

He refused to acknowledge that Januaruy 6, 2021 was an attack on the Capitol but referred to what happened that day – _in writing on his Senate questionnaire_ – as “a matter of significant political debate”, and subsequently played an active role in the firing of career prosecutors who worked on the cases that resulted from that day’s horrific events. Hundreds of DOJ veterans have signed a letter highlighting Bove’s lack of judicial temperament and his limited judicial qualifications.

Vengeful and devoted to Trump – not to the rule of law – he poses a real and present danger.
These are not isolated incidents. They are symptoms of a broader corrosion of ethics, standards of professional capability, fundamental disregard for democratic norms, and a dangerous slide toward authoritarianism.
I am doing everything in my power to fight back. I will continue to challenge these appointments. I will keep demanding answers. I will not stop speaking out and speaking up. And I will not stop working to protect the integrity of our democracy and the institutions that serve it.
**But I need to make sure that you are in this fight with me, friend._[Can I count on you to join in the fight to fire Hegseth, block Bove, and defend the rule of law? Sign on now to stand with me to stop incompetence from eroding our nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111755107/558293416/-2008876260?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1410-su-nd&code=jtk1410-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIzM2Q1YWYtYTg2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wwb10Fx1gX1Gb8OTAeKHEEXQ3XxpiWurCispRRkdy78=&emci=be809487-6963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=eb33d5af-a864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)_**

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Peter, we want to hear from you →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250719-1437-foote&t=1001&akid=1437%2E342411%2EjXLwlV ]Squad Victory Fund

Hi Peter,

We wanted to take a minute to thank you for standing with us — this
movement to support progressive champions wouldn’t be possible without
dedicated supporters like you.

Now that we’re halfway through 2025, we’re planning our next moves to
defend progressive values and back a Squad that fights every day for our
communities.

And we need your voice to help shape what comes next.

This movement is people-powered — and when you share what matters most to
you, your input helps guide our strategy, shape the direction of this
movement, and build momentum for change on the ground.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-july/?source=em20250719-1437&akid=1437%2E342411%2EjXLwlV ]Will you take a few minutes to fill out our July Priorities Survey?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-july/?source=em20250719-1437&akid=1437%2E342411%2EjXLwlV ]Take the Survey ››

It won’t take more than a few minutes, and your voice is essential to this
work.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to the extremism
of the Trump Administration — but they cannot do it alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19795?refcode=em20250719-1437&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1437%2E342411%2EjXLwlV ]Please make a contribution today to support the Squad.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1437%2E342411%2EjXLwlV

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| | | The call to make the Epstein files public has now grown to a national roar. And Donald Trump finally responded by saying he has "asked Attorney General Pam Bondi to produce any and all pertinent Grand Jury testimony, subject to Court approval." **Don't buy this BS.[ALL the files need to be released](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fb13eb8-e2d1-4561-8fa0-3a4854c14e16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), not just the small portion that is grand jury testimony, and certainly not just the part that Is deemed "pertinent" by Trump sycophant Pam Bondi**. This isn't hard. The files need to be released. ALL of them (with victim names redacted, of course). [**Add your name, and tell Trump: "BS ****Partial Releases Aren't Enough. Release ALL the Epstein Files! "**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb25bbd43-9271-40f4-96c5-caa732b3d9ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

* * *
Trump shamelessly dangled the promise of releasing the notorious Epstein Files as bait to secure re-election. But now, back in the White House, he and his minions defiantly refuse to unveil the sordid details surrounding the _convicted sex trafficker and Trump’s long-time pal,_ the late Jeffrey Epstein. As more damning evidence leaks out, Trump is outrageously turning on his own supporters who dare to demand the release of the Epstein Files and seek justice for the innocent children trafficked by Epstein. He has called them “stupid people.” Trump has openly declared his hatred for Democrats, and now he brazenly disparages the “weaklings” within his own base, claiming he has “lost faith” in them. **_MAGA supporters are beginning to realize that Donald Trump hates them too._** His contempt for _all of us_ is no longer a secret. He’s crippling our economy with reckless tariffs and draconian cuts to social safety nets. He’s violating our rights and dismantling the guardrails of our democracy. It’s clear that the mad creep will inflict suffering on the many so he can _concentrate his power and wealth._ **But we are RESISTING! clean_body: | | | ****Trump calls his own supporters “weaklings” and “stupid people.”**** Trump shamelessly dangled the promise of releasing the notorious Epstein Files as bait to secure re-election. But now, back in the White House, he and his minions defiantly refuse to unveil the sordid details surrounding the convicted sex trafficker and Trump’s long-time pal, the late Jeffrey Epstein. As more damning evidence leaks out, Trump is outrageously turning on his own supporters who dare to demand the release of the Epstein Files and seek justice for the innocent children trafficked by Epstein. He has called them “stupid people.” Trump has openly declared his hatred for Democrats, and now he brazenly disparages the “weaklings” within his own base, claiming he has “lost faith” in them. MAGA supporters are beginning to realize that Donald Trump hates them too. His contempt for all of us is no longer a secret. He’s crippling our economy with reckless tariffs and draconian cuts to social safety nets. He’s violating our rights and dismantling the guardrails of our democracy. It’s clear that the mad creep will inflict suffering on the many so he can concentrate his power and wealth. But we are RESISTING! We’ve put up 24 billboards, most recently in Brooklyn, New York, and Fort Collins, Colorado! Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots activists, our "Impeach Trump" billboards are in 11 states and counting.****, New York Collins, Colorado If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: NDRC ALERT
subject: BREAKING: Trump just let the cat out of the bag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
There’s no longer any mystery when it comes to what Republicans are trying to do in Texas.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111756926/558297630/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MzNkNWFmLWE4NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o3ZMeD1bKWy_2NUFg803XCyBaCM45gDg7HRlZ1VyA4Y=&emci=061a318f-f963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e933d5af-a864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, this clip will make your jaw drop. When President Trump was asked about Texas’s sudden plans to redraw its congressional map, he let the entire cat out of the bag. [**See it for yourself — and if you can, make a donation to help stop this brazen power grab and expose Republican plans to cheat in the midterm elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111756927/558297631/1779338036?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TrumpVideo_email_20250719-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250719-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideo_&utm_campaign=TrumpVideo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MzNkNWFmLWE4NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o3ZMeD1bKWy_2NUFg803XCyBaCM45gDg7HRlZ1VyA4Y=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111756928/558297632/1779338036?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TrumpVideo_email_20250719-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250719-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideo_&utm_campaign=TrumpVideo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5MzNkNWFmLWE4NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o3ZMeD1bKWy_2NUFg803XCyBaCM45gDg7HRlZ1VyA4Y=)
---
Look, it’s extremely rare for states to voluntarily redraw their electoral maps mid-decade. The _New York Times_ reported last month that the White House was putting pressure on state lawmakers in Texas to *literally* go back to the drawing board and create more Republican House seats. And last week, Gov. Greg Abbott announced that they’d try to push new redistricting at a special legislative session.
In this clip, President Trump admits they want a “simple redrawing where we pick up five seats.”
It gets worse. President Trump went on to hint that this is part of a larger strategy to manipulate maps ahead of next year’s election, adding, “We have a couple [of] other states where we’ll pick up seats also.”
**This is a fight the National Democratic Redistricting Committee was built to win — in fact, fights like this are exactly why we exist.** For our democracy’s sake, we must stop radical gerrymandering from being used as a strategy to win elections.
Let’s call this exactly what it is — **cheating** — and do everything we can, in Texas and across the country, to shut it down. [**The days ahead are all hands on deck. The NDRC Team

clean_body: There’s no longer any mystery when it comes to what Republicans are trying to do in Texas. | Peter, this clip will make your jaw drop. When President Trump was asked about Texas’s sudden plans to redraw its congressional map, he let the entire cat out of the bag. = | = Look, it’s extremely rare for states to voluntarily redraw their electoral maps mid-decade. The New York Times reported last month that the White House was putting pressure on state lawmakers in Texas to literally go back to the drawing board and create more Republican House seats. And last week, Gov. Greg Abbott announced that they’d try to push new redistricting at a special legislative session. In this clip, President Trump admits they want a “simple redrawing where we pick up five seats.” It gets worse. President Trump went on to hint that this is part of a larger strategy to manipulate maps ahead of next year’s election, adding, “We have a couple [of] other states where we’ll pick up seats also.” This is a fight the National Democratic Redistricting Committee was built to win — in fact, fights like this are exactly why we exist. For our democracy’s sake, we must stop radical gerrymandering from being used as a strategy to win elections. Let’s call this exactly what it is — cheating — and do everything we can, in Texas and across the country, to shut it down. = We’ll be in touch as this story continues to develop. Thank you, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Because I have you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1718%2E791427%2EnahOzs)

When I think about the toughest times in my life, I’m thankful I’ve always had people around me to help me through.
Being raised in a refugee camp wasn’t easy.
Coming to the US and becoming a citizen wasn’t easy.
Running for office for the first time as a young Muslim immigrant wasn’t easy.
And since then, going up against far-right Republicans, hateful smears, and millions of dollars in attack ads isn’t easy either.
But I never think twice about pressing forward and fighting for justice for all. That’s because I’ve had my family, friends and community around me.
**_And because I have you.**_
I could not do this without you and the entire progressive movement that I fight alongside. Now that I’ve officially launched my campaign for reelection, I’m hoping that I count on you to have my back, as you always have in tough times.
You probably didn't wake up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my campaign, but I really need you if we’re going to win reelection and fight back against Trump’s administration.
**[Friend, can you make your first $5 contribution to my re-election campaign before our fundraising deadline next week? Together, we can take back our democracy and continue to do great things for our community.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&efcode=em250719-1-180&t=2&akid=1718%2E791427%2EnahOzs)

worried that it’s working..._** So today, I’m performing an **EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS.** **[YES, I stand with Conservative values, President Trump, and the America First movement?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4cf922b231664a268bb7f0b466e843da&_e=XRUVeXLzCVyvQYCEPtjq17tXPAbMayvPklqRZujqr9estQdWprL49Qmm9ELEJSRbwycSC-RBKkJsZLUguQWz8QccXQN7GpjjLk0WFPX8V5WuZVWFa9GZOni6-reks5GzbZNS3_l-eWi20Cva0aWK__Ms2qme4WJkqJ1xO9nAoxpBVYDXj-jibrDBDnlM5E5oURZUhYcawGb7Og77r3szSgj2BIv1GkUYFQtTjQQ1f01L9vXX_AKNHNJw9cVqUsOoM4wQoRIdEyQlK6B_Pnnw0mAF5oIAC_Y52vfRRIfEsj2DE6ak-k9lc-GNzk8SJkzeNId9N_OyiCfOSdrLCHx7j1MyKQaA2cCuDbl9zdeYe7gwR4gxRjBN3LqPr66enKYaho7b6mUfqJsjQvk4RmzpsCn7YQ8n8fhJOC7hu5ODbcbWVPeS947ACaSId9K7nbqb3TaLc7zLK4-XYzGmI1tol-_aRQY6RD7TpGuJfPrkzO5j13J_F5ifhbtYnDNG1KUIPU653BDhU-wJzxuvkUDhAJ3QyHBN8WYBpgDCnJ0PuoKL1KPKQj3zF1F6r_ANil1DmgMDduvfroeH-scPobGMIHF8KYHaDZ-h2U_SUDjPPAw%3D)****Or...** **[NO, I’ve joined with the left-wing media, George Soros, and the AARP...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4cf922b231664a268bb7f0b466e843da&_e=XRUVeXLzCVyvQYCEPtjq17tXPAbMayvPklqRZujqr9estQdWprL49Qmm9ELEJSRbwycSC-RBKkJsZLUguQWz8QccXQN7GpjjLk0WFPX8V5WuZVWFa9GZOni6-reks5GzbZNS3_l-eWi20Cva0aWK__Ms2qme4WJkqJ1xO9nAoxpBVYDXj-jibrDBDnlM5E5oghMKzA6uT-m5BJBjTTz6ZfkV6PfVSjqXBvs4KN22fN-zObtj13Ap-42nMX4bi71DbPQHE2S-P34d3VMPXw0Pbc1jKGMGwZcPCI3BqHtq4AJLsgPeIqKfyWX0n-UT3ieRlujf3NrsawQ8lz8vxZ_c5zGBFIV28RCBKboljHlv6q6U5oLoF5rEwyMz0a1imjsNMKiQ1f30_9Y8ZE1CJiafhkcGJGVWHJE-RwEtU_z68RSOjy6Rj5zFliPSdMitcXewiyBnvc6oiTDRchy8SriKouv4CUbdX1q-MDz_5QL066BmRkZuSAqgFG6EkA4csdqSF2mSh_0zjum8OdbZDCsouKr3GckeDSq8SpVMu-La9nL0ESADi6uoKf2CXedYiaFqYL_X4grNJZHwJ3AfmgvtuQriwaAJB6rRS_NHC2PEDWo%3D)** Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. clean_body: Are you with George Soros?| | | | | | | | Peter,Seniors are under attack... Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—once the backbone of the conservative movement —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war!And I’m worried that it’s working... So today, I’m performing an EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS. ... Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+ —the only age group where his approval is negative.And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask... what on earth is going on?_Is it the Liberal Media? We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news , and the media has become an echo chamber for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House.Could it be the AARP? They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence? You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos.And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over 10 MILLION DOLLARS —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The AARP once even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine , calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators ” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time. ” My friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. Peter, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over. We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors. My friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation. Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movemen t...Where the liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family ... And where liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism ...I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either.AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans. But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you. So when you answer YES to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS ... When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to: Advocate for conservative values and policies Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism. And so much more. My friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS below. Thank you for standing strong.Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and we aren’t going anywhere. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. clean_body: I’m reaching out on behalf of my friend, Carol Obando-Derstine, who is running for Congress in PA-07. | = | Hi Peter, it’s Susan Wild. I’m reaching out on behalf of my friend, Carol Obando-Derstine, who is running for Congress in PA-07. I know how tough this race is going to be, and Carol can’t win it without you. = | = I know who Ryan Mackenzie is: an extremist career politician who parrots Trump’s talking points in order to secure millions in campaign funding from the NRCC and dark money groups. Ryan Mackenzie is willing to go to any length to make his billionaire donors happy. He even voted for Trump's Big Terrible Bill that will rip away healthcare from Pennsylvania families in order to cut taxes for the ultra-wealthy. = I know Carol, and she’s the right choice for our district. She is a natural-born bridge builder and community leader. Carol’s not a career politician: she’s a mother and an engineer who understands the issues facing our community. Our district is a special place. It deserves a representative that will stand up to special interests in Washington and fight for working families at home, just like how I did. Carol is more than up to the challenge – she’s ready to take on these battles and win. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan Wild * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Total Bowel Release
subject: Flush 12-15lbs of poop (MUST SEE)..
body:
It can result in an instantly flatter, more attractive belly...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21649/6374453/6599f726de33f593d53eb7e7357ddd4209fd2755/60c830583a216a07a945b71d2f96e7b3e6512b59)
---
| | |
---
_July 19th, 2025 at 06:24 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | Stop dieting.

No, seriously, do not ever try another diet again.

If you want to look and feel thinner almost instantly, just flush out the stuck poop the been building up in your gut.

No I am NOT talking about a colon cleanse!

Studies from recent ER visits show the average person is carrying around 12 to 17lbs of poop that's clinging to the walls of their gut and bowels...

And in some extreme cases up to a horrifying 25lbs of stuck poop in their gut...

Forming a giant “poop log” in the gut.

So even if you poop 2-3x per week, poop gradually clings to the walls of the guy and bowels causing your belly to stick out...

Adding pounds to the scale...

And causing gas, smelly farts and bloating.

ER doctor, Dr. Joseph Feuerstein was frustrated his patients couldn’t lose weight.

Plus diets and exercise weren’t working for many people and in some cases they even GAINED weight from diet and exercise.

Desperate for a solution, he found a hidden cause of weight gain and big belly related to poop buildup in the gut.

Working nights and weekends, he developed a powerful yet gentle **[“blue poo” tonic](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21649/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/60c830583a216a07a945b71d2f96e7b3e6512b59)** that can flush your bowels clean...

Leading to satisfying relief...

And the release of 12-17 pounds of stuck poop.

NO this does not involve a colon cleanse, fiber, laxatives or stool softeners.

This is something completely new and wasn’t even available in the USA until late 2023.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21649/6374453/6599f726de33f593d53eb7e7357ddd4209fd2755/60c830583a216a07a945b71d2f96e7b3e6512b59)
---
Yet it can result in an instantly flatter, more attractive belly...

Free from gas, bloating, indigestion...

And of course...

The newfound ability to fully empty your bowels every time you need to go to the bathroom.

Many people were SHOCKED at what this tonic caused to come out of their body...

But at the same time...

Happy with their instantly-flatter belly...

And the ability to enjoy activity and intimacy with their partners again without discomfort, gas, or bloating.

The best part?

Because this blue poo tonic normalizes your bowel movements...

You can enjoy any and all of your favorite foods... like pizza, cheeseburgers and shakes.

And STILL maintain a flatter belly – free of stuck poop!

Like Mildred from Orlando, Florida who said:

“I’d been dealing with stuck stool on and off for the last five years, this blue poo method helped me get back to the smooth, natural daily bowel movements I love and no more camping out on the toilet!”

==> [Click here to see how to get a flatter belly overnight by eliminating stuck poop!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21649/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/60c830583a216a07a945b71d2f96e7b3e6512b59)

The best part is...

This tonic is 100% natural...

And you can mix it from the comfort of your own home!

Ivy League doctors are stunned at how well this works better than any mainstream constipation solution.

Simply click [here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21649/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/60c830583a216a07a945b71d2f96e7b3e6512b59) to get the recipe now.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23202%2E4449941%2Ehzs9A-) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23202%2E4449941%2Ehzs9A-) [**Did you see Trump’s LATEST lies about President Biden? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64538?t=3&akid=23202%2E4449941%2Ehzs9A-) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64538?t=4&akid=23202%2E4449941%2Ehzs9A-) **REMINDER: in a little less than 6 months, Donald Trump has...**
* **DESTROYED** Social Security programs that Joe Biden expanded,
* **TRIED TO** gut Medicaid and other critical services in his so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill",
* **INSTITUTED** tax breaks for billionaires like Elon Musk,
* **FIRED** thousands of federal workers for no reasons,
* And so much more!

I don’t know about you, friend, but we miss President Biden! [**5,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Who is a better President? →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64538?t=5&akid=23202%2E4449941%2Ehzs9A-) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64538?t=6&akid=23202%2E4449941%2Ehzs9A-)
