name: Haley Stevens
subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
These aren’t just political talking points. They’re real concerns from real people.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3917?t=2&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now because I'm ready to ensure my hard work in the U.S. Senate continues to support Michigan's working families.
But with new polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight? My team set an ambitious goal to get 25,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 31% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3918?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3918?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3918?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3917?t=6&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=7&akid=392%2E49239%2EIvVwdM)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111765077/558320997/1981932150?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTM4MmI3NmQtYjk2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gyki4n29SrYPtzdTqb0YL8q8y0lGR4aT8TixW_dZjMA=)
**David Valadao thinks he can get away with it.** He’s been in Congress long enough to know the game. He votes however the MAGA crowd tells him to – gutting health care, and counting on the Central Valley not paying attention. He’s betting that no one will notice that over **65,000** people in CA-22 just lost their Medi-Cal coverage. He’s assuming that working families, kids, and seniors losing access to a doctor won’t raise a fuss. That no one will hold him accountable for putting politics over people’s lives. He’s daring us to prove him wrong. And I know we will. Because this campaign isn’t backed by corporate PACs or party insiders – it’s powered by real people. People who know what’s at stake when health care is ripped away. People who are ready to fight back. clean_body: | = David Valadao thinks he can get away with it. He’s been in Congress long enough to know the game. He votes however the MAGA crowd tells him to – gutting health care, and counting on the Central Valley not paying attention. He’s betting that no one will notice that over 65,000 people in CA-22 just lost their Medi-Cal coverage. He’s assuming that working families, kids, and seniors losing access to a doctor won’t raise a fuss. That no one will hold him accountable for putting politics over people’s lives. He’s daring us to prove him wrong. And I know we will. Because this campaign isn’t backed by corporate PACs or party insiders – it’s powered by real people. People who know what’s at stake when health care is ripped away. People who are ready to fight back. We can fire Valadao next November, but it’s going to come down to grassroots supporters like you, friend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy Villegas | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. Nikki is working day and night in Congress to protect working families in IL-13 and beyond. House Republicans are doing the exact opposite – using their majority to pass their Big Ugly Bill that will drive up prices, take away food assistance and health care, and make life harder for everyone BUT the top 1%.

Unlike them, Nikki believes that everyone should have access to lower health care costs, affordable services for their families, and be able to live with dignity.

body:
These red-to-blue races are key to building a new majority >>

| We couldn’t be more excited to announce the first endorsement slate of candidates for the 2026 midterm elections:

📍 **Christina Bohannan, IA 1st District** \- _Lost by fewer than 800 votes in 2024._

📍 **Rebecca Cooke, WI’s 3rd District** – _Came within just 3 points of winning last cycle._

📍**Janelle Stelson, PA’s 10th District** \- _Nearly unseated far-right Rep. Scott Perry in 2024 but lost by barely a percentage point in 2024!_

**[These are three of Democrats’ best red-to-blue opportunities nationwide, and early grassroots support could make all the difference. Chip in $10 now. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111765762/558322955/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzgyYjc2ZC1iOTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPXEib-ozU5h5ls4vWxVIzMIlj-rIM0DtkgiTpw4tzQ=)** | **[CHIP IN $10 TO HELP FLIP THESE CRITICAL SEATS FROM RED-TO-BLUE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111765763/558322956/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzgyYjc2ZC1iOTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPXEib-ozU5h5ls4vWxVIzMIlj-rIM0DtkgiTpw4tzQ=)**

These leaders are ready to bring practical, commonsense solutions to Washington as **they run in some of the most competitive red-to-blue races in the country.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111765764/558322957/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250719_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzgyYjc2ZC1iOTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPXEib-ozU5h5ls4vWxVIzMIlj-rIM0DtkgiTpw4tzQ=)**
**But here’s the reality:** Republicans are already spending millions to protect these seats — and they’re fighting to block our path to a new Democratic House majority!

That’s why early grassroots support from people like you is essential.

**When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.**

These words guided me throughout my life in public service, friend. I started the Dignity of Work PAC because we're not done yet.

No matter who you are, where you live or what kind of work you do, you deserve leaders who will fight for you at every level of government.**Together, we're going to make sure they get elected. But it's going to take all of us.**

I grew up in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. Back then, those were jobs you could depend on to build a good life for you and your family. But over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas, prices skyrocket as wages fail to keep up and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed.
I think we can all agree that the status quo isn't working. And Donald Trump's erratic economic policies are making things even worse. This country can – and must – do better.

**But to fuel the kind of transformative change our economy desperately needs – to ensure all work is valued and people benefit from the wealth they create – we need a national grassroots movement.**
**It starts with you, friend, here and now.[So please, will you chip in $5 or more to join our Dignity of Work movement and fight for a better future? We need 500 founding donors, and I'm counting on you to be one of them.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111765987/558323669/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk51-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2E2MDYyMS1iYTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PFbkXb5pAzRs53i6LYfz0N_IbJImx_qSYmc2aYFtxvk=)**

name: Team Schiff
subject: There’s no oversight for the president — yet.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8794%2E5257348%2E2fBOBd)
Derek,
It sounds unbelievable, but it’s true:
**The Executive Office of the President has no inspector general.**
That means there’s no independent watchdog over the Oval Office, no internal accountability, and no real oversight. That’s incredibly dangerous, especially when we’ve got a president who’s already shown he won’t hesitate to abuse his power for personal gain.
That’s why Adam Schiff has introduced the _Bringing Executive Accountability, Clarity, and Oversight Now (BEACON) Act_. The _BEACON Act_ would establish an inspector general to oversee the Executive Office of the President and finally bring real accountability where it’s been missing for far too long.
Inspectors general already play a crucial role throughout the federal government. They’re tasked with rooting out corruption, enforcing ethical standards, and exposing abuses of power. There’s no reason the White House should be exempt.
**If you believe the American people deserve transparency and oversight at the very top of government, we’re asking you to stand with us.**

clean_body: | Derek, It sounds unbelievable, but it’s true: The Executive Office of the President has no inspector general. That means there’s no independent watchdog over the Oval Office, no internal accountability, and no real oversight. That’s incredibly dangerous, especially when we’ve got a president who’s already shown he won’t hesitate to abuse his power for personal gain. That’s why Adam Schiff has introduced the Bringing Executive Accountability, Clarity, and Oversight Now (BEACON) Act. The BEACON Act would establish an inspector general to oversee the Executive Office of the President and finally bring real accountability where it’s been missing for far too long. Inspectors general already play a crucial role throughout the federal government. They’re tasked with rooting out corruption, enforcing ethical standards, and exposing abuses of power. There’s no reason the White House should be exempt. If you believe the American people deserve transparency and oversight at the very top of government, we’re asking you to stand with us. — Team Schiff | | 135 E. Dear Peter,
We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the new poll that came out this week measuring the California Governor race.
**The bad news:** It shows Republican Steve Hilton, a former Fox News host, leading the race.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Bidding FAREWELL to America’s Golden Age?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats.
- FROM THE DESK OF - Majority Leader Steve Scalise
* * *

Effective in less than two weeks, our Pro-Trump House Majority will go down to 219 seats. Don't forget: Our Majority is the FIRST LINE OF DEFENSE standing in the way of House Democrats having complete power to:

* Impeach President Trump
* Investigate Conservatives

There are three upcoming Special Elections THIS YEAR and one more on the horizon. Democrats are favored to win all of them. If Republicans fail to overperform here, we'll be closer than ever to surrendering control to the Democrats.

Our FIRST deadline since we missed our major FEC fundraising goal is only days away and we're pacing behind yet again. ## Call To Action
Today's call to action is to help your neighbor by raising your voice. While about ~35M U.S. households are eligible for federal energy assistance, only ~6.8M actually get the help they need. Now, Congress may cut that funding too, disproportionately harming the elderly and the disabled.
Help me [send 200+ letters](https://substack.com/redirect/7e54d832-a509-462f-b10b-8b0dacfa0ed4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Congress to DEMAND Congress protect energy assistance programs for low income Americans.
[Email Congress Here](https://substack.com/redirect/7e54d832-a509-462f-b10b-8b0dacfa0ed4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The above email takes 15 seconds to send. Let's raise our voices for our neighbors.

So she knows firsthand the importance small businesses have in our communities and also the challenges they face. **That’s why Janelle’s proud that three of her bipartisan bills that help small businesses get ahead passed the House!** Now, it’s up to the Senate to continue the work she started and pass these bills to support the businesses that drive our communities. **[Will you add your name to our petition today to show the Senate that there’s overwhelming support from people across the country to help small businesses succeed?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111767212/558327537/-612188750?refcode=email_071925_small-businesses&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjE2ZGE1M2EtYmM2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TFWHryWOG8EYe2zPijb1Tf16oGeid6swzyc9ZfMzMcs=&emci=259758d7-a562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b16da53a-bc64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14434323)** | | [Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111767213/558327538/-612188750?refcode=email_071925_small-businesses&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjE2ZGE1M2EtYmM2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TFWHryWOG8EYe2zPijb1Tf16oGeid6swzyc9ZfMzMcs=&emci=259758d7-a562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b16da53a-bc64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14434323)

Small businesses are the backbone of our communities, but all too often they get the short end of the stick.
That’s why Janelle helped pass the ELEVATE Act, which cuts through red tape that small businesses often face before they’ve even had a chance to get started. She also helped pass two other bills which focus on rural small businesses, making sure they have equal access to opportunities and capital.
If these bills pass the Senate, we have the opportunity to help small businesses and our communities thrive. **[So please, add your name and urge the Senate to support small businesses by passing these bipartisan bills →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111767214/558327539/-612188750?refcode=email_071925_small-businesses&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjE2ZGE1M2EtYmM2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TFWHryWOG8EYe2zPijb1Tf16oGeid6swzyc9ZfMzMcs=&emci=259758d7-a562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b16da53a-bc64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14434323)**

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Friend, I'm thrilled
body:
We're proud to be participating once again in the Democracy Summer fellowship, an opportunity to develop the leaders of tomorrow.

| |
---
Team, last year we participated in the Democracy Summer fellowship, a project started by Rep. Jamie Raskin to get young people involved in our work in Washington and develop the leaders, organizers, and activists of tomorrow. **It was a major success, and we're proud to be partnering with Rep. Raskin and the Democracy Summer program once again! ** Fellows will have the opportunity to learn the ins and outs of campaigning in one of the most consequential Congressional races in the nation. They'll get hands-on experience with phone-banking, text-banking, door-to-door canvassing, social media, fieldwork, and more. [**Friend, it's your support that enables us to participate in this transformative program. Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. clean_body: We're proud to be participating once again in the Democracy Summer fellowship, an opportunity to develop the leaders of tomorrow. | | Team, last year we participated in the Democracy Summer fellowship, a project started by Rep. Jamie Raskin to get young people involved in our work in Washington and develop the leaders, organizers, and activists of tomorrow. It was a major success, and we're proud to be partnering with Rep. Raskin and the Democracy Summer program once again! Fellows will have the opportunity to learn the ins and outs of campaigning in one of the most consequential Congressional races in the nation. They'll get hands-on experience with phone-banking, text-banking, door-to-door canvassing, social media, fieldwork, and more. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for your support. — Marcy | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a0ee086-1dd5-44f2-bfc0-910f174fb284/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | ICYMI: Ohio is prepping for a Special Senate Election! | Peter, we must act NOW to flip a key Senate seat blue. Ohio will have a special election to replace VP Vance. This is Democrats' chance to take his seat and weaken the MAGA majority! Ohio is rich with strong, working-class Democrats like Sherrod Brown, so we need to get to work right away if they're going to win! | | | | | It's now or never, Peter. We have a real chance to elect a working-class leader who will fight for our rights in the Senate. But the GOP is going to spend MILLIONS to protect their ultra-thin Senate majority. We need Democrats to come together and ensure Ohio has a BIG grassroots movement to combat their attacks. | | | | | Thank you, Blue Amp Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Sam
subject: Virginians are tired of talk. They want results.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
At this critical moment for the future of our Commonwealth and our country, we can't take anything for granted.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111768175/558330819/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyY2JkMDctYmU2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RBDOJraVXmgntj_WRVgfBSKwYVJhFFGQTJkYrK0R3j8=)
Peter, Sam here, Abigail's Campaign Manager. Here's what I hear all the time: Virginians are tired of talk. They want results.
_It's a lesson Abigail's opponent could afford to learn._
Now, I'm going to spend a few minutes laying out what the two nominees stand for in this election for Governor, the biggest race of 2025. **[Then I hope you'll make a small contribution so that our campaign can make sure voters understand what's at stake and vote accordingly.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111768176/558330820/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyY2JkMDctYmU2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RBDOJraVXmgntj_WRVgfBSKwYVJhFFGQTJkYrK0R3j8=)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111768177/558330821/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyY2JkMDctYmU2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RBDOJraVXmgntj_WRVgfBSKwYVJhFFGQTJkYrK0R3j8=)
---
A public servant should set their ego aside and focus on the problems affecting people.
_And that's what Abigail has done her entire career._
She kept Americans safe both as a federal law enforcement officer and as a case officer at CIA. And she was consistently ranked the most bipartisan Member of Congress from Virginia, sponsoring bills signed into law by Presidents from both parties, including ones that secured long-denied Social Security benefits for 50,000 of our public servants and cracked down on fentanyl trafficking.
**In this campaign, we've prioritized the number-one issue for Virginians: affordability.** We've rolled out plans to bring down the cost of housing, healthcare, energy, and childcare — and we have a bunch more coming soon.
Now, despite saying, "you cannot hide from your record," that's exactly what Winsome Earle-Sears has tried to do.
_Our opponent has carved out extreme positions and refused to answer for them._
She downplayed DOGE targeting the jobs of thousands of Virginia workers. She cheered on the state of Texas banning abortion after just six weeks of pregnancy, with no exceptions for victims of rape or incest. She boasted that Trump's tax bill, the law that eliminates $1 trillion from Medicaid and defunds public schools, does "so many great things."
Look, Virginians deserve leaders who focus more on governing than grandstanding, leaders who will stand up to Trump and not bow down to him.
**[If you agree, I'm counting on your $25 donation today to elect Abigail Spanberger. Your gift will enable us to set the record straight by putting more ads on the air and more organizers on the ground.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111768178/558330822/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyY2JkMDctYmU2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RBDOJraVXmgntj_WRVgfBSKwYVJhFFGQTJkYrK0R3j8=)**

clean_body: At this critical moment for the future of our Commonwealth and our country, we can't take anything for granted. = Peter, Sam here, Abigail's Campaign Manager. Here's what I hear all the time: Virginians are tired of talk. They want results. It's a lesson Abigail's opponent could afford to learn. Now, I'm going to spend a few minutes laying out what the two nominees stand for in this election for Governor, the biggest race of 2025. = = A public servant should set their ego aside and focus on the problems affecting people. And that's what Abigail has done her entire career. She kept Americans safe both as a federal law enforcement officer and as a case officer at CIA. And she was consistently ranked the most bipartisan Member of Congress from Virginia, sponsoring bills signed into law by Presidents from both parties, including ones that secured long-denied Social Security benefits for 50,000 of our public servants and cracked down on fentanyl trafficking. In this campaign, we've prioritized the number-one issue for Virginians: affordability. We've rolled out plans to bring down the cost of housing, healthcare, energy, and childcare — and we have a bunch more coming soon. Now, despite saying, "you cannot hide from your record," that's exactly what Winsome Earle-Sears has tried to do. Our opponent has carved out extreme positions and refused to answer for them. She downplayed DOGE targeting the jobs of thousands of Virginia workers. She cheered on the state of Texas banning abortion after just six weeks of pregnancy, with no exceptions for victims of rape or incest. She boasted that Trump's tax bill, the law that eliminates $1 trillion from Medicaid and defunds public schools, does "so many great things." Look, Virginians deserve leaders who focus more on governing than grandstanding, leaders who will stand up to Trump and not bow down to him. = = = = = = = Thanks for reading, Sam Campaign Manager By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

**\---------- Forwarded message from Gabe Vasquez ----------**
It’s Gabe Vasquez.
Last month, Republicans in Congress passed a bill that hands billionaires and big corporations massive tax breaks — leaving working families to pay the price.
Republicans knew this was wrong. They knew this piece of legislation was deeply unpopular, even with their own voters. But they did it anyway, because they serve Donald Trump and his wealthy friends, not everyday Americans.
And now, Mike Johnson and the GOP are doing everything they can to deflect from the consequences. The NRCC is ramping up its attacks on districts like ours — places they must win to keep control of the House and shield themselves from accountability.
They’re pouring NM-02 with dark money, attack ads, and outright lies — all designed to distract from the fact that they just sold out working families to benefit the rich.
**We cannot let them get away with this.**
[We’ve beaten them before, and with your help, we’ll do it again. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We’re not wasting any time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We’re organizing in every corner of Oregon — from the coast to the high desert.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111769983/558335938/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2RhMGJkMi1jMTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qnMWG5EL_LL4pyvTe4gi_CKQZlx4vanI2RqwxnZQWI=&emci=bfa7d3a1-e163-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=acda0bd2-c164-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | We just launched our campaign, and we're already in the fight. This race is about more than Oregon. It's about the future of our country. We're going up against Donald Trump and his cronies, who are doing everything they can to hold on to their Senate majority and ram their disastrous MAGA agenda through Congress. **That's why we're not wasting any time building a grassroots movement to take on the MAGA machine, fight for our progressive values, and retake the Democratic Senate Majority in 2025.** This race is how we build a better future together, and our work starts immediately. We're organizing in every corner of Oregon — from the Oregon Coast to the high desert of Eastern Oregon — and we need your support from the start. name: Alea Nadeem
subject: How my campaign is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alea for Congress
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/different-campaign-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

I don’t come from money. I don’t have the Washington Establishment
behind me.

What I do have is a deep love for this country, a fighting spirit, and
a fierce commitment to working families of Northwest Ohio like mine.

My mom and sister are electricians. My stepdad’s a welder. I was
raised to believe in hard work, honesty, and standing up for what’s
right.

THAT’S WHAT MY CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT.

Your voice deserves to be represented in Congress. The voices of real
Americans, not the corporate giants or the political elite.

If my message resonates with you, I hope you’ll consider making a
small contribution to power me in this mission:

[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/different-campaign-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

→ CHIP IN $5 TODAY
[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/different-campaign-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=5]

Every dollar helps me reach voters, amplify our voice, and continue
the fight for real people to be heard.

With gratitude,

[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/different-campaign-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Alea Nadeem

A NOTE FROM ALEA NADEEM

I love America — not just because I was born here, but because I
know what it’s like to live without freedom.

When I was only 8 years old, I was taken from my home in Ohio and left
behind in Iraq to live under Saddam Hussein’s brutal regime.

OVERNIGHT, I LOST THE FREEDOMS SO MANY OF US TAKE FOR GRANTED AND WAS
FORCED TO LIVE IN A COUNTRY WHERE WOMEN HAD NO RIGHTS, SPEAKING OUT
COULD COST YOU YOUR LIFE, AND YOUR FUTURE WAS NOT YOUR OWN.

When I finally made it back to America at 12 years old, I promised
myself I would give back to the country that never stopped fighting
for me. That’s why, after 9/11, I joined the Air Force.

For over 20 years, I have served this country in the Air Force and
rose to become a lieutenant colonel. I protected America’s interests
abroad, advised senior military leaders, and defended the freedoms too
many take for granted.

NOW, I’M TAKING THAT FIGHT TO WASHINGTON, AND YOUR DONATION OF ANY
AMOUNT WOULD MAKE A MEANINGFUL DIFFERENCE TO POWER ME IN THIS MISSION.
[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/alea-bio-footer-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

OUR ENEMIES ARE GROWING BOLDER.

OUR FREEDOMS ARE BEING ERODED.

WEAK LEADERS IN WASHINGTON HAVE FORGOTTEN WHAT IT MEANS TO SERVE.

_I haven’t._

I KNOW WHAT IT MEANS TO FIGHT FOR THIS COUNTRY, BECAUSE I’VE DONE IT
MY WHOLE LIFE.

That’s why I’m hoping I can count on your support. DONATE TODAY TO
SEND NEW REPUBLICAN LEADERSHIP TO CONGRESS AND EXPAND OUR MAJORITY.
[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/alea-bio-footer-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

DONATE TODAY
[https://secure.winred.com/alea-for-congress/alea-bio-footer-jm?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=jm&utm_campaign=20250717_diffcampaign_jm&utm_term=lrm-active]

Thank you for standing with me.
Alea Nadeem
Candidate for U.S. Congress

Paid for by Alea for Congress

_**The appearance of Alea Nadeem in military uniform does not imply or
constitute endorsement by the U.S. Air Force or U.S. Department of
Defense._

Privacy Policy [https://aleaforcongress.com/privacy-policy/]

3550 Executive Pkwy #7107, Toledo, OH 43606

[https://afc.campaignnucleus.com/js/email-editor/%unsubscribe_url%]

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=303577&trkid=785702071&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c934185-cce4-4ecc-9baa-b53ccae2a3a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This past Wednesday, I had the opportunity **[to testify to the House Homeland Security Committee](https://substack.com/redirect/d94cb085-d1a4-4eb8-94fd-5156dfb2ab9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to provide my insight and expertise on how non-governmental organizations used taxpayer money to make the Biden-Harris border crisis worse.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Hbu23ba-o3KGjhXqrnIYYRD-CKDhc5X0QPFB4XHC70E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168717516)
It is hard to believe that at this time last year, millions of illegal aliens had brazenly crossed our borders and were taking advantage of NGOs providing them a plethora of services using American tax dollars.
**[You can watch my full opening statement here:](https://substack.com/redirect/d94cb085-d1a4-4eb8-94fd-5156dfb2ab9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d94cb085-d1a4-4eb8-94fd-5156dfb2ab9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I told members of the committee the NGOs located along the border were often the first place processed migrants went to after being released by Border Patrol. These organizations helped the Biden-Harris administration avoid the bad optics of released migrants having to be on the street due to the large volume of overcrowding in certain sectors. Even with those efforts, the mass overcrowding still resulted in people sleeping on the streets, sometimes during the winter.
With the services such as transportation and shelter being guaranteed once they reached U.S. soil, illegal aliens had greater incentive to put their lives in danger by traversing through the Darien Gap and cartel-controlled territory in Mexico. One shelter in El Paso told me in 2023 around 80% of the women who came to them had been raped, sometimes in front of their children. This highlighted that despite the NGOs having the stated goal of helping these people, their "help" ends up harming the people who used their services. Yes, they made it to the U.S., but at what cost?
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Sponsored by AMAC](https://substack.com/redirect/6060adac-397d-47ba-84a6-ad65b9b17371?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Tired of AARP? There's a Better Option - And It's FREE](https://substack.com/redirect/6060adac-397d-47ba-84a6-ad65b9b17371?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6060adac-397d-47ba-84a6-ad65b9b17371?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **[FREE membership](https://substack.com/redirect/6060adac-397d-47ba-84a6-ad65b9b17371?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
👉 **[Join the movement today and claim your free membership here:](https://substack.com/redirect/6060adac-397d-47ba-84a6-ad65b9b17371?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Claim My Free Membership](https://substack.com/redirect/6060adac-397d-47ba-84a6-ad65b9b17371?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans.
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
The reason why it is important to hold the NGOs accountable for their role in that crisis is because they are part of the reason why there are riots in sanctuary cities today. President Trump campaigned and won on carrying out mass deportations and the American people wanted to undo the damage inflicted by the Biden-Harris administration.
NGOs have made an appearance at the recent unrest happening in Los Angeles County. A recent example of this is federal agents arresting four people for interfering with an operation by allegedly placing homemade spikes on the road with the intention to damage tires. On their person was a bag branded with the logo of the Coalition for Humane Immigrant Rights Los Angeles. I told Congress they need to look into whether NGOs are supporting people, directly or indirectly, who are interfering with federal operations. While taxpayer funds are on hold for now, it can be easily undone if a Democrat gets back into the White House.
How did Democrats react to my testimony and the testimony of the other witnesses invited by the committee? To start, many looked at their phones or notes while we talked during our opening statements. They went on to accuse us of attacking religious groups who were simply helping people in a time of need. Others brought up unrelated topics like the issue of flood insurance or just used the well-worn race card.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Hbu23ba-o3KGjhXqrnIYYRD-CKDhc5X0QPFB4XHC70E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168717516)
In true Washington, D.C. fashion, they also brought up motions to subpoena different members of the Trump administration to grind the proceedings to a slow crawl. They wanted to waste time instead of hearing about how NGOs participated in what amounted to human trafficking. The hearing started at 10:00 AM and was supposed to end at 1:00 PM, but due to the delay tactics, the hearing did not finish until it was almost 5:00 PM.
To make it clear, we mentioned the NGOs, some of whom happened to have a religious affiliation, because they were directly involved by taking taxpayer money by the millions to make the problem worse. Catholic Charities was one of the biggest NGOs along the border in Texas. I saw how Border Patrol dropped off recent illegal border crossers by the busload at CC's center in downtown McAllen. It worked like an assembly line. It went on and on for four years.
I understand how most Americans view Congressional hearings as a waste of time that doesn't solve much of anything these days, but I testified because I wanted to put my years-long work into the public record. It might help prevent something like this from happening again or it might not, but I did what I could, then and now, to address the problem.

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: 22 years of nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111770551/558337693/-1591572682?refcode=250719_MFC_Annie_22YearsOfNothing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTRlZTYxNi1jMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8c73HHW0hSqZbhwqxLmXXJupYsVUeIqHW4A1f-pRX28=) Friend, I’m Dr. Annie Andrews, a pediatrician, a mom of three, and the Democrat running for U.S. Senate to defeat Republican Lindsey Graham in South Carolina. If we flip this seat, we can end Lindsey Graham’s career and help Democrats retake the Senate, and expand the map for Democrats in future elections I know this won’t be easy. But I’ve treated kids who were shot, hospitalized, and failed by broken systems. Nothing about this moment feels optional. [**We need an overwhelming surge of grassroots support in these early days to prove that we can finally defeat Lindsey Graham. So I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in a split donation of $50, $25, or even a $3 donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign before midnight to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111770552/558337694/1094341437?refcode=250719_MFC_Annie_22YearsOfNothing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTRlZTYxNi1jMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8c73HHW0hSqZbhwqxLmXXJupYsVUeIqHW4A1f-pRX28=) Let me introduce myself. I’ve spent nearly 20 years serving my community as a pediatrician, treating everything from asthma and violent trauma to the emotional toll of growing up in poverty. I’ve seen what bad policy does to good families — and I’ve seen kids suffer because people like Lindsey Graham would rather protect their own power than protect children. In 2022, after 15 years of working in hospitals, I ran for Congress because I knew our kids needed a voice in Washington. I lost — and I told my oldest daughter I wouldn’t run again. But then Trump’s chaos came back. And Lindsey Graham? He cheered. The truth is, I’m scared. And I’m angry. And I’m done waiting. So I’m stepping up — because our kids, and this country can’t afford another six years of Lindsey Graham. I’m building a people-powered campaign to flip South Carolina and give kids the voice they deserve. And I need your help. [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111770553/558337695/-1591572682?refcode=250719_MFC_Annie_22YearsOfNothing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTRlZTYxNi1jMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8c73HHW0hSqZbhwqxLmXXJupYsVUeIqHW4A1f-pRX28=) Thank you — from the bottom of my heart. This campaign is for the kids, but it only works with you in it. Until the kids are alright, Dr. Annie Andrews
Democratic Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: asking for your input, because I’m still in this fight for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
It’s been two weeks since Republicans rammed through their cruel budget through Congress, but I refuse to give in to despair.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111770786/558338375/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBmMzI3Yy1jMzY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bk1ZFf2CbJwBpS-dw4tA0mD7jQVH5714Of8_biDxIfc=) Team, I know it’s easy to feel demoralized right now. It’s been two weeks since Republicans rammed their cruel budget — _that rips away health care and food assistance from millions of Americans to pay for a billionaire tax cut_ — through Congress, but this fight is far from over, and I refuse to give in to despair. Because no matter which battles we lose, I’ll _never_ pack up and quit. **I’m going to keep fighting to defend working families and deliver real solutions to the biggest challenges facing us today,_because that’s what the people of Oregon’s 6th elected me to do._** I’m still doing everything I can in Congress to protect access to affordable health care, safeguard reproductive rights, take on America’s mental health crisis, _and more._ **[And I’m reaching out again to ask for your input, because as the political landscape is constantly shifting, I want to make sure I stay focused on the most important challenges facing you and your family. So please, will you take a moment to fill out our updated Priorities Survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111770787/558338376/-824745931?refcode=email_071925_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBmMzI3Yy1jMzY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bk1ZFf2CbJwBpS-dw4tA0mD7jQVH5714Of8_biDxIfc=&emci=8eece9bd-e763-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f80f327c-c364-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5643047)** | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111770788/558338377/-824745931?refcode=email_071925_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODBmMzI3Yy1jMzY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bk1ZFf2CbJwBpS-dw4tA0mD7jQVH5714Of8_biDxIfc=&emci=8eece9bd-e763-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f80f327c-c364-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5643047)**
---
Thank you,

clean_body: It’s been two weeks since Republicans rammed through their cruel budget through Congress, but I refuse to give in to despair. = Team, I know it’s easy to feel demoralized right now. It’s been two weeks since Republicans rammed their cruel budget — that rips away health care and food assistance from millions of Americans to pay for a billionaire tax cut — through Congress, but this fight is far from over, and I refuse to give in to despair. Because no matter which battles we lose, I’ll never pack up and quit. I’m going to keep fighting to defend working families and deliver real solutions to the biggest challenges facing us today,because that’s what the people of Oregon’s 6th elected me to do. I’m still doing everything I can in Congress to protect access to affordable health care, safeguard reproductive rights, take on America’s mental health crisis, and more. | | Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: David Hogg
subject: Reset
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
There’s no way around it.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250719-1&t=1&akid=2406%2E587540%2EHB7HhM)
Peter,
I know a lot of groups are asking you for money right now, even at a time when it seems like the Democratic Party is failing to win or deliver. I know it can be frustrating if you’re chipping in, but you aren’t seeing the results you want to see.
**Here’s what’s different about Leaders We Deserve:** We are recruiting a brand new wave of young leaders to come in and fight the worst of Trump’s agenda AND show the positive, youthful, and modern direction we want for the party’s future.
Think of it this way, Peter – **_this is our chance to reset the Democratic Party._**
But there’s no way around it. We cannot do this work without grassroots support.
Unlike the other side, we don’t have a legion of corporatist billionaires ready to finance our efforts. There is no one waiting in the wings with a $5 million check.
Instead, we’re building this movement with _$5, $10, and $25_ at a time. (Some folks may give more when they’re able – and at the end of the day, it all really adds up.)
That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need people like you – people who understand that the Democratic Party needs a reset – to join us in the fight.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reset the Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250719_1_reset?refcode=em20250719-2406&amount=5&refcode2=2406_587540_HB7HhM&akid=2406%2E587540%2EHB7HhM)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250719_1_reset?amount=5&refcode=em20250719-2406&refcode2=2406_587540_HB7HhM&akid=2406%2E587540%2EHB7HhM)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250719-1&t=2&refcode2=2406_587540_HB7HhM&akid=2406%2E587540%2EHB7HhM)**

name: House DFL
subject: Hey, we want to hear from you today!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Hi there,
There must be a lot on your mind these days. How could there not be, with the rollercoaster that is following the news?
In light of our shared challenges, the House DFL is more committed than ever to win back a majority to protect our state from Trump and the extreme ideas of Minnesota Republicans. As we relaunch our campaign plans, and a special election effort, we would like to hear from you.
Please take this 2-minute survey to let us know what’s on your mind and what’s most important to you for the next election. Click here to get started. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ux8Kbbqb5Ear7m-wZtm8PQ2]
START THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ux8Kbbqb5Ear7m-wZtm8PQ2]
In 2024, we saw historic levels of support from DFLers across the state. While we might not have gotten the exact result we wanted, we know that everything we did accomplish was possible because of people like you who got involved.
We want to hear from you now to build on that energy and show Republicans in Minnesota and DC that they are no match for this grassroots team. Share your thoughts with us today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ux8Kbbqb5Ear7m-wZtm8PQ2]
START THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ux8Kbbqb5Ear7m-wZtm8PQ2]
Thank you,
House DFL

We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-june25?refcode=061225]

name: Team Kelly
subject: Do you have ONE MINUTE to read this?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’ve been emailing a bit more this month, and we think you deserve an explanation why.
#

Friends — this is only going to take a minute of your time.
We’ve been emailing a bit more this month, and we think you deserve an explanation why.
Simply put, we’ve fallen behind. Here’s what our fundraising over the last three months looks like:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250719-1-f&t=1&akid=6126%2E6688874%2E3sJA3h)
June dropped off from May, and July is falling way short of June. That trendline isn’t good.
Look, the sky isn’t going to fall if you don’t chip in today. We’re not writing to scare you into donating. This isn’t that kind of email.
But to ensure Mark has all the resources he needs to be a highly effective and aggressive leader standing up to Trump, we do need to ask for a donation from time to time. Running this kind of operation isn’t cheap, and we’re continuously spending down our reserves to keep it going.
[**So, if you can truly afford it, and you care about Mark, we’re humbly requesting that you donate to keep him in this fight. It would mean a lot.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250719-1-f&t=2&akid=6126%2E6688874%2E3sJA3h)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250719-1-f&t=3&akid=6126%2E6688874%2E3sJA3h)**
Thank, we really appreciate you reading this.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6126%2E6688874%2E3sJA3h).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:
I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111771225/558339729/1328794144?refcode=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2ZkMTBhLWM0NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ps4z6YVZK2D570hl28nAXSGlX5GNqV-3DnBVy3FmCe0=&emci=2332b020-fd63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111771226/558339730/2105508926?refcode=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2ZkMTBhLWM0NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ps4z6YVZK2D570hl28nAXSGlX5GNqV-3DnBVy3FmCe0=) Hey there, it’s Mary Trump. You probably know me as the niece of Donald Trump — the twice-impeached, convicted felon who also happens to be President of the United States. I truly believe few people know my uncle better than I do. I’ve watched him lie incessantly, exploit his power, and push this country closer to authoritarianism. Amidst all of the chaos he creates, it’s easy to forget the pain he’s caused, but what scares me even more? He’s not doing any of these things alone. There’s an entire army of MAGA Republicans — in Congress, in statehouses, in places they hope we aren’t paying attention to — working with billionaire donors and Big Oil to drag us backward on everything from the books our kids can read to the air we breathe. And the effects are everywhere. We feel it in the record-breaking heat. We see it in the wildfires, the floods, and the rising toll on frontline communities. And still, too many leaders in Washington act like we have time to spare. **That’s why the work that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is doing is so important. Their mission is simple: Invest in those leaders brave enough to stand up to polluters, authoritarians, and extremists alike.** These races might not make national headlines, but trust me, they are on the frontlines of the fight for our future. And I’m proud to stand with them. This work is powered by ordinary individuals doing extraordinary things. **So today, I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of.** **[Can I count on you to join me in supporting the Jane Fonda Climate PAC by chipping in $5 before midnight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111771227/558339731/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2ZkMTBhLWM0NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ps4z6YVZK2D570hl28nAXSGlX5GNqV-3DnBVy3FmCe0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111771228/558339732/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2ZkMTBhLWM0NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ps4z6YVZK2D570hl28nAXSGlX5GNqV-3DnBVy3FmCe0=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111771229/558339733/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a9cfd10a-c464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Y2ZkMTBhLWM0NjQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ps4z6YVZK2D570hl28nAXSGlX5GNqV-3DnBVy3FmCe0=)

clean_body: I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of. | = Hey there, it’s Mary Trump. You probably know me as the niece of Donald Trump — the twice-impeached, convicted felon who also happens to be President of the United States. I truly believe few people know my uncle better than I do. I’ve watched him lie incessantly, exploit his power, and push this country closer to authoritarianism. Amidst all of the chaos he creates, it’s easy to forget the pain he’s caused, but what scares me even more? He’s not doing any of these things alone. There’s an entire army of MAGA Republicans — in Congress, in statehouses, in places they hope we aren’t paying attention to — working with billionaire donors and Big Oil to drag us backward on everything from the books our kids can read to the air we breathe. And the effects are everywhere. We feel it in the record-breaking heat. We see it in the wildfires, the floods, and the rising toll on frontline communities. And still, too many leaders in Washington act like we have time to spare. That’s why the work that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is doing is so important. Their mission is simple: Invest in those leaders brave enough to stand up to polluters, authoritarians, and extremists alike. These races might not make national headlines, but trust me, they are on the frontlines of the fight for our future. And I’m proud to stand with them. This work is powered by ordinary individuals doing extraordinary things. So today, I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’ve seen time and again that candidates who reject Big Oil are the same ones defending reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, public education, and so much more. It’s up to us, all of us, to meet this moment with the urgency it demands and help elect the next generation of climate leaders. Thank you for everything, Mary Trump | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. **GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771458/558340399/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=&emci=747cda6a-c564-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=08f90b71-c564-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)
Peter, This past month has been a reminder of why I’m in this fight: to flip this seat and build something better. I’ve had the pleasure to meet people who are tired of the dysfunction and ready for real representation, and every day we’re getting closer to bringing locally-focused, working-class leadership to Congress. Below are a few recent highlights from the trail that I wanted to share with you. But first, I just want to say thank you, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going, and I’m more confident than ever that we can win. Thank you, Rebecca | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771459/558340400/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)****
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771460/558340401/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)
From La Farge to Ontario to Galesville, **I celebrated the 4th of July with folks across the district.** We’re grateful for those who have fought for our freedoms — and committed to protecting the freedoms still under attack today.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771461/558340402/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)
**I joined Ali Velshi on MSNBC** to call out Van Orden’s disgraceful vote that threatens rural hospitals and healthcare access across Wisconsin. While he serves Trump and billionaire donors, I’ll fight to protect care for working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771462/558340403/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)
**Backyard conversations in Prairie du Chien** — Van Orden’s hometown — were filled with energy and determination. Folks there are ready to organize and flip this seat from chaos to Cooke.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771463/558340404/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)
**We caught up with some farm friends** and reminisced about days of showing cattle at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. Great to catch up with folks still carrying on this tradition.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771464/558340405/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)
**Ice cream, for breakfast? You bet.** Another dairy first day in WI-3, and a beautiful morning at Sundae on the Farm in Jackson County. Thanks to the Prindle Family for hosting!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771465/558340406/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)
**And finally, a few days ago we spent part of Sunday at Wisconsin's Biggest Little Fair in Gilmanton.** My family settled nearby in Lookout back in the 1800s, so it was a powerful reminder of how deep our rural roots run. Small town, big heart.
Everywhere I go, I see it: **People are ready for a change in WI-03** , and they’re ready to send a working-class voice to Congress who fights for them, not the elites.
**[If you can, will you chip in $3 today to help us keep this momentum going and flip WI-03 for working people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111771466/558340407/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGY5MGI3MS1jNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVcer_JkrAnY4brHNg8fJkPxwVyWojc-J70OHPfPDKM=)**

clean_body: | Peter, This past month has been a reminder of why I’m in this fight: to flip this seat and build something better. I’ve had the pleasure to meet people who are tired of the dysfunction and ready for real representation, and every day we’re getting closer to bringing locally-focused, working-class leadership to Congress. Below are a few recent highlights from the trail that I wanted to share with you. But first, I just want to say thank you, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going, and I’m more confident than ever that we can win. Thank you, Rebecca | **= = From La Farge to Ontario to Galesville, I celebrated the 4th of July with folks across the district. We’re grateful for those who have fought for our freedoms — and committed to protecting the freedoms still under attack today. = I joined Ali Velshi on MSNBC to call out Van Orden’s disgraceful vote that threatens rural hospitals and healthcare access across Wisconsin. While he serves Trump and billionaire donors, I’ll fight to protect care for working families. = Backyard conversations in Prairie du Chien — Van Orden’s hometown — were filled with energy and determination. Folks there are ready to organize and flip this seat from chaos to Cooke. = We caught up with some farm friends and reminisced about days of showing cattle at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. Great to catch up with folks still carrying on this tradition. = Ice cream, for breakfast? You bet. Another dairy first day in WI-3, and a beautiful morning at Sundae on the Farm in Jackson County. Thanks to the Prindle Family for hosting! = And finally, a few days ago we spent part of Sunday at Wisconsin's Biggest Little Fair in Gilmanton. My family settled nearby in Lookout back in the 1800s, so it was a powerful reminder of how deep our rural roots run. Small town, big heart. Everywhere I go, I see it: People are ready for a change in WI-03 , and they’re ready to send a working-class voice to Congress who fights for them, not the elites. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** Thank you for being a part of this movement. Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI 54702 United States

name: Hickenlooper HQ
subject: [PETITION] Save Colorado’s schools!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Without notice, Trump froze $6.8 BILLION dollars in education grants just hours before the funding was set to disburse.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111772433/558344012/1435897075?refcode=email_071925_grants&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDNhOWJhNi1jOTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xxcac4i3Y1v-VUKHku-jPhVifnvrgFFG8CQgEn6-8Fw=&emci=4ce869ed-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a03a9ba6-c964-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) Folks, the Trump administration is holding critical education funding for Colorado’s kids hostage — _and it’s already wreaking havoc in school districts across the state._ Without notice, Trump’s Department of Education froze $6.8 BILLION in education grants — _including $80 million slated for programs here in Colorado_ — just hours before the funding was set to disburse. **These funds were previously approved by Congress — _and signed into law by Trump himself._ **Now, Colorado school districts are left scrambling to save educational programs and retain staff as they face an unexpected budget gap just weeks before schools are set to reopen in the Fall. **That means Colorado schools might have to reduce hours, teachers could abruptly lose their jobs, and students could even lose access to essential programs if Trump refuses to release this critical funding.** It’s not just outrageous, _it’s downright cruel._ **And we REFUSE to let the White House get away with this illegal scheme when our kids’ education is on the line.[If you’re with us, please, sign our petition and help us dial up the pressure on the Trump administration to release this critical funding NOW before it’s too late. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111772434/558344013/-1990951100?refcode=email_071925_grants&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDNhOWJhNi1jOTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xxcac4i3Y1v-VUKHku-jPhVifnvrgFFG8CQgEn6-8Fw=&emci=4ce869ed-4b63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a03a9ba6-c964-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715)** name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trump is putting medical debt back on credit reports
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump’s decision to re-add it to credit reports will punish millions of Americans for having cancer, caring for a sick kid, or going to the ER. It’s not right, and it’s going to ruin people's lives.
#

Peter, Trump just re-added medical debt to your credit report.
Back in January, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau finalized a rule that took people’s medical debt off of their credit report.
Then, Trump took a chainsaw to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and installed the literal author of Project 2025 as the guy in charge of it.
And earlier this week, Trump and his cronies at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau decided to kill that rule. Medical debt is back on credit reports.
Just about half of all medical bills have at least one error in them. People get the wrong bills all the time, and when that happens they’re the ones who have to deal with the consequences — not the health care providers, not the CEOs, not the billionaire board members.
This just happened to me. I had to fight a $1700 medical bill that should’ve been covered by my health care for half a year. Then, when they agreed it should be covered, they STILL sent me to collections over it. I’m lucky to be able to cover this now, but back when I was a kid it’s the kind of thing that would have bankrupted our family.
**Medical debt doesn’t tell you if someone is financially irresponsible. It tells you they got sick.**
Trump’s decision to re-add it to credit reports will punish millions of Americans for having cancer, caring for a sick kid, or going to the ER. It’s not right, and it’s going to ruin people's lives.
It’s going to take a big fight to get Trump and MAGA out of power, but we’ll do it — mark my words.
When we do, we’ve got a big job ahead of us. Trump’s done huge damage already but if he can tear it down, we can build it back up. A huge part of that is going to be reforming this broken system so we can help families get the health care they need at prices they can afford.
We’ve got to show up, do the work, and help people.
If we can’t, we don’t deserve power.
Hope you’re with me on that, Peter.
Ruben

**🚨 Please — just one more minute 🚨**
This is not a fundraising email, and we don’t expect you to donate. But if you appreciate what Ruben’s doing, we are not going to stop you from making a donation.
This work doesn’t come cheap, and we truly appreciate anything you send Ruben’s way.
[**So, if you can, make a grassroots donation and help power Ruben’s fight by using this link.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250718-1-160&t=1&akid=3923%2E734936%2EKux8mr)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250718-1-160&t=2&akid=3923%2E734936%2EKux8mr)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
