name: Christina Gagnier
subject: Following up with Peter
body:
|
#
I am following up on something important to me, Peter.

Instead of asking you to donate to my campaign, I am asking you to sign on as an official endorser. This is a key moment to show we have the power of the people on our side.

While we received hundreds of endorsements from across Orange County, the Inland Empire, and beyond, our records show that we have not received your signature of support.

**[Will you add your name to grow this grassroots movement, then let me explain why this matters right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776572/558359197/-354101504?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432)**
| | [Endorse Christina](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776574/558359199/-354101504?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432)
---

I am lacing up my sneakers and getting to work. A few days ago, I held one of many planned meet and greets as part of my Big Ideas and Ballots Opportunity Tour across the district to listen and engage with voters and spread the word about this campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776576/558359201/-354101504?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432)
Folks are deeply concerned about my opponent Young Kim’s betrayal of our communities. She continues to put the MAGA agenda ahead of the people she swore to represent.

The good news is that with enough momentum, we have an opportunity to unseat her and flip the House majority blue. But it starts now, with over a year until Election Day, building our coalition of supporters with people like you.

**[Will you join the fight by adding your name today? Young Kim is vulnerable, and I am the only candidate in this race with the experience of going toe-to-toe with MAGA.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776578/558359203/-354101504?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432)**
| [Endorse Christina](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776580/558359206/-354101504?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432)
---

Thank you,

Christina
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776583/558359235/-348090832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776586/558359265/-1409519028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776589/558359268/-527287315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432) Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. To support Christina's campaign [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776591/558359271/-1077542604?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=) To volunteer on Christina's campaign, [sign up to volunteer here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776593/558359276/1911059267?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432)

To receive fewer emails from Christina Gagnier's campaign, sign up for our [less email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111776598/558359280/1405040789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzgwNWExNC1kYjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dv7udKq0m-YU_2kzO23tud0gMlOnsNxqYdcu0qgaZxw=&emci=57a0070e-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cc805a14-db64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31246432) option here. name: Benson HQ
subject: Hey — did you see Jocelyn’s email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)
Hi Team,
Did you see Jocelyn’s message earlier this week? She talked about what’s at stake in this race and about how the choices we make right now will shape what Michigan looks like for our kids, our communities, and our future.
This campaign is about making sure Michigan remains a place where families can thrive, where good jobs are within reach for all, and where the next generation wants to build a life.
But if we want to make that vision a reality, we need a major groundswell of grassroots support ahead of our public fundraising deadline this Sunday. [**We just need one final push to get over the finish line. Will you pitch in today to help us close the gap?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)**
| [DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)
---
\--------Forwarded message--------
From: Jocelyn Benson
Date: Wed, Jul 16, 2025 at 5:14 PM
Subject: Do you remember my son?
Hey Team — You might remember my son, who sometimes comes with me to events. He is 9 now, but in less than a decade, he’ll be 18 and making decisions about his future, where he wants to live, and where he wants to work.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)
Everything we do in this next decade will define his childhood, his future, and the future of our loved ones all across Michigan. I want him to be confident that Michigan is the best place to grow up, raise a family, find a good job, and build a life worth being proud of.
I believe we all want our loved ones to be happy, healthy, safe, and nearby. And the decisions we make over the next 10 years will directly determine not just my son's future, but the future of kids all throughout our country.
And so I come into this campaign with a sense of urgency.
This campaign is about creating a Michigan where our children and grandchildren will grow up in safe neighborhoods, find jobs they love, and have the chance to build lives they’re proud of in the communities that raised them.
**That’s what we’re fighting for. But we have a big challenge ahead. Our most important fundraising deadline yet is just 4 days away, and we need major resources to keep this grassroots movement strong.[ Will you chip in today to help us meet that deadline and keep fighting for a better Michigan? ](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ncJ1B1&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q32025._u867d&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q32025.vCRznT&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q32025.koEtbW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=529%2E181023%2E8dv7x_)

Together, we can make Michigan the best place to be a kid, to raise a kid, and to call home.
Thank you for standing with me,
Jocelyn

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Together, we can make Michigan the best place to be a kid, to raise a kid, and to call home. Thank you for standing with me, Jocelyn

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
We're going all in again!
GOTV PAC is launching an aggressive push to flip every single competitive seat in the Virginia House of Delegates this year, and we want to tell you about two of the most dangerous Republicans standing in the way:
🟥 Mark Earley Jr. — an entrenched anti- abortion and birth control advocate who voted against a bill that would recognize a fundamental right to access contraceptives.
🟥 Michael Lamonea — A former ICE official who will make supporting Donald Trump's unaccountable police force a top priority in Virginia.
Virginians deserve better than this extremism.
With your help, GOTV PAC is investing in voter outreach that we need to flip these seats and more.

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: Another MAGA Republican just entered the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Peter, Mazie here! Rep. Chris Pappas is running for Senate in New Hampshire and he needs your support. Please read his team’s message below._
* * *
Big news, Peter: **Another Republican just entered the primary for New Hampshire’s Senate seat.** He’s another Trump rubber stamp — he even refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. That means Scott Brown and the growing GOP field will be facing off to see who can appease the MAGA loyalists the most and earn Donald Trump’s endorsement in this race. While the Republicans wade through their messy primary, **Chris Pappas is focused on what really matters — standing up for Granite Staters and fighting for our future.** Chris has won competitive elections in New Hampshire _four times in a row_. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: This is about control.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777009/558361028/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmQ1YmRhZi1lMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZ3L2fcP-Dg9LFA2YV8ZRJmzX1AL3eDJ6kYsA_GnJWU=&emci=0a8fce00-3563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0bd5bdaf-e064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---
I’ve been thinking a lot lately about what it means to raise a family in this country right now, Peter.

To be a doctor. To be a mom. To be a woman watching what’s happening to reproductive rights across America, and to see how quietly, and dangerously, those rights are being stripped away by politicians who think they know better.

Ever since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ we’ve seen state after state pass cruel, dangerous abortion bans, some with _zero_ exceptions for rape, incest, or even when a woman’s life is at risk. Nearly half of U.S. states have now banned or severely restricted abortion care. And in many places, doctors are terrified to provide lifesaving treatment for fear of legal action against them, while women are being forced to travel hundreds of miles for basic healthcare.

With Trump’s return to the Oval Office, and with extreme Republicans controlling Congress, **the attacks haven’t just resumed—they’ve escalated.**
* **$65.8 million in Title X family planning funds have been frozen,** putting care for over 846,000 low-income patients in 23 states at risk.

* **Trump signed an executive order bringing back dangerous gag rules** for doctors and cutting off global health funding to any group that even talks about abortion.

* **And most importantly, Trump’s so-called 'Big Beautiful Bill' just cut all federal funding for Planned Parenthood** – something the GOP has been aiming to do for years.

Peter, Republicans aren’t even trying to hide just how extreme they’ve become.

I became a doctor because I wanted to take care of people. I became a mom because I believed in building a family in a country where rights and freedoms would be protected—for my generation, for my son, and for every child growing up today— _and I ran for Congress because I knew those rights were under attack._

**I refuse to accept a future where some Americans have rights and others do not. Where my friends, my colleagues, my patients, and the people of WA-08 have to live in fear about whether they’ll be able to get the care they need to thrive, and even survive.**

This fight is personal, and it’s far from over.

We have to elect leaders who will stand up to these relentless, calculated attacks on reproductive freedom in Congress, in statehouses, in governors’ offices, and in the White House. We need to protect and expand access to care, restore funding to trusted providers, and pass protections that guarantee the right to make personal healthcare decisions, no matter where you live, what you believe, or who you are.

Always in solidarity,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777010/558361029/-2027950711?refcode=em25_250719_aborti_enask_gq_act___DRKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250719_aborti_enask_gq_act___DRKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0bd5bdaf-e064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmQ1YmRhZi1lMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZ3L2fcP-Dg9LFA2YV8ZRJmzX1AL3eDJ6kYsA_GnJWU=)

name: Derek Tran
subject: 3_seats.gif
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777317/558362173/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTljMWUxODUtZTM2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sXQj6gR20Y47PWVo6u1Mvmq_aG-IVU6S-ZXSY-pouM=)
I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I couldn’t stop thinking about this key fact in our race.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777318/558362174/1527952032?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTljMWUxODUtZTM2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sXQj6gR20Y47PWVo6u1Mvmq_aG-IVU6S-ZXSY-pouM=)
Just three seats (out of 435!) separate control of the House. I know you’ve heard it a lot from me (and certainly other political candidates) – but the future of our nation depends on the outcome.

**Here’s something other political candidates _can’t_ say: The majority could come down to this seat.**

CA-45 is one of the only races already ranked as a pure toss-up by experts. I flipped this seat by 653 votes, and you can bet it will come down to the wire again.

Republicans are rallying their base _right now_ to expand their majority and give Trump a free pass to continue decimating our democracy. They’ve already gutted health care funding and SNAP in exchange for tax relief for literal billionaires, and it hasn’t even been six months with him in office.

I’m fighting back as best as I can, but without control of the House, there’s a limit to what we as Democrats can do to stop it. It’s why we need to protect this seat, flip the House, and provide real accountability.

**[So before you get back to your summer weekend, I’m asking you to chip in $3 to keep me in Congress. It’s no exaggeration to say it could all come down to this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777319/558362175/1527952032?refcode=em-7.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTljMWUxODUtZTM2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0sXQj6gR20Y47PWVo6u1Mvmq_aG-IVU6S-ZXSY-pouM=)**

clean_body: | = I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I couldn’t stop thinking about this key fact in our race. = Just three seats (out of 435!) separate control of the House. I know you’ve heard it a lot from me (and certainly other political candidates) – but the future of our nation depends on the outcome. Here’s something other political candidates can’t say: The majority could come down to this seat. CA-45 is one of the only races already ranked as a pure toss-up by experts. I flipped this seat by 653 votes, and you can bet it will come down to the wire again. Republicans are rallying their base right now to expand their majority and give Trump a free pass to continue decimating our democracy. They’ve already gutted health care funding and SNAP in exchange for tax relief for literal billionaires, and it hasn’t even been six months with him in office. I’m fighting back as best as I can, but without control of the House, there’s a limit to what we as Democrats can do to stop it. It’s why we need to protect this seat, flip the House, and provide real accountability. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. subject: I’m humbly asking you.

Good afternoon Peter,

**It 's Coach Tommy Tuberville.** You might know me as the former head football coach of Auburn University or as the current Senator from the great state of Alabama.

But right now, I've got an important message for you.

[**I’m humbly asking you to support the leaders of the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) Movement as we fight to build a healthy, more prosperous future for all Americans. If you could, just take a couple of minutes to read what I have to say. The future of America is on the line.**](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=816174fd16814587aca7366c55467c2b&_e=liAW1V18rC57FCJOcOmrE3suAFzDkezgqeQX_JS04tPO3Ry0EfgRmIRVLfx01LfnYl8tkC00QCWls-tYGIH2HnhH8Ti3jMfbmu9RsJWRjjch1TKjM0qAZLL5SU5fWFChRZ3C0bnzfQAXAeO3eb6iSZyLNCOogFQW2udpf6oLuFRqyW9VmpjQFugHqRfDZsi0ICbbexfs4fcfmHmjLeT66nbUdpyUhxe1YMNc7jO_H1WPxC_rSt7Ieq7ibZFd9KQ0RdqxAiERf9sYvKW-eNiq3YdvHH172j-zYnj4QEV0w6We5du5XPF7wDhtb4HHdteuqGcCmtv3eBsUFyHAGYFCd_mL8kB4DnubnUxPHyt7DKPK-tMO4ebX6RjTV1Ex89RgBXULMJcWjeo6j7Goi6IGoQPlLVi-mICJXX6LzwUsUW3wK3RZmV0chVnG70yO3jmm-v1Nx_iPBOSPf-AzxHLHmzvyTN8NgKyW9vCgs_t360u3ncZESeEWDsS0tOY9HPdgigZ7cBrb3Hu0CAJ97eXqSg%3D%3D)

**It 's not pretty, but here is the cold, hard truth**: Our nation is in a health crisis. We have soaring cases of obesity and chronic disease, an ultra-processed food diet, and less than 1⁄4 of all children are getting their recommended amount of physical activity.

** Our future is on the line.
And we won't succeed without your help! **
Peter - I'm working with my friends at the Future Prosperity Initiative and fellow America First Patriots to fight for a healthier, more prosperous America - but that starts with [**your help**](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=816174fd16814587aca7366c55467c2b&_e=liAW1V18rC57FCJOcOmrE3suAFzDkezgqeQX_JS04tPO3Ry0EfgRmIRVLfx01LfnYl8tkC00QCWls-tYGIH2HnhH8Ti3jMfbmu9RsJWRjjch1TKjM0qAZLL5SU5fWFChRZ3C0bnzfQAXAeO3eb6iSZyLNCOogFQW2udpf6oLuFRLtyX7x1e_DVcQSlz12b73qLQD4kyTDJUGKDj1SevXuiUxHqS9neeD1E37eWv68X1MCLcT_oblPIPMbPMdrtPO9n-0QTapiOnoBZhNzkgqm53BSh7ujlMLCJNZnPB9WP640Wo-GN9xzXp3AmS1aL2Nl8Z-Gwe9JTrMcaJbn34I8OrOxM5C7uPEIlZXrB253KILfdjt-cNNy2YnGaqVzblrHyjuUkMOcyAZRIk_r0UolpDOuWMqjNHjR30o288Y9g6x5RvOgGvSauVv89iDCdn-AcebPk0wlU8va2M8hLMyT7-pcLFp-zJoT2n-8Zt80czX6y4Z73GPo_XZCYRMpv01D0KRSmo8R5NFBgG-SCZfmw%3D%3D).

name: Sarah McBride
subject: This is an all out attack on reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The “Big Beautiful Bill” that Trump signed into law on July 4th just keeps getting worse.
#
The “Big Beautiful Bill” that Trump signed into law on July 4th just keeps getting worse. Buried in its 1,116 pages is a deeply harmful provision that restricts Medicaid funding for nonprofits that offer abortion care.
It was designed to target health care organizations like Planned Parenthood and to prevent access to abortion care across the country. **This is a backdoor abortion ban.**
This is an all out attack on reproductive freedom, as well as on patients who rely on places like Planned Parenthood for non-abortion related services, like birth control, cancer screenings, and STI tests.
MAGA politicians are trying to score political points by rolling back our rights and punishing the people who can least afford it. And they’re doing it while ignoring the real crises American families are facing every day, from unaffordable child care to out-of-control prescription drug prices.
In Congress, I’m doing everything I can to fight back and secure reproductive freedom for _everyone_. But I can’t do it alone.
**If you believe every person deserves the freedom to decide what happens to their body, and that no one should be denied access to care because of who they are or how much they earn,** [**please chip in $5 or anything you can to help me keep fighting back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250719-1?refcode=em20250719-2193&amount=5&refcode2=2193_21716_VtcCjs&akid=2193%2E21716%2EVtcCjs)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250719-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250719-2193&refcode2=2193_21716_VtcCjs&akid=2193%2E21716%2EVtcCjs)**
Although this bill is a big setback, I know that together we can build a future where care is centered in compassion, not cruelty, and where politicians don’t get between patients and their doctors.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250719-1&t=1&refcode2=2193_21716_VtcCjs&akid=2193%2E21716%2EVtcCjs)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2193%2E21716%2EVtcCjs)

| | | Hey team -- It's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I'll cut to the chase: **We NEED you to represent Pennsylvania in our Democratic Strategy Interview for 7/19/25.**

**[I'll tell you more in a moment, but before I do, will you share your answers real quick?>>](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250719-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250719-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20772%2E9716520%2EHyHJZv)**

If I've learned anything in politics, it's that getting a head start isn't just important -- it's _crucial._ Victories only happen when we start well _before_ the elections. **And that means today.**

But we also need the right kind of head start. So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now: [www.dscc.org/DemStrategyInterview/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250719-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250719-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20772%2E9716520%2EHyHJZv) **

🦈🦈 **Shark Week starts tomorrow!** 🦈🦈 For Governor Whitmer, Shark Week is a big deal. A few years ago, she got some advice to put a smiley face on her notes — to remind herself to be a “happy warrior” during tough fights. **But Governor Whitmer knew feel-good fluff wouldn’t cut it.** Instead, she wrote herself a different reminder: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777723/558363594/1880077704?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE3NDU5NDYtZTg2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UoYm6_BrJr51MdjSda3v_bX9RsBFuDB1IG_0DWG69TM=&emci=3f745946-e864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=41745946-e864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1028753) **“It’s Shark Week” was her way of staying fierce and fighting hard, even when the attacks were coming in relentlessly, and the challenges seemed insurmountable.** Right now, we need that Shark Week energy more than ever. Republicans in Congress just passed a massive budget that guts Medicaid and SNAP assistance so they can hand out even more tax cuts to billionaires. Rural hospitals in Michigan could be forced to close. Hundreds of thousands of Michiganders are at risk of losing SNAP food assistance. Housing costs will increase across the country. There’s no way to sugar coat it — this vote was an attack on working Americans. **[We can’t meet these attacks with half-measures or polite smiles._We need to Fight Like Hell._ Add your name right now to stand with Governor Whitmer and show you’re ready to take back our power in the next election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777724/558363595/1880077704?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE3NDU5NDYtZTg2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UoYm6_BrJr51MdjSda3v_bX9RsBFuDB1IG_0DWG69TM=&emci=3f745946-e864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=41745946-e864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1028753)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111777725/558363596/1880077704?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250719_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE3NDU5NDYtZTg2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UoYm6_BrJr51MdjSda3v_bX9RsBFuDB1IG_0DWG69TM=&emci=3f745946-e864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=41745946-e864-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1028753)

name: Bera HQ
subject: Anything but beautiful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

**You deserve to know the truth about what was in the “Big, Beautiful Bill”:**

❌ Massive cuts to Medicaid
❌ Handouts for billionaires
❌ New work requirements that make it harder for families to access care.

name: Our Mistake
subject: INSIDER ALERT: Massive Survival Food Overstock - Shocking Discounts Inside!
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

INSIDER ALERT:

HUGE SAVINGS: WAREHOUSE OVERLOAD – YOU WIN BIG!

If you've been watching the headlines, you already know – the threat
of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real
than ever.

Our 4Patriots 4-WEEK BUY 1 GET 1 FREE SURVIVAL FOOD KITS have been
flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because
people are waking up to the truth – you can't count on the system
anymore.

So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: PRODUCE AS MANY
KITS AS HUMANLY POSSIBLE.

And wow... did he ever deliver.

The result? A TIDAL WAVE OF INVENTORY JUST CRASHED INTO OUR WAREHOUSE
– MORE KITS THAN WE HAVE SPACE FOR.

Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your
help.

THIS IS YOUR CHANCE TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF OUR MISTAKE.

We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium
survival food kits – just to move them fast.

When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for
your family... YOU'RE HELPING AN AMERICAN-OWNED COMPANY STAY AFLOAT
THROUGH A SUPPLY CHAIN NIGHTMARE.

And yes – YOU'LL GET A 2 ADDITIONAL FREE BONUSES as our thank you.

CLICK HERE TO CLAIM YOUR EXCLUSIVE DEAL ON THESE 4-WEEK BUY 1 GET 1
FREE SURVIVAL FOOD KITS WHILE WE STILL HAVE INVENTORY.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-afd472793e904b2c97d7135f0708ca9a/63]

[4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-afd472793e904b2c97d7135f0708ca9a/63]

2 MONTHS OF FOOD, SECURITY & PEACE OF MIND – ALL IN ONE KIT

This is more than just food. It's FREEDOM IN A BOX.

These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying
meals that are built to last 25 years.

CLICK HERE NOW TO STOCK UP BEFORE OUR WAREHOUSE CLEARS OUT.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-afd472793e904b2c97d7135f0708ca9a/63]

That's right – NO JUNK FILLERS, NO SKETCHY INGREDIENTS – just real
food, crafted for real emergencies.

Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care,
these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when
everything else falls apart.

And thanks to the recent upgrades, THESE KITS CONTAIN MORE FOOD THAN
EVER.

It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll
ever see.

Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared.

Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed
your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most.

But this inventory won't last long.

CLICK HERE TO GRAB YOUR 4-WEEK BUY 1 GET 1 FREE SURVIVAL FOOD KITS
WHILE WE STILL HAVE INVENTORY.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-afd472793e904b2c97d7135f0708ca9a/63]

Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters

P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to
important charities that help American veterans and their families.
Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team
Rubicon and Operation Homefront.

REAL PEOPLE. REAL EMERGENCIES. REAL GRATITUDE.

[Customers Love Their Survival Food Kits]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-afd472793e904b2c97d7135f0708ca9a/63]

_RORY H.__
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to
prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival
food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning
other things."_

_BILLY H.
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my
cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it
simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the
chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good
soup."_

_KEVIN S.
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag,
in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is
where to start."_

_CAROL B.
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato
soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a
wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_

_KEN K.
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have
been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been
through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at
least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an
emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to
eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and
friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think
anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do
something. You can't miss out on this deal."_

_JUSTIN A.
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how
good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels
good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I
intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer
service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival
food I have found, and the company is great."_

_GARY M.
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into
my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to
prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am
going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone
should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_

_JOHN H.
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of
a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been
hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have
our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but
"when"."_

CLICK HERE TO CLAIM YOUR EXCLUSIVE DEAL ON THESE 4-WEEK BUY 1 GET 1
FREE SURVIVAL FOOD KITS WHILE WE STILL HAVE INVENTORY.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-afd472793e904b2c97d7135f0708ca9a/63]

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/76322452ab204f619e15d355a874b2df-883228571e9d4a79872b72130334207d/63].

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

name: YOUR HOME IS NEXT
subject: Florida needs FEMA. Not photo ops.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Climate change is already here, Friend.
Florida is hurting. Homes flooded. Infrastructure buckling. People stranded.
But instead of demanding real relief, our leaders are busy staging press conferences. I’ll be direct, I need your help to save lives.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/57416F51624757424E4D59456730734D374253537175466C344465376E6A6758726A2B6A4B7A4E34764F7570736C4335596C66724C54713961524B565272307A/editor_images/IMG_2025%202.jpg]
Florida needs FEMA.
Florida needs action.
Florida needs leadership that shows up , which is why my run for U.S. Senate is crucial.
Here’s the truth: the people of this state deserve more than disaster theater. They deserve a government that prepares, responds, and protects. We are aiming to reinvest in FEMA, reinvest in community infrastructure, and reinvest in the education of our people to ensure everyone stays safe.
If you’re ready for a Senator who will fight for funding, join us.
The way forward is paved with your help, contribute now to help us keep our work up! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

clean_body: [] Climate change is already here, Friend. Florida is hurting. Homes flooded. Infrastructure buckling. People stranded. But instead of demanding real relief, our leaders are busy staging press conferences. I’ll be direct, I need your help to save lives. [] Florida needs FEMA. Florida needs action. Florida needs leadership that shows up , which is why my run for U.S. Senate is crucial. Here’s the truth: the people of this state deserve more than disaster theater. They deserve a government that prepares, responds, and protects. We are aiming to reinvest in FEMA, reinvest in community infrastructure, and reinvest in the education of our people to ensure everyone stays safe. If you’re ready for a Senator who will fight for funding, join us. The way forward is paved with your help, contribute now to help us keep our work up! [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Or, donate another amount [] We’re done waiting for Washington to care. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you enlist with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
My fight won’t be won with tweets or press releases. I need you on my side to get this done. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7f72a9127ab64b73a305990b5bdd7fc1&_e=AytxDtMiQbMqyBgQd0GTO28xaAclKlintQ2ANbFicNG-2KsMexZzNg3dmttwyLoxFtLd9z4pVa_kF4ZB4HSOyfFAcZZQmsYGl9eGj1LRVY2dbRjG9hSwvVwvyikaINLODILtOQ_ulFom6vfR3UYrRsORB4DKlYPdC1e3HmSqWHGPsWj2MRhcKdMjAbEaF9BG8TNT712QSdjBsB6zs0-_YqJmJ9_dNdZ7iecgzpLzsjBjiLq4ByUDZ2dKtMjYC87bLv2f8_jyZGVBhvat1uUM_RomuUfvQihHMIzGMDLqVfxjFd2EsV6YtHQZNBN8DwSC4RC4CSEhpucARWDKxbbrRB7X2D7u43-IMrxQwaDmB7pqVXJz_zjyfAu2ETbh4GzYXWI1ytpE7ONcWEZQdjuyyQhoHV0uLexJdhjcAcwRSC9M2jBvCprk0M8mqZMxlhjcchZ6XhdH2pLl4H4aFJ5CZi2MnOakPO3ccAUJRv-yimMhZHFX1lIGFqt70UdVkkzSq3GBp9AUJxh19hosejgIBDKE4-J2loy9Laja7ZxomSlaBl1F8-AjuMudzlspRZYPRH-Dp91T4khRv7DVUb0Is7hW0GpSYWPzpgm_SZT6LtB53wY6ICO-9Qbq3nw8qXsSrmWGoyVFPoU37PQFAhKrg3HwlGVYB6dwCTerJkt5q7NcgO-l9-MIBi1h8FmOp0Ar1HXOjwyaq1TPS-7UwwPxXh1RzrBx-2kh31LTjVUpdhcoLoJvS3T_qkHdoqmHqGKHSUwiyMK-T3fAOov4Eo_rrcL_fXteJA0SaEN0ojnZN_lz8U4BZTvFeugiPErt3x-JQKTMAwiOhVFWtvSFWZ7ItXlvZI2q5L7CHjWucXNJphQmk79sl46KxBeh5FWP210q0D2BXl9mQL5Bh1DpjRU-mO3sEK6Zu7unTjFXCcoJrKACD8GlzOEP605S779lycDzT5Up6teMiB1mvUkCev5ucKNomw4y0YHpyH2NHadvanfDcRob2sMFiS8uRBoJhmWhNgrFhaOraf4dvvP2UQ7nmoyil7mUQbaCxhDTG3Rf7K-gcVKw208QjgR-eR8g6PXi)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out.

I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today?

Hear me out.

I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender.

_**And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading.
**_
In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left.

The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota.

[**ENLIST WITH ME TO SAVE AMERICA →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7f72a9127ab64b73a305990b5bdd7fc1&_e=AytxDtMiQbMqyBgQd0GTO28xaAclKlintQ2ANbFicNG-2KsMexZzNg3dmttwyLoxFtLd9z4pVa_kF4ZB4HSOyfFAcZZQmsYGl9eGj1LRVY2dbRjG9hSwvVwvyikaINLODILtOQ_ulFom6vfR3UYrRsORB4DKlYPdC1e3HmSqWHGPsWj2MRhcKdMjAbEaF9BG8TNT712QSdjBsB6zs0-_YqJmJ9_dNdZ7iecgzpLzsjBjiLq4ByUDZ2dKtMjYC87bLv2f8_jyZGVBhvat1uUM_RomuUfvQihHMIzGMDLqVfxjFd2EsV6YtHQZNBN8DwSC4RC4CSEhpucARWDKxbbrRB7X2D7u43-IMrxQwaDmB7pqVXJz_zjyfAu2ETbh4GzYXWI1ytpE7ONcWEZQdjuyyQhoHV0uLexJdhjcAcwRSC_-ZqK6NR-nhmov2RN1ZENQBn4O04PgEZApZieKCF56wWUxepi07WtqPpjn062ny-myv8TVUQvtKwYibEnmbkTtHFDjnhj5fweGCqQQ_PPX5KKkAcxaMrJQrEs6AHkh5_e3y450FAOW_VVraoDQJOfKaBGwIcX0SHmINGTwAu0T87sHvMt1xDR2RT1pfAc8rDxzkod5m2pdYMaIgC44WaoX2_QxF6Fo6pBG4lCifi-iiDO0Si5Awb9ZXr38ggPrqv4ifY2ppBX8WZdlDQxmOmWYiea3La0570TR5BxxW8Jfcg8sVfhchr9K9Fa5nStE5_OWj0wsL4p9y9pqP95WoLbz4OZBhO0mWTi5CNJWphfI_nCsd8Px-t6J0cukglPdXYydzjjfTNHrJK5Ahl00gEmxNdDsACMCOELQMhq5_tcY6arDUnS93hjh65dTCPmhW84L0c4hbSRZBGxQsY31tXm2W2ZdO-20Qq1w5ka1Iek0MnknX0Ar8qXrw1_ZvsulrY1-Ry4ZR3GUYzYMXnj5hMghPmkT52oSMFUkzCnsuBOXS0FG0G_aMzlNvjGiD29wLVLve4DNybwC_SpzISjFZxW7Kgmeoh0kQ-OboFlkZSWQckcsl4D6wZQS5uU0O8Ej2xh5I0GtvzPS1joDZ7U6nKQj)

clean_body: My fight won’t be won with tweets or press releases. I need you on my side to get this done. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate. But after more than 20 years serving this country overseas, I came home and saw what was happening — and knew I couldn’t sit this one out. I deployed nine times to over 70 countries. I led teams in war zones. I’ve put myself in harm’s way for our nation. Now I’m asking: will you enlist with me today? Hear me out. I’m running against Minnesota’s lieutenant governor — someone who encouraged the violent unrest in 2020 and tried to dismantle our police while our cities were burning. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. That’s not leadership. That’s surrender. And this kind of radicalism isn’t just happening on the coasts. It’s spreading. In New York, Democrats just nominated a socialist so extreme he promised to arrest Israel’s Prime Minister and replace police with social workers. Sounds insane — because it is. But this is the new blueprint of the Left. The heartland is next if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota. As a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I know how to be a part of a team and manage one. I am confident that much more can be accomplished when the unit works together. - We’ve already built early momentum, and thousands of grassroots conservatives have joined our ranks. But now we’re entering a critical phase. We need grassroots strength to keep this mission alive — to fuel ads, organize events, and push back against the far-left machine. You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: humbly asking
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111778342/558366232/-1313151883?refcode=250719em-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmI0MzE2Mi1lZTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRjVVsHevDo9mYtDI0nSYbBUPX-qPyjO-Suh3YTWpUc=)
---
Folks, I’ll make this quick: **I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and Oregon Secretary of State,****Tobias Read****. ** I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Tobias Read. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Tobias Read. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. [**So please, will you split a $3 donation to power Speak Up PAC and Tobias Read's****grassroots efforts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111778343/558366233/-1313151883?refcode=250719em-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmI0MzE2Mi1lZTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRjVVsHevDo9mYtDI0nSYbBUPX-qPyjO-Suh3YTWpUc=)
---

clean_body: | | | | | = Folks, I’ll make this quick: I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and Oregon Secretary of State,Tobias Read. I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like Tobias Read. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like Tobias Read. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. = = Sincere thanks, Stacey Abrams | | | Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, Speak Up PAC stands in solidarity with those who speak out for justice, equality, and the democratic process. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: The Spanberger Campaign
subject: To all of Abigail's dear supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111778468/558366677/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-19_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjA2MDllZWQtZWY2NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6bADWnlJIDdkgJAFPadi1IZJI4pQ2Gnpg1HK0itk0TY=)
☀️ To all of Abigail's dear supporters, 🇺🇲
We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom.
We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. _Our average gift last month was around $30._
It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that.
The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue.
_That's why the same far-right donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign._
Now, with the general election underway, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth.
Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive — which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for July.
While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed just a few dollars, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win.
**[What do you say, Peter? clean_body: We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom. = ☀️ To all of Abigail's dear supporters, 🇺🇲 We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom. We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. Our average gift last month was around $30. It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that. The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue. That's why the same far-right donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign. Now, with the general election underway, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth. Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive — which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for July. While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed just a few dollars, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win. = = = = = = = 💪 Your support means so much at this critical moment of the race. ♥️ Together, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. `Independent Media Just .26/day W/ Paid-Subscription Benefits!`
_**Weekly Substack AMA w/ Cliff & David, video posted for paid subscribers! Starting next week!**_
_**Insider stories in regular columns or videos, live shout-outs to new paid members, behind the scenes video/pics from oru livestreams, video production, etc, and a lottery for free merch**_
_**Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs**_**(starting next week)**
_**Support our Soundcheck Fund, create an ecosystem of indy media/creators to save democracy**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.IQr81WHFabUo2QMgzGv7O99AMGuNX7zFCyJTdnBuVBU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168738784)
The spectacle of American politics, once a grand if noisy bazaar of ideas, has now degenerated into something more akin to a medicine show--complete with greasepaint, [snake oil,](https://substack.com/redirect/cdd8e366-03ee-4ecc-bea4-13d644ac2605?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and a wheezing, [creepy](https://substack.com/redirect/f22f66e9-0f4e-4028-9e6e-b212f8ce0aca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), c[o-opted salesman](https://substack.com/redirect/e85d71a7-7dc3-4ff0-bc24-af838f8555d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) too demented to recall what he hawked the week before.
The latest grotesquerie from Donald J. Trump is measured less by fact than by foundation. Literally. The man is now applying makeup not just to his jowls, but to his _hands_.
This week, on the South Lawn of the White House, C-Span's unblinking lens caught Trump mid harangue about trade. His right mitt was smeared with skin colored gunk, as if he was attempting to conceal [our republic's decay ](https://substack.com/redirect/f8834a40-779a-407d-9f71-e2f0935cccc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)under a hefty dab of pancake.
Even among the true believers--the MAGA faithful who'd gladly elect a lawn gnome (which, to be honest, often bear a striking resemblance to J.D. Vance) if it promised to build a wall-- the whispering has begun. Owen Shroyer, a January 6 jailbird and Trump pardon recipient who now delivers rightwing podcasts, muttered that [things are "getting strange."](https://substack.com/redirect/008b4ed4-1b8b-406d-b601-66cf50561520?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Official explanation? White House hacks insist Trump bruised his hand by "shaking too many hands." Medical experts suggest something far less heroic: blood draws. Repeated ones from the top of the right hand.
In elderly, flabby people, like Trump, doctors say the veins up the arm and opposite the elbow are more difficult to tap, because they hide. Much like bone -purred Americans when it comes to serving in Vietnam.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54ba5ef6-887d-428b-8773-f93b6dc42f27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But why, one wonders, is Old Man Orange getting so many jabs?
White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says Trump needed multiple blood tests after being diagnosed with "chronic venous insufficiency." That became obvious when Trump was photographed recently at a FIFA promotional event lifting a trophy, surely the most strenuous activity he's untertaken since hoisting a cheeseburger.
Then, when Trump sat down, sharp-eyed observers noticed his shoes were untied. Not fashionably undone, but bloated, misshapen, as if strapped around two hams left out too long in the sun.
Swollen ankles, say medical experts, can mean everything from congestive heart failure to kidney disease. The White House says blood tests have shown no evidence of deep vein thrombosis or arterial disease, and that Trump's physical health is "fine."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/17bc0c61-be6f-4939-9af4-7092bda020d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But you don't have to go. back very far, just 2018, to see that when Ronny "pill mill" Jackson was still White House doctor, claiming Trump would reach Methuselah's age, he was already suffering from heart disease:
> For instance, Dr. Ronny Jackson, the White House physician, proclaimed Trump to be in excellent overall health Tuesday, saying that he enjoyed "significant long-term cardiac and overall health benefits" thanks to abstaining from alcohol and tobacco.
> But the next day, Dr. Sanjay Gupta, CNN's chief medical correspondent, said that Trump already has heart disease. Gupta based that on the president's rising coronary calcium scores over the years. The measurement, which can predict the likelihood of having coronary artery disease, looks at the amount of plaque present.

_**Support our Soundcheck Fund, create an ecosystem of indy media/creators to save democracy**_
And he clearly doesn't have what you'd call [the best and brightest on the health beat these days](https://substack.com/redirect/c43f35e9-36ed-4d0b-969f-363860c2e406?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Additionally, Trump's mental health is clearly in decline. Th faculties of this burnt-out ringmaster now operate on a dimmer switch seemingly set permanently to twilight. Which is dangerous for all sorts of reasons, not the least of which are the jackals he's surrounded himself with--[all seemingly ready to pounce at a moment's notice](https://substack.com/redirect/cdd8e366-03ee-4ecc-bea4-13d644ac2605?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In a recent exchange with a Fox News reporter (a network that once functioned as his cheerleading squad), Trump confused a question about detainees with a travel itinerary for himself. He might as well have answered, "I like turtles."
(And if we're being honest, he's only gotten this far due to [a protection racket known as "corporate media"](https://substack.com/redirect/4ef87dfe-7ed2-4a40-8a7d-fe64cb545fba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
This is not a man losing his grip--it's a man who has already crashed the car and is now attempting to explain away blood test bruises by citing the rigor of handshakes. Meanwhile, his team, realizing this, [tries to eliminate anyone from public life](https://substack.com/redirect/f2f1e017-c0b2-4a23-9cea-8d23a277a3ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who would point out the crimes, the betrayals, the cognitive collapse.
Foreign powers have noticed.
In Moscow, [Russia's Kremlin now openly mocks Trump's decline](https://substack.com/redirect/e85d71a7-7dc3-4ff0-bc24-af838f8555d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Russian media have declared him "unable to speak clearly, coherently, or intelligently" and that Trump, "has clearly lost his mind." When your old KGB fan club starts calling you insane, and [Putin seems ready to to tell you "it's not you, it's me](https://substack.com/redirect/0b987c16-bc7a-424e-9b8f-76c42ca1a7bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," it may be time to hang up the red tie.
Just in the past week, Trump could not remember whom he appointed to the Federal Reserve. Trump could not parse a basic question. And in literally every appearance before the news cameras, he rambled like a man lost in his own hallway.
Now, even Trump's own die-hard supporters --a crowd that would cheer if he slapped their mothers, so long as he did it on stage--are murmuring their doubts, taking it out on him [as well as Republicans around him](https://substack.com/redirect/48beaf79-606a-4d86-9683-a1b539650cf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And these doubts are just pilling on top of others, such as his [bombing Iran](https://substack.com/redirect/78baae9d-34e7-48cc-8383-2e13e878b147?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [cutting Medicaid](https://substack.com/redirect/e4ac42cd-a762-4572-963d-62d71774352c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the explosive anger at his clear [attempt to bury the Jeffrey Epstein files](https://substack.com/redirect/f22f66e9-0f4e-4028-9e6e-b212f8ce0aca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This is not merely the story of a bruised hand or a bulging ankle. It is the portrait of a republic slipping on its own banana peel, of a once-mighty office--and country--now reduced to a platform for a carnival barking ghost[ and his mini-me's](https://substack.com/redirect/6c8c5a52-19c4-4606-b042-a153c7ee496a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The tragedy is not that Trump is sick--he may be, or he may simply be old and absurd. The true tragedy is that, in a nation of 330 million, this is what passes for a President of the United States. We could have elected anyone, [and the ongoing deterioration of our culture](https://substack.com/redirect/6fd3ffec-8e24-449c-9d39-c30682e0b323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over 40 years, and especially the last 10, has led us here.
Despite it all, somehow, we keep going, led by [a man who can no longer tell where he's going](https://substack.com/redirect/6f90c9ac-ec8c-4ff7-a971-cf6aa6d3fcb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but insists on driving the hearse anyway.

It’s surrounded by miles of treacherous swampland, and there’s really only one way out for these illegal aliens – DEPORTATION. And believe it or not, Democrats are already HELL-BENT on seeing its demolition. They even filed suit to make it happen! But I know my best supporters will rally behind me at this critical moment by answering one simple question... [[OFFICIAL TRUMP POLL]]() SHOULD I BUILD MORE FACILITIES LIKE ALLIGATOR ALCATRAZ? YES OR NO? [[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE HERE]](-) If we can get 10,000 more responses before tonight’s MIDNIGHT DEADLINE, I’ll share a PERSONAL THANK YOU NOTE with everyone who responds! name: Democrats.org
subject: Our $1.5 million investment in Virginia →
body:
---
Derek, Earlier this week, we announced an initial **$1.5 million investment into the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign to win up and down the ballot this November and next.** This is one of the _largest and earliest initial investments_ the DNC has ever made to the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign in an off-year election cycle. Specifically, this investment will:
* Help the Virginia coordinated campaign to continue to hire organizers and other key staff in order to talk to voters early and often.
* Fund early persuasion programs to ensure that voters know the stakes of these elections and the differences between the candidates.
* Test new tactics and tools to ensure our message is resonating with voters across the commonwealth.
